questions.content: A company has a mobile application that makes HTTP API calls to an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The ALB routes requests to an AWS Lambda function. Many different versions of the application are in use at any given time, including versions that are in testing by a subset of users. The version of the application is defined in the user-agent header that is sent with all requests to the API. After a series of recent changes to the API, the company has observed issues with the application. The company needs to gather a metric for each API operation by response code for each version of the application that is in use. A DevOps engineer has modified the Lambda function to extract the API operation name, version information from the user-agent header and response code. Which additional set of actions should the DevOps engineer take to gather the required metrics?

options.label: A
options.content: Modify the Lambda function to write the API operation name, response code, and version number as a log line to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Configure a CloudWatch Logs metric filter that increments a metric for each API operation name. Specify response code and application version as dimensions for the metric.

options.label: B
options.content: Modify the Lambda function to write the API operation name, response code, and version number as a log line to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Configure a CloudWatch Logs Insights query to populate CloudWatch metrics from the log lines. Specify response code and application version as dimensions for the metric.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the ALB access logs to write to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Modify the Lambda function to respond to the ALB with the API operation name, response code, and version number as response metadata. Configure a CloudWatch Logs metric filter that increments a metric for each API operation name. Specify response code and application version as dimensions for the metric.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure AWS X-Ray integration on the Lambda function. Modify the Lambda function to create an X-Ray subsegment with the API operation name, response code, and version number. Configure X-Ray insights to extract an aggregated metric for each API operation name and to publish the metric to Amazon CloudWatch. Specify response code and application version as dimensions for the metric.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。将 API 操作名、响应代码和版本号写入 CloudWatch Logs 后，可以用指标筛选器按操作名递增指标，并把响应代码和应用版本作为维度。

讨论指出，Logs Insights、修改 ALB 访问日志或引入 X-Ray 都更复杂或不适合此处按响应代码和版本收集指标的需求。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。将 API 操作名、响应代码和版本号写入 CloudWatch Logs 后，可以用指标筛选器按操作名递增指标，并把响应代码和应用版本作为维度。

讨论指出，Logs Insights、修改 ALB 访问日志或引入 X-Ray 都更复杂或不适合此处按响应代码和版本收集指标的需求。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. Writing the API operation name, response code, and version number to CloudWatch Logs lets a metric filter increment metrics by operation name and use response code and application version as dimensions.

The discussion notes that Logs Insights, ALB log changes, or X-Ray add unnecessary complexity or do not fit this metric-focused requirement as directly.

questions.content: A company provides an application to customers. The application has an Amazon API Gateway REST API that invokes an AWS Lambda function. On initialization, the Lambda function loads a large amount of data from an Amazon DynamoDB table. The data load process results in long cold-start times of 8-10 seconds. The DynamoDB table has DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) configured. Customers report that the application intermittently takes a long time to respond to requests. The application receives thousands of requests throughout the day. In the middle of the day, the application experiences 10 times more requests than at any other time of the day. Near the end of the day, the application's request volume decreases to 10% of its normal total. A DevOps engineer needs to reduce the latency of the Lambda function at all times of the day. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure provisioned concurrency on the Lambda function with a concurrency value of 1. Delete the DAX cluster for the DynamoDB table.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure reserved concurrency on the Lambda function with a concurrency value of 0.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure provisioned concurrency on the Lambda function. Configure AWS Application Auto Scaling on the Lambda function with provisioned concurrency values set to a minimum of 1 and a maximum of 100.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure reserved concurrency on the Lambda function. Configure AWS Application Auto Scaling on the API Gateway API with a reserved concurrency maximum value of 100.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。预置并发可以让 Lambda 始终保持可用执行环境，从而降低冷启动延迟；Application Auto Scaling 将预置并发设置为最小 1、最大 100，可以在流量突增时扩展，在低流量时控制成本。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。预置并发可以让 Lambda 始终保持可用执行环境，从而降低冷启动延迟；Application Auto Scaling 将预置并发设置为最小 1、最大 100，可以在流量突增时扩展，在低流量时控制成本。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. Provisioned concurrency keeps Lambda execution environments ready to reduce cold-start latency, while Application Auto Scaling with a minimum of 1 and maximum of 100 can handle traffic spikes and scale down to manage cost.

questions.content: A company is adopting AWS CodeDeploy to automate its application deployments for a Java-Apache Tomcat application with an Apache Webserver. The development team started with a proof of concept, created a deployment group for a developer environment, and performed functional tests within the application. After completion, the team will create additional deployment groups for staging and production. The current log level is configured within the Apache settings, but the team wants to change this configuration dynamically when the deployment occurs, so that they can set different log level configurations depending on the deployment group without having a different application revision for each group. How can these requirements be met with the LEAST management overhead and without requiring different script versions for each deployment group?

options.label: A
options.content: Tag the Amazon EC2 instances depending on the deployment group. Then place a script into the application revision that calls the metadata service and the EC2 API to identify which deployment group the instance is part of. Use this information to configure the log level settings. Reference the script as part of the AfterInstall lifecycle hook in the appspec.yml file.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a script that uses the CodeDeploy environment variable DEPLOYMENT_GROUP_ NAME to identify which deployment group the instance is part of. Use this information to configure the log level settings. Reference this script as part of the BeforeInstall lifecycle hook in the appspec.yml file.

options.label: C
options.content: Create a CodeDeploy custom environment variable for each environment. Then place a script into the application revision that checks this environment variable to identify which deployment group the instance is part of. Use this information to configure the log level settings. Reference this script as part of the ValidateService lifecycle hook in the appspec.yml file.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a script that uses the CodeDeploy environment variable DEPLOYMENT_GROUP_ID to identify which deployment group the instance is part of to configure the log level settings. Reference this script as part of the Install lifecycle hook in the appspec.yml file.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B。使用 CodeDeploy 环境变量 DEPLOYMENT_GROUP_NAME 识别实例所属部署组，再在 BeforeInstall 生命周期钩子中运行脚本配置日志级别。

讨论指出 Start、Install、TestTraffic、AllowTraffic 和 End 等事件不能脚本化，因此选择可执行脚本的生命周期钩子更合适。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B。使用 CodeDeploy 环境变量 DEPLOYMENT_GROUP_NAME 识别实例所属部署组，再在 BeforeInstall 生命周期钩子中运行脚本配置日志级别。

讨论指出 Start、Install、TestTraffic、AllowTraffic 和 End 等事件不能脚本化，因此选择可执行脚本的生命周期钩子更合适。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: B. The script can use the CodeDeploy DEPLOYMENT_GROUP_NAME environment variable to identify the deployment group and configure log-level settings during the BeforeInstall lifecycle hook.

The discussion notes that several deployment events cannot be scripted, so a scriptable lifecycle hook is the appropriate place for this logic.

questions.content: A company requires its developers to tag all Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes in an account to indicate a desired backup frequency. This requirement Includes EBS volumes that do not require backups. The company uses custom tags named Backup_Frequency that have values of none, dally, or weekly that correspond to the desired backup frequency. An audit finds that developers are occasionally not tagging the EBS volumes. A DevOps engineer needs to ensure that all EBS volumes always have the Backup_Frequency tag so that the company can perform backups at least weekly unless a different value is specified. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Set up AWS Config in the account. Create a custom rule that returns a compliance failure for all Amazon EC2 resources that do not have a Backup Frequency tag applied. Configure a remediation action that uses a custom AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to apply the Backup_Frequency tag with a value of weekly.

options.label: B
options.content: Set up AWS Config in the account. Use a managed rule that returns a compliance failure for EC2::Volume resources that do not have a Backup Frequency tag applied. Configure a remediation action that uses a custom AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to apply the Backup_Frequency tag with a value of weekly.

options.label: C
options.content: Turn on AWS CloudTrail in the account. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to EBS CreateVolume events. Configure a custom AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to apply the Backup_Frequency tag with a value of weekly. Specify the runbook as the target of the rule.

options.label: D
options.content: Turn on AWS CloudTrail in the account. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to EBS CreateVolume events or EBS ModifyVolume events. Configure a custom AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to apply the Backup_Frequency tag with a value of weekly. Specify the runbook as the target of the rule.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B。AWS Config 托管规则可以检查 EBS 卷是否缺少 Backup Frequency 标签，并通过自定义 Systems Manager Automation 运行手册自动补救，添加 Backup_Frequency=weekly。

讨论认为它比自定义规则更简单，并且能覆盖现有资源；只处理新卷的方案不满足要求。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B。AWS Config 托管规则可以检查 EBS 卷是否缺少 Backup Frequency 标签，并通过自定义 Systems Manager Automation 运行手册自动补救，添加 Backup_Frequency=weekly。

讨论认为它比自定义规则更简单，并且能覆盖现有资源；只处理新卷的方案不满足要求。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: B. An AWS Config managed rule can detect EBS volumes without the Backup Frequency tag, and a custom Systems Manager Automation runbook can remediate them by applying Backup_Frequency=weekly.

The discussion favors this because it is simpler than a custom rule and addresses existing resources, not only newly created volumes.

questions.content: A company is using an Amazon Aurora cluster as the data store for its application. The Aurora cluster is configured with a single DB instance. The application performs read and write operations on the database by using the cluster's instance endpoint. The company has scheduled an update to be applied to the cluster during an upcoming maintenance window. The cluster must remain available with the least possible interruption during the maintenance window. What should a DevOps engineer do to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Add a reader instance to the Aurora cluster. Update the application to use the Aurora cluster endpoint for write operations. Update the Aurora cluster's reader endpoint for reads.

options.label: B
options.content: Add a reader instance to the Aurora cluster. Create a custom ANY endpoint for the cluster. Update the application to use the Aurora cluster's custom ANY endpoint for read and write operations.

options.label: C
options.content: Turn on the Multi-AZ option on the Aurora cluster. Update the application to use the Aurora cluster endpoint for write operations. Update the Aurora cluster's reader endpoint for reads.

options.label: D
options.content: Turn on the Multi-AZ option on the Aurora cluster. Create a custom ANY endpoint for the cluster. Update the application to use the Aurora cluster's custom ANY endpoint for read and write operations

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。为 Aurora 集群添加读取实例，并让应用写入使用集群端点、读取使用 reader endpoint，可以按 Aurora 的标准端点模型分离读写流量。

讨论指出 Aurora 不支持自定义 ANY 端点，并且 Multi-AZ 相关选项不能解决该读写端点需求。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。为 Aurora 集群添加读取实例，并让应用写入使用集群端点、读取使用 reader endpoint，可以按 Aurora 的标准端点模型分离读写流量。

讨论指出 Aurora 不支持自定义 ANY 端点，并且 Multi-AZ 相关选项不能解决该读写端点需求。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. Adding a reader instance and using the Aurora cluster endpoint for writes plus the reader endpoint for reads follows Aurora's standard endpoint model for separating read and write traffic.

The discussion notes that Aurora does not support custom ANY endpoints, and the Multi-AZ options do not address this requirement.

questions.content: A company must encrypt all AMIs that the company shares across accounts. A DevOps engineer has access to a source account where an unencrypted custom AMI has been built. The DevOps engineer also has access to a target account where an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group will launch EC2 instances from the AMI. The DevOps engineer must share the AMI with the target account. The company has created an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key in the source account. Which additional steps should the DevOps engineer perform to meet the requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: In the source account, copy the unencrypted AMI to an encrypted AMI. Specify the KMS key in the copy action.

options.label: B
options.content: In the source account, copy the unencrypted AMI to an encrypted AMI. Specify the default Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) encryption key in the copy action.

options.label: C
options.content: In the source account, create a KMS grant that delegates permissions to the Auto Scaling group service-linked role in the target account.

options.label: D
options.content: In the source account, modify the key policy to give the target account permissions to create a grant. In the target account, create a KMS grant that delegates permissions to the Auto Scaling group service-linked role.

options.label: E
options.content: In the source account, share the unencrypted AMI with the target account.

options.label: F
options.content: In the source account, share the encrypted AMI with the target account.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A、D、F。源账户先把未加密 AMI 复制为使用 KMS 密钥加密的 AMI，再共享加密 AMI 给目标账户。

同时，源账户需要调整密钥策略允许目标账户创建授权，目标账户再为 Auto Scaling group 的服务相关角色创建 KMS grant，才能使用该加密 AMI。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A、D、F。源账户先把未加密 AMI 复制为使用 KMS 密钥加密的 AMI，再共享加密 AMI 给目标账户。

同时，源账户需要调整密钥策略允许目标账户创建授权，目标账户再为 Auto Scaling group 的服务相关角色创建 KMS grant，才能使用该加密 AMI。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: A, D, and F. The source account first copies the unencrypted AMI to an encrypted AMI with the KMS key, then shares that encrypted AMI with the target account.

The source account also must update the key policy to let the target account create a grant, and the target account creates a KMS grant for the Auto Scaling group's service-linked role.

questions.content: A company uses AWS CodePipeline pipelines to automate releases of its application A typical pipeline consists of three stages build, test, and deployment. The company has been using a separate AWS CodeBuild project to run scripts for each stage. However, the company now wants to use AWS CodeDeploy to handle the deployment stage of the pipelines. The company has packaged the application as an RPM package and must deploy the application to a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances are in an EC2 Auto Scaling group and are launched from a common AMI. Which combination of steps should a DevOps engineer perform to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new version of the common AMI with the CodeDeploy agent installed. Update the IAM role of the EC2 instances to allow access to CodeDeploy.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new version of the common AMI with the CodeDeploy agent installed. Create an AppSpec file that contains application deployment scripts and grants access to CodeDeploy.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an application in CodeDeploy. Configure an in-place deployment type. Specify the Auto Scaling group as the deployment target. Add a step to the CodePipeline pipeline to use EC2 Image Builder to create a new AMI. Configure CodeDeploy to deploy the newly created AMI.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an application in CodeDeploy. Configure an in-place deployment type. Specify the Auto Scaling group as the deployment target. Update the CodePipeline pipeline to use the CodeDeploy action to deploy the application.

options.label: E
options.content: Create an application in CodeDeploy. Configure an in-place deployment type. Specify the EC2 instances that are launched from the common AMI as the deployment target. Update the CodePipeline pipeline to use the CodeDeploy action to deploy the application.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A、D。需要先准备包含 CodeDeploy agent 的通用 AMI，并给 EC2 实例角色添加访问 CodeDeploy 的权限。

然后在 CodeDeploy 中创建应用，使用就地部署，以 Auto Scaling group 为部署目标，并让 CodePipeline 使用 CodeDeploy action 部署应用。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A、D。需要先准备包含 CodeDeploy agent 的通用 AMI，并给 EC2 实例角色添加访问 CodeDeploy 的权限。

然后在 CodeDeploy 中创建应用，使用就地部署，以 Auto Scaling group 为部署目标，并让 CodePipeline 使用 CodeDeploy action 部署应用。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: A and D. The EC2 fleet needs a common AMI that includes the CodeDeploy agent and an instance role that can access CodeDeploy.

Then create a CodeDeploy application, use an in-place deployment targeting the Auto Scaling group, and update CodePipeline to deploy through the CodeDeploy action.

questions.content: A company's security team requires that all external Application Load Balancers (ALBs) and Amazon API Gateway APIs are associated with AWS WAF web ACLs. The company has hundreds of AWS accounts, all of which are included in a single organization in AWS Organizations. The company has configured AWS Config for the organization. During an audit, the company finds some externally facing ALBs that are not associated with AWS WAF web ACLs. Which combination of steps should a DevOps engineer take to prevent future violations? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Delegate AWS Firewall Manager to a security account.

options.label: B
options.content: Delegate Amazon GuardDuty to a security account.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Firewall Manager policy to attach AWS WAF web ACLs to any newly created ALBs and API Gateway APIs.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon GuardDuty policy to attach AWS WAF web ACLs to any newly created ALBs and API Gateway APIs.

options.label: E
options.content: Configure an AWS Config managed rule to attach AWS WAF web ACLs to any newly created ALBs and API Gateway APIs.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、C。讨论提示看到 WAF 应联想到 AWS Firewall Manager；先将 Firewall Manager 委派给安全账户，再创建策略，将 AWS WAF web ACL 自动附加到新建的 ALB 和 API Gateway API。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、C。讨论提示看到 WAF 应联想到 AWS Firewall Manager；先将 Firewall Manager 委派给安全账户，再创建策略，将 AWS WAF web ACL 自动附加到新建的 ALB 和 API Gateway API。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A and C. The discussion points to AWS Firewall Manager for WAF governance: delegate Firewall Manager to a security account, then create a policy to attach AWS WAF web ACLs to newly created ALBs and API Gateway APIs.

questions.content: A company uses AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys and manual key rotation to meet regulatory compliance requirements. The security team wants to be notified when any keys have not been rotated after 90 days. Which solution will accomplish this?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS KMS to publish to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when keys are more than 90 days old.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge event to launch an AWS Lambda function to call the AWS Trusted Advisor API and publish to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.

options.label: C
options.content: Develop an AWS Config custom rule that publishes to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when keys are more than 90 days old.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure AWS Security Hub to publish to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when keys are more than 90 days old.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。讨论指出 KMS 本身不提供该通知功能，因此使用 AWS Config 自定义规则检测超过 90 天的密钥，并发布到 SNS 主题。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。讨论指出 KMS 本身不提供该通知功能，因此使用 AWS Config 自定义规则检测超过 90 天的密钥，并发布到 SNS 主题。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. The discussion says KMS does not provide this function directly, so an AWS Config custom rule can detect keys older than 90 days and publish notifications to an SNS topic.

questions.content: A security review has identified that an AWS CodeBuild project is downloading a database population script from an Amazon S3 bucket using an unauthenticated request. The security team does not allow unauthenticated requests to S3 buckets for this project. How can this issue be corrected in the MOST secure manner?

options.label: A
options.content: Add the bucket name to the AllowedBuckets section of the CodeBuild project settings. Update the build spec to use the AWS CLI to download the database population script.

options.label: B
options.content: Modify the S3 bucket settings to enable HTTPS basic authentication and specify a token. Update the build spec to use cURL to pass the token and download the database population script.

options.label: C
options.content: Remove unauthenticated access from the S3 bucket with a bucket policy. Modify the service role for the CodeBuild project to include Amazon S3 access. Use the AWS CLI to download the database population script.

options.label: D
options.content: Remove unauthenticated access from the S3 bucket with a bucket policy. Use the AWS CLI to download the database population script using an IAM access key and a secret access key.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。移除 S3 桶的未认证访问后，应把 S3 访问权限授予 CodeBuild 项目的服务角色，并让构建过程使用 AWS CLI 下载数据库初始化脚本。

这样脚本访问由 IAM 控制，不再依赖公开访问。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。移除 S3 桶的未认证访问后，应把 S3 访问权限授予 CodeBuild 项目的服务角色，并让构建过程使用 AWS CLI 下载数据库初始化脚本。

这样脚本访问由 IAM 控制，不再依赖公开访问。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. After removing unauthenticated access from the S3 bucket, grant S3 access to the CodeBuild service role and use the AWS CLI to download the database population script.

This keeps access controlled by IAM rather than public bucket access.

questions.content: An ecommerce company has chosen AWS to host its new platform. The company's DevOps team has started building an AWS Control Tower landing zone. The DevOps team has set the identity store within AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) to external identity provider (IdP) and has configured SAML 2.0. The DevOps team wants a robust permission model that applies the principle of least privilege. The model must allow the team to build and manage only the team's own resources. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create IAM policies that include the required permissions. Include the aws:PrincipalTag condition key.

options.label: B
options.content: Create permission sets. Attach an inline policy that includes the required permissions and uses the aws:PrincipalTag condition key to scope the permissions.

options.label: C
options.content: Create a group in the IdP. Place users in the group. Assign the group to accounts and the permission sets in IAM Identity Center.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a group in the IdP. Place users in the group. Assign the group to OUs and IAM policies.

options.label: E
options.content: Enable attributes for access control in IAM Identity Center. Apply tags to users. Map the tags as key-value pairs.

options.label: F
options.content: Enable attributes for access control in IAM Identity Center. Map attributes from the IdP as key-value pairs.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B、C、F。使用 IAM Identity Center permission sets，并在内联策略中通过 aws:PrincipalTag 限定权限范围。

讨论强调属性来自 IdP：需要在 IdP 中建组并分配到账户和权限集，同时启用 attributes for access control，把 IdP 属性映射为键值对。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B、C、F。使用 IAM Identity Center permission sets，并在内联策略中通过 aws:PrincipalTag 限定权限范围。

讨论强调属性来自 IdP：需要在 IdP 中建组并分配到账户和权限集，同时启用 attributes for access control，把 IdP 属性映射为键值对。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: B, C, and F. Use IAM Identity Center permission sets with an inline policy scoped by the aws:PrincipalTag condition key.

The discussion emphasizes that attributes come from the IdP, so create IdP groups, assign them to accounts and permission sets, and enable attributes for access control with IdP attribute mappings.

questions.content: An ecommerce company is receiving reports that its order history page is experiencing delays in reflecting the processing status of orders. The order processing system consists of an AWS Lambda function that uses reserved concurrency. The Lambda function processes order messages from an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue and inserts processed orders into an Amazon DynamoDB table. The DynamoDB table has auto scaling enabled for read and write capacity. Which actions should a DevOps engineer take to resolve this delay? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Check the ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage metric for the SQS queue. Increase the Lambda function concurrency limit.

options.label: B
options.content: Check the ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage metnc for the SQS queue Configure a redrive policy on the SQS queue.

options.label: C
options.content: Check the NumberOfMessagesSent metric for the SQS queue. Increase the SQS queue visibility timeout.

options.label: D
options.content: Check the WriteThrottleEvents metric for the DynamoDB table. Increase the maximum write capacity units (WCUs) for the table's scaling policy.

options.label: E
options.content: Check the Throttles metric for the Lambda function. Increase the Lambda function timeout.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A、D。检查 SQS 的 ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage 可判断队列是否积压，并通过提高 Lambda 并发限制提升消费能力。

同时检查 DynamoDB WriteThrottleEvents，如果写入节流，应提高表扩展策略中的最大 WCU。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A、D。检查 SQS 的 ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage 可判断队列是否积压，并通过提高 Lambda 并发限制提升消费能力。

同时检查 DynamoDB WriteThrottleEvents，如果写入节流，应提高表扩展策略中的最大 WCU。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: A and D. The SQS ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage metric shows queue backlog, and increasing Lambda concurrency can improve processing throughput.

Also check DynamoDB WriteThrottleEvents; if writes are throttled, increase the maximum WCUs in the table's scaling policy.

questions.content: A company has a single AWS account that runs hundreds of Amazon EC2 instances in a single AWS Region. New EC2 instances are launched and terminated each hour in the account. The account also includes existing EC2 instances that have been running for longer than a week. The company's security policy requires all running EC2 instances to use an EC2 instance profile. If an EC2 instance does not have an instance profile attached, the EC2 instance must use a default instance profile that has no IAM permissions assigned. A DevOps engineer reviews the account and discovers EC2 instances that are running without an instance profile. During the review, the DevOps engineer also observes that new EC2 instances are being launched without an instance profile. Which solution will ensure that an instance profile is attached to all existing and future EC2 instances in the Region?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to EC2 RunInstances API calls. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure the ec2-instance-profile-attached AWS Config managed rule with a trigger type of configuration changes. Configure an automatic remediation action that invokes an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to EC2 StartInstances API calls. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the iam-role-managed-policy-check AWS Config managed rule with a trigger type of configuration changes. Configure an automatic remediation action that invokes an AWS Lambda function to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B。使用 AWS Config 托管规则 ec2-instance-profile-attached，以配置变更作为触发器，能发现没有实例配置文件的 EC2 实例。

自动补救动作调用 Systems Manager Automation 运行手册，把默认 instance profile 附加到这些实例。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B。使用 AWS Config 托管规则 ec2-instance-profile-attached，以配置变更作为触发器，能发现没有实例配置文件的 EC2 实例。

自动补救动作调用 Systems Manager Automation 运行手册，把默认 instance profile 附加到这些实例。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: B. The AWS Config managed rule ec2-instance-profile-attached, triggered by configuration changes, can detect EC2 instances without an instance profile.

An automatic remediation action can invoke a Systems Manager Automation runbook to attach the default instance profile.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is building a continuous deployment pipeline for a serverless application that uses AWS Lambda functions. The company wants to reduce the customer impact of an unsuccessful deployment. The company also wants to monitor for issues. Which deploy stage configuration will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use an AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) template to define the serverless application. Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the Lambda functions with the Canary10Percent15Minutes Deployment Preference Type. Use Amazon CloudWatch alarms to monitor the health of the functions.

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation to publish a new stack update, and include Amazon CloudWatch alarms on all resources. Set up an AWS CodePipeline approval action for a developer to verify and approve the AWS CloudFormation change set.

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation to publish a new version on every stack update, and include Amazon CloudWatch alarms on all resources. Use the RoutingConfig property of the AWS::Lambda::Alias resource to update the traffic routing during the stack update.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CodeBuild to add sample event payloads for testing to the Lambda functions. Publish a new version of the functions, and include Amazon CloudWatch alarms. Update the production alias to point to the new version. Configure rollbacks to occur when an alarm is in the ALARM state.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。用 AWS SAM 模板定义无服务器应用，并通过 CodeDeploy 的 Canary10Percent15Minutes 部署偏好发布 Lambda，可以实现受控的金丝雀部署。

CloudWatch alarms 用于监控函数健康状况并支持部署判断。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。用 AWS SAM 模板定义无服务器应用，并通过 CodeDeploy 的 Canary10Percent15Minutes 部署偏好发布 Lambda，可以实现受控的金丝雀部署。

CloudWatch alarms 用于监控函数健康状况并支持部署判断。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. Defining the serverless application with AWS SAM and using CodeDeploy's Canary10Percent15Minutes deployment preference provides controlled Lambda canary deployments.

CloudWatch alarms monitor function health during the deployment.

questions.content: To run an application, a DevOps engineer launches an Amazon EC2 instance with public IP addresses in a public subnet. A user data script obtains the application artifacts and installs them on the instances upon launch. A change to the security classification of the application now requires the instances to run with no access to the internet. While the instances launch successfully and show as healthy, the application does not seem to be installed. Which of the following should successfully install the application while complying with the new rule?

options.label: A
options.content: Launch the instances in a public subnet with Elastic IP addresses attached. Once the application is installed and running, run a script to disassociate the Elastic IP addresses afterwards.

options.label: B
options.content: Set up a NAT gateway. Deploy the EC2 instances to a private subnet. Update the private subnet's route table to use the NAT gateway as the default route.

options.label: C
options.content: Publish the application artifacts to an Amazon S3 bucket and create a VPC endpoint for S3. Assign an IAM instance profile to the EC2 instances so they can read the application artifacts from the S3 bucket.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a security group for the application instances and allow only outbound traffic to the artifact repository. Remove the security group rule once the install is complete.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。把应用制品发布到 S3，并为 S3 创建 VPC endpoint，EC2 实例即可在初始化时通过实例配置文件读取制品。

讨论指出需求只是初始化时下载包，不需要持续互联网访问，因此 S3 方案更便宜且合适。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。把应用制品发布到 S3，并为 S3 创建 VPC endpoint，EC2 实例即可在初始化时通过实例配置文件读取制品。

讨论指出需求只是初始化时下载包，不需要持续互联网访问，因此 S3 方案更便宜且合适。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. Publishing artifacts to S3 and using an S3 VPC endpoint lets EC2 instances download the artifacts during initialization through an IAM instance profile.

The discussion notes that continuous internet access is unnecessary for a one-time package download, making S3 the cheaper and suitable option.

questions.content: A development team is using AWS CodeCommit to version control application code and AWS CodePipeline to orchestrate software deployments. The team has decided to use a remote main branch as the trigger for the pipeline to integrate code changes. A developer has pushed code changes to the CodeCommit repository, but noticed that the pipeline had no reaction, even after 10 minutes. Which of the following actions should be taken to troubleshoot this issue?

options.label: A
options.content: Check that an Amazon EventBridge rule has been created for the main branch to trigger the pipeline.

options.label: B
options.content: Check that the CodePipeline service role has permission to access the CodeCommit repository.

options.label: C
options.content: Check that the developer's IAM role has permission to push to the CodeCommit repository.

options.label: D
options.content: Check to see if the pipeline failed to start because of CodeCommit errors in Amazon CloudWatch Logs.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。源数据标记的正确项是检查是否为 main 分支创建 EventBridge 规则来触发流水线。

讨论同时提到 CodePipeline 与 CodeCommit 可直接集成，因此排查时应结合该触发机制和服务角色权限一起判断。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。源数据标记的正确项是检查是否为 main 分支创建 EventBridge 规则来触发流水线。

讨论同时提到 CodePipeline 与 CodeCommit 可直接集成，因此排查时应结合该触发机制和服务角色权限一起判断。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. The source marks checking for an EventBridge rule on the main branch to trigger the pipeline as the correct option.

The discussion also notes that CodePipeline can integrate directly with CodeCommit, so this trigger configuration should be considered alongside service-role permissions when troubleshooting.

questions.content: A company's developers use Amazon EC2 instances as remote workstations. The company is concerned that users can create or modify EC2 security groups to allow unrestricted inbound access. A DevOps engineer needs to develop a solution to detect when users create unrestricted security group rules. The solution must detect changes to security group rules in near real time, remove unrestricted rules, and send email notifications to the security team. The DevOps engineer has created an AWS Lambda function that checks for security group ID from input, removes rules that grant unrestricted access, and sends notifications through Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS). What should the DevOps engineer do next to meet the requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the Lambda function to be invoked by the SNS topic. Create an AWS CloudTrail subscription for the SNS topic. Configure a subscription filter for security group modification events.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to invoke the Lambda function. Define a schedule pattern that runs the Lambda function every hour.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge event rule that has the default event bus as the source. Define the rule's event pattern to match EC2 security group creation and modification events. Configure the rule to invoke the Lambda function.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge custom event bus that subscribes to events from all AWS services. Configure the Lambda function to be invoked by the custom event bus.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。创建 EventBridge 规则，匹配 EC2 安全组创建和修改事件，并调用 Lambda，能够在相关事件发生时立即处理。

讨论指出 Lambda 应由 EventBridge 调用，且此需求是事件驱动而不是定时扫描。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。创建 EventBridge 规则，匹配 EC2 安全组创建和修改事件，并调用 Lambda，能够在相关事件发生时立即处理。

讨论指出 Lambda 应由 EventBridge 调用，且此需求是事件驱动而不是定时扫描。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. An EventBridge rule that matches EC2 security group creation and modification events can invoke Lambda immediately when relevant changes occur.

The discussion notes that Lambda should be invoked by EventBridge and that this requirement is event-driven, not scheduled polling.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is creating an AWS CloudFormation template to deploy a web service. The web service will run on Amazon EC2 instances in a private subnet behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The DevOps engineer must ensure that the service can accept requests from clients that have IPv6 addresses. What should the DevOps engineer do with the CloudFormation template so that IPv6 clients can access the web service?

options.label: A
options.content: Add an IPv6 CIDR block to the VPC and the private subnet for the EC2 instances. Create route table entries for the IPv6 network, use EC2 instance types that support IPv6, and assign IPv6 addresses to each EC2 instance.

options.label: B
options.content: Assign each EC2 instance an IPv6 Elastic IP address. Create a target group, and add the EC2 instances as targets. Create a listener on port 443 of the ALB, and associate the target group with the ALB.

options.label: C
options.content: Replace the ALB with a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Add an IPv6 CIDR block to the VPC and subnets for the NLB, and assign the NLB an IPv6 Elastic IP address.

options.label: D
options.content: Add an IPv6 CIDR block to the VPC and subnets for the ALB. Create a listener on port 443. and specify the dualstack IP address type on the ALB. Create a target group, and add the EC2 instances as targets. Associate the target group with the ALB.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。要支持 IPv6，需要为 VPC 和 ALB 子网添加 IPv6 CIDR，并将 ALB 设置为 dualstack 地址类型。

同时创建 443 监听器、目标组并注册 EC2 实例，使 ALB 可同时通过 IPv4 和 IPv6 服务客户端。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。要支持 IPv6，需要为 VPC 和 ALB 子网添加 IPv6 CIDR，并将 ALB 设置为 dualstack 地址类型。

同时创建 443 监听器、目标组并注册 EC2 实例，使 ALB 可同时通过 IPv4 和 IPv6 服务客户端。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: D. To support IPv6, add IPv6 CIDR blocks to the VPC and ALB subnets and configure the ALB with the dualstack IP address type.

Create the port 443 listener, target group, and EC2 targets so clients can reach the ALB over both IPv4 and IPv6.

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations and AWS Control Tower to manage all the company's AWS accounts. The company uses the Enterprise Support plan. A DevOps engineer is using Account Factory for Terraform (AFT) to provision new accounts. When new accounts are provisioned, the DevOps engineer notices that the support plan for the new accounts is set to the Basic Support plan. The DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to provision the new accounts with the Enterprise Support plan. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use an AWS Config conformance pack to deploy the account-part-of-organizations AWS Config rule and to automatically remediate any noncompliant accounts.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to create a ticket for AWS Support to add the account to the Enterprise Support plan. Grant the Lambda function the support:ResolveCase permission.

options.label: C
options.content: Add an additional value to the control_tower_parameters input to set the AWSEnterpriseSupport parameter as the organization's management account number.

options.label: D
options.content: Set the aft_feature_enterprise_support feature flag to True in the AFT deployment input configuration. Redeploy AFT and apply the changes.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。将 AFT 输入配置中的 aft_feature_enterprise_support feature flag 设为 True，然后重新部署 AFT 并应用更改，即可启用企业支持相关功能。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。将 AFT 输入配置中的 aft_feature_enterprise_support feature flag 设为 True，然后重新部署 AFT 并应用更改，即可启用企业支持相关功能。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. Set the aft_feature_enterprise_support feature flag to True in the AFT deployment input configuration, then redeploy AFT and apply the change.

questions.content: A company's DevOps engineer uses AWS Systems Manager to perform maintenance tasks during maintenance windows. The company has a few Amazon EC2 instances that require a restart after notifications from AWS Health. The DevOps engineer needs to implement an automated solution to remediate these notifications. The DevOps engineer creates an Amazon EventBridge rule. How should the DevOps engineer configure the EventBridge rule to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure an event source of AWS Health, a service of EC2. and an event type that indicates instance maintenance. Target a Systems Manager document to restart the EC2 instance.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure an event source of Systems Manager and an event type that indicates a maintenance window. Target a Systems Manager document to restart the EC2 instance.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an event source of AWS Health, a service of EC2, and an event type that indicates instance maintenance. Target a newly created AWS Lambda function that registers an automation task to restart the EC2 instance during a maintenance window.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an event source of EC2 and an event type that indicates instance maintenance. Target a newly created AWS Lambda function that registers an automation task to restart the EC2 instance during a maintenance window.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。使用 AWS Health 中与 EC2 实例维护相关的事件作为事件源，并以 Systems Manager document 为目标重启实例，符合讨论中给出的正确方向。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。使用 AWS Health 中与 EC2 实例维护相关的事件作为事件源，并以 Systems Manager document 为目标重启实例，符合讨论中给出的正确方向。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. Use AWS Health events for EC2 instance maintenance as the event source and target a Systems Manager document to restart the instance, matching the correct direction noted in the discussion.

questions.content: A company has containerized all of its in-house quality control applications. The company is running Jenkins on Amazon EC2 instances, which require patching and upgrading. The compliance officer has requested a DevOps engineer begin encrypting build artifacts since they contain company intellectual property. What should the DevOps engineer do to accomplish this in the MOST maintainable manner?

options.label: A
options.content: Automate patching and upgrading using AWS Systems Manager on EC2 instances and encrypt Amazon EBS volumes by default.

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy Jenkins to an Amazon ECS cluster and copy build artifacts to an Amazon S3 bucket with default encryption enabled.

options.label: C
options.content: Leverage AWS CodePipeline with a build action and encrypt the artifacts using AWS Secrets Manager.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CodeBuild with artifact encryption to replace the Jenkins instance running on EC2 instances.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。用托管的 AWS CodeBuild 替代运行在 EC2 上的 Jenkins，可以减少补丁和升级维护工作。

讨论还指出 CodeBuild 结合 S3 支持制品自动加密，因此是最容易维护的方案。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。用托管的 AWS CodeBuild 替代运行在 EC2 上的 Jenkins，可以减少补丁和升级维护工作。

讨论还指出 CodeBuild 结合 S3 支持制品自动加密，因此是最容易维护的方案。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: D. Replacing Jenkins on EC2 with managed AWS CodeBuild reduces patching and upgrade maintenance.

The discussion also notes that CodeBuild, using S3, provides automatic artifact encryption, making it the easiest option to maintain.

questions.content: An IT team has built an AWS CloudFormation template so others in the company can quickly and reliably deploy and terminate an application. The template creates an Amazon EC2 instance with a user data script to install the application and an Amazon S3 bucket that the application uses to serve static webpages while it is running. All resources should be removed when the CloudFormation stack is deleted. However, the team observes that CloudFormation reports an error during stack deletion, and the S3 bucket created by the stack is not deleted. How can the team resolve the error in the MOST efficient manner to ensure that all resources are deleted without errors?

options.label: A
options.content: Add a DelelionPolicy attribute to the S3 bucket resource, with the value Delete forcing the bucket to be removed when the stack is deleted.

options.label: B
options.content: Add a custom resource with an AWS Lambda function with the DependsOn attribute specifying the S3 bucket, and an IAM role. Write the Lambda function to delete all objects from the bucket when RequestType is Delete.

options.label: C
options.content: Identify the resource that was not deleted. Manually empty the S3 bucket and then delete it.

options.label: D
options.content: Replace the EC2 and S3 bucket resources with a single AWS OpsWorks Stacks resource. Define a custom recipe for the stack to create and delete the EC2 instance and the S3 bucket.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B。CloudFormation 删除 S3 bucket 前必须先删除桶内对象；自定义资源 Lambda 可以在删除请求时清空桶。

为该 Lambda 配置依赖 S3 bucket 和必要 IAM role，可让堆栈删除流程自动完成清理。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B。CloudFormation 删除 S3 bucket 前必须先删除桶内对象；自定义资源 Lambda 可以在删除请求时清空桶。

为该 Lambda 配置依赖 S3 bucket 和必要 IAM role，可让堆栈删除流程自动完成清理。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: B. CloudFormation cannot delete an S3 bucket until all objects are removed, so a custom-resource Lambda can empty the bucket when the stack receives a Delete request.

Using DependsOn with the bucket and an IAM role lets the stack deletion process perform that cleanup automatically.

questions.content: A company has an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that is configured with an Amazon S3 bucket in the eu-west-1 Region. The pipeline deploys an AWS Lambda application to the same Region. The pipeline consists of an AWS CodeBuild project build action and an AWS CloudFormation deploy action. The CodeBuild project uses the aws cloudformation package AWS CLI command to build an artifact that contains the Lambda function code's .zip file and the CloudFormation template. The CloudFormation deploy action references the CloudFormation template from the output artifact of the CodeBuild project's build action. The company wants to also deploy the Lambda application to the us-east-1 Region by using the pipeline in eu-west-1. A DevOps engineer has already updated the CodeBuild project to use the aws cloudformation package command to produce an additional output artifact for us-east-1. Which combination of additional steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Modify the CloudFormation template to include a parameter for the Lambda function code's zip file location. Create a new CloudFormation deploy action for us-east-1 in the pipeline. Configure the new deploy action to pass in the us-east-1 artifact location as a parameter override.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new CloudFormation deploy action for us-east-1 in the pipeline. Configure the new deploy action to use the CloudFormation template from the us-east-1 output artifact.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an S3 bucket in us-east-1. Configure the S3 bucket policy to allow CodePipeline to have read and write access.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an S3 bucket in us-east-1. Configure S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) from the S3 bucket in eu-west-1 to the S3 bucket in us-east-1.

options.label: E
options.content: Modify the pipeline to include the S3 bucket for us-east-1 as an artifact store. Create a new CloudFormation deploy action for us-east-1 in the pipeline. Configure the new deploy action to use the CloudFormation template from the us-east-1 output artifact.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C、E。跨区域 CodePipeline 操作需要在目标区域创建 artifact store，因此要在 us-east-1 创建 S3 桶并允许 CodePipeline 读写。

然后修改流水线，将该区域的 S3 桶作为 artifact store，并新增 us-east-1 的 CloudFormation deploy action。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C、E。跨区域 CodePipeline 操作需要在目标区域创建 artifact store，因此要在 us-east-1 创建 S3 桶并允许 CodePipeline 读写。

然后修改流水线，将该区域的 S3 桶作为 artifact store，并新增 us-east-1 的 CloudFormation deploy action。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: C and E. Cross-Region CodePipeline actions need an artifact store in the target Region, so create an S3 bucket in us-east-1 and allow CodePipeline read/write access.

Then update the pipeline to use that bucket as the us-east-1 artifact store and add a CloudFormation deploy action for that Region.

questions.content: A company runs an application on one Amazon EC2 instance. Application metadata is stored in Amazon S3 and must be retrieved if the instance is restarted. The instance must restart or relaunch automatically if the instance becomes unresponsive. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for the StatusCheckFailed metric. Use the recover action to stop and start the instance. Use an S3 event notification to push the metadata to the instance when the instance is back up and running.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure AWS OpsWorks, and use the auto healing feature to stop and start the instance. Use a lifecycle event in OpsWorks to pull the metadata from Amazon S3 and update it on the instance.

options.label: C
options.content: Use EC2 Auto Recovery to automatically stop and start the instance in case of a failure. Use an S3 event notification to push the metadata to the instance when the instance is back up and running.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation to create an EC2 instance that includes the UserData property for the EC2 resource. Add a command in UserData to retrieve the application metadata from Amazon S3.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B。讨论指出 CloudWatch recover action 和 EC2 Auto Recovery 主要处理系统状态检查失败，而不是所有实例级无响应问题。

AWS OpsWorks 的 auto healing 可进行更复杂的健康处理，并通过生命周期事件从 S3 拉取元数据更新实例。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B。讨论指出 CloudWatch recover action 和 EC2 Auto Recovery 主要处理系统状态检查失败，而不是所有实例级无响应问题。

AWS OpsWorks 的 auto healing 可进行更复杂的健康处理，并通过生命周期事件从 S3 拉取元数据更新实例。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: B. The discussion says CloudWatch recovery and EC2 Auto Recovery mainly address system status check failures, not every instance-level unresponsiveness case.

AWS OpsWorks auto healing can provide broader health handling, and a lifecycle event can pull metadata from S3 to update the instance.

questions.content: A company has multiple AWS accounts. The company uses AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) that is integrated with AWS Toolkit for Microsoft Azure DevOps. The attributes for access control feature is enabled in IAM Identity Center. The attribute mapping list contains two entries. The department key is mapped to ${path:enterprise.department}. The costCenter key is mapped to ${path:enterprise.costCenter}. All existing Amazon EC2 instances have a department tag that corresponds to three company departments (d1, d2, d3). A DevOps engineer must create policies based on the matching attributes. The policies must minimize administrative effort and must grant each Azure AD user access to only the EC2 instances that are tagged with the user's respective department name. Which condition key should the DevOps engineer include in the custom permissions policies to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
B
C
D

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。讨论说明应检查 EC2 的 department 标签是否与用户的 principal tag 中 department 相同，相同才允许访问。

其他方案的问题是条件语法或标签范围不正确，或会导致不同部门用户也能访问所有 EC2。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。讨论说明应检查 EC2 的 department 标签是否与用户的 principal tag 中 department 相同，相同才允许访问。

其他方案的问题是条件语法或标签范围不正确，或会导致不同部门用户也能访问所有 EC2。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. The discussion explains that access should be allowed only when the EC2 instance's department tag matches the user's department principal tag.

The other approaches have incorrect condition syntax or tag scope, or would allow users from any department to access every EC2 instance.

questions.content: A company hosts a security auditing application in an AWS account. The auditing application uses an IAM role to access other AWS accounts. All the accounts are in the same organization in AWS Organizations. A recent security audit revealed that users in the audited AWS accounts could modify or delete the auditing application's IAM role. The company needs to prevent any modification to the auditing application's IAM role by any entity other than a trusted administrator IAM role. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an SCP that includes a Deny statement for changes to the auditing application's IAM role. Include a condition that allows the trusted administrator IAM role to make changes. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an SCP that includes an Allow statement for changes to the auditing application's IAM role by the trusted administrator IAM role. Include a Deny statement for changes by all other IAM principals. Attach the SCP to the IAM service in each AWS account where the auditing application has an IAM role.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM permissions boundary that includes a Deny statement for changes to the auditing application's IAM role. Include a condition that allows the trusted administrator IAM role to make changes. Attach the permissions boundary to the audited AWS accounts.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an IAM permissions boundary that includes a Deny statement for changes to the auditing application's IAM role. Include a condition that allows the trusted administrator IAM role to make changes. Attach the permissions boundary to the auditing application's IAM role in the AWS accounts.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。SCP 可在组织级别限制对审计应用 IAM role 的修改，并通过条件允许受信任管理员角色例外操作。

讨论指出权限边界应用于 IAM 实体而不是账户整体，因此不如把 SCP 附加到组织根来集中限制有效。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。SCP 可在组织级别限制对审计应用 IAM role 的修改，并通过条件允许受信任管理员角色例外操作。

讨论指出权限边界应用于 IAM 实体而不是账户整体，因此不如把 SCP 附加到组织根来集中限制有效。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. An SCP can restrict changes to the auditing application's IAM role at the organization level while allowing an exception for the trusted administrator role.

The discussion notes that permissions boundaries apply to IAM entities, not the whole account, so attaching an SCP to the organization root is more effective here.

questions.content: A company has an on-premises application that is written in Go. A DevOps engineer must move the application to AWS. The company's development team wants to enable blue/green deployments and perform A/B testing. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy the application on an Amazon EC2 instance, and create an AMI of the instance. Use the AMI to create an automatic scaling launch configuration that is used in an Auto Scaling group. Use Elastic Load Balancing to distribute traffic. When changes are made to the application, a new AMI will be created, which will initiate an EC2 instance refresh.

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon Lightsail to deploy the application. Store the application in a zipped format in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use this zipped version to deploy new versions of the application to Lightsail. Use Lightsail deployment options to manage the deployment.

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS CodeArtifact to store the application code. Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the application to a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. Use Elastic Load Balancing to distribute the traffic to the EC2 instances. When making changes to the application, upload a new version to CodeArtifact and create a new CodeDeploy deployment.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk to host the application. Store a zipped version of the application in Amazon S3. Use that location to deploy new versions of the application. Use Elastic Beanstalk to manage the deployment options.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。Elastic Beanstalk 可托管应用，并从 S3 中保存的 zip 版本部署新版本，同时管理部署选项。

讨论补充，蓝绿部署通常需要两个环境并通过 DNS 切换流量，以便两个版本可同时运行。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。Elastic Beanstalk 可托管应用，并从 S3 中保存的 zip 版本部署新版本，同时管理部署选项。

讨论补充，蓝绿部署通常需要两个环境并通过 DNS 切换流量，以便两个版本可同时运行。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: D. Elastic Beanstalk can host the application, deploy new zipped application versions stored in S3, and manage deployment options.

The discussion adds that blue/green deployment generally uses two environments and DNS swapping so both versions can run at the same time.

questions.content: A developer is maintaining a fleet of 50 Amazon EC2 Linux servers. The servers are part of an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group, and also use Elastic Load Balancing for load balancing. Occasionally, some application servers are being terminated after failing ELB HTTP health checks. The developer would like to perform a root cause analysis on the issue, but before being able to access application logs, the server is terminated. How can log collection be automated?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to put instances in a Pending:Wait state. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for EC2 Instance Terminate Successful and trigger an AWS Lambda function that invokes an SSM Run Command script to collect logs, push them to Amazon S3, and complete the lifecycle action once logs are collected.

options.label: B
options.content: Use Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to put instances in a Terminating:Wait state. Create an AWS Config rule for EC2 Instance- terminate Lifecycle Action and trigger a step function that invokes a script to collect logs, push them to Amazon S3, and complete the lifecycle action once logs are collected.

options.label: C
options.content: Use Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to put instances in a Terminating:Wait state. Create an Amazon CloudWatch subscription filter for EC2 Instance Terminate Successful and trigger a CloudWatch agent that invokes a script to collect logs, push them to Amazon S3, and complete the lifecycle action once logs are collected.

options.label: D
options.content: Use Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to put instances in a Terminating:Wait state. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for EC2 Instance-terminate Lifecycle Action and trigger an AWS Lambda function that invokes an SSM Run Command script to collect logs, push them to Amazon S3, and complete the lifecycle action once logs are collected.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks 可把实例置于 Terminating:Wait，从而在终止前保留时间收集日志。

EventBridge 捕获终止生命周期事件后触发 Lambda，Lambda 调用 SSM Run Command 收集日志并上传 S3，完成后再结束 lifecycle action。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks 可把实例置于 Terminating:Wait，从而在终止前保留时间收集日志。

EventBridge 捕获终止生命周期事件后触发 Lambda，Lambda 调用 SSM Run Command 收集日志并上传 S3，完成后再结束 lifecycle action。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: D. Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks can place instances in Terminating:Wait, giving time to collect logs before termination.

An EventBridge rule can trigger Lambda for the terminate lifecycle action; Lambda invokes SSM Run Command to collect logs, upload them to S3, and then complete the lifecycle action.

questions.content: A company has an organization in AWS Organizations. The organization includes workload accounts that contain enterprise applications. The company centrally manages users from an operations account. No users can be created in the workload accounts. The company recently added an operations team and must provide the operations team members with administrator access to each workload account. Which combination of actions will provide this access? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a SysAdmin role in the operations account. Attach the AdministratorAccess policy to the role. Modify the trust relationship to allow the sts:AssumeRole action from the workload accounts.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a SysAdmin role in each workload account. Attach the AdministratorAccess policy to the role. Modify the trust relationship to allow the sts:AssumeRole action from the operations account.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon Cognito identity pool in the operations account. Attach the SysAdmin role as an authenticated role.

options.label: D
options.content: In the operations account, create an IAM user for each operations team member.

options.label: E
options.content: In the operations account, create an IAM user group that is named SysAdmins. Add an IAM policy that allows the sts:AssumeRole action for the SysAdmin role in each workload account. Add all operations team members to the group.

options.label: F
options.content: Create an Amazon Cognito user pool in the operations account. Create an Amazon Cognito user for each operations team member.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B、D、E。在每个 workload account 中创建 SysAdmin role，附加所需管理权限，并信任 operations account 中的主体执行 sts:AssumeRole。

在 operations account 中为团队成员创建 IAM 用户和 SysAdmins 组，组策略允许假设各 workload account 的 SysAdmin role。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B、D、E。在每个 workload account 中创建 SysAdmin role，附加所需管理权限，并信任 operations account 中的主体执行 sts:AssumeRole。

在 operations account 中为团队成员创建 IAM 用户和 SysAdmins 组，组策略允许假设各 workload account 的 SysAdmin role。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: B, D, and E. Create a SysAdmin role in each workload account, attach the required administrative permissions, and trust principals from the operations account to call sts:AssumeRole.

In the operations account, create IAM users and a SysAdmins group with a policy that allows assuming the SysAdmin roles in the workload accounts.

questions.content: A company has multiple accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company's SecOps team needs to receive an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) notification if any account in the organization turns off the Block Public Access feature on an Amazon S3 bucket. A DevOps engineer must implement this change without affecting the operation of any AWS accounts. The implementation must ensure that individual member accounts in the organization cannot turn off the notification. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Designate an account to be the delegated Amazon GuardDuty administrator account. Turn on GuardDuty for all accounts across the organization. In the GuardDuty administrator account, create an SNS topic. Subscribe the SecOps team's email address to the SNS topic. In the same account, create an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses an event pattern for GuardDuty findings and a target of the SNS topic.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that creates an SNS topic and subscribes the SecOps team's email address to the SNS topic. In the template, include an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses an event pattern of CloudTrail activity for s3:PutBucketPublicAccessBlock and a target of the SNS topic. Deploy the stack to every account in the organization by using CloudFormation StackSets.

options.label: C
options.content: Turn on AWS Config across the organization. In the delegated administrator account, create an SNS topic. Subscribe the SecOps team's email address to the SNS topic. Deploy a conformance pack that uses the s3-bucket-level-public-access- prohibited AWS Config managed rule in each account and uses an AWS Systems Manager document to publish an event to the SNS topic to notify the SecOps team.

options.label: D
options.content: Turn on Amazon Inspector across the organization. In the Amazon Inspector delegated administrator account, create an SNS topic. Subscribe the SecOps team's email address to the SNS topic. In the same account, create an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses an event pattern for public network exposure of the S3 bucket and publishes an event to the SNS topic to notify the SecOps team.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。组织范围启用 AWS Config 后，可在委派管理员账户中创建 SNS 主题并订阅 SecOps 邮箱。

部署包含 s3-bucket-level-public-access-prohibited 托管规则的 conformance pack，并通过 Systems Manager document 发布 SNS 通知，符合讨论中偏向使用组织级 Config 和自动化的思路。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。组织范围启用 AWS Config 后，可在委派管理员账户中创建 SNS 主题并订阅 SecOps 邮箱。

部署包含 s3-bucket-level-public-access-prohibited 托管规则的 conformance pack，并通过 Systems Manager document 发布 SNS 通知，符合讨论中偏向使用组织级 Config 和自动化的思路。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. Enable AWS Config across the organization, create an SNS topic in the delegated administrator account, and subscribe the SecOps email address.

Deploy a conformance pack with the s3-bucket-level-public-access-prohibited managed rule and use a Systems Manager document to publish SNS notifications, aligning with the discussion's preference for organization-wide Config and automation.

questions.content: A company has migrated its container-based applications to Amazon EKS and want to establish automated email notifications. The notifications sent to each email address are for specific activities related to EKS components. The solution will include Amazon SNS topics and an AWS Lambda function to evaluate incoming log events and publish messages to the correct SNS topic. Which logging solution will support these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Enable Amazon CloudWatch Logs to log the EKS components. Create a CloudWatch subscription filter for each component with Lambda as the subscription feed destination.

options.label: B
options.content: Enable Amazon CloudWatch Logs to log the EKS components. Create CloudWatch Logs Insights queries linked to Amazon EventBridge events that invoke Lambda.

options.label: C
options.content: Enable Amazon S3 logging for the EKS components. Configure an Amazon CloudWatch subscription filter for each component with Lambda as the subscription feed destination.

options.label: D
options.content: Enable Amazon S3 logging for the EKS components. Configure S3 PUT Object event notifications with AWS Lambda as the destination.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。EKS 可将控制平面组件日志发送到 CloudWatch Logs。

为每个组件创建 CloudWatch subscription filter，并以 Lambda 作为目标，Lambda 即可处理日志事件并发布到相应 SNS 主题。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。EKS 可将控制平面组件日志发送到 CloudWatch Logs。

为每个组件创建 CloudWatch subscription filter，并以 Lambda 作为目标，Lambda 即可处理日志事件并发布到相应 SNS 主题。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. EKS can send control plane component logs to CloudWatch Logs.

Create a CloudWatch subscription filter for each component with Lambda as the destination, allowing Lambda to process log events and publish notifications to the appropriate SNS topic.

questions.content: A company is implementing an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster to run its workload. The company architecture will run multiple ECS services on the cluster. The architecture includes an Application Load Balancer on the front end and uses multiple target groups to route traffic. A DevOps engineer must collect application and access logs. The DevOps engineer then needs to send the logs to an Amazon S3 bucket for near-real-time analysis. Which combination of steps must the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Download the Amazon CloudWatch Logs container instance from AWS. Configure this instance as a task. Update the application service definitions to include the logging task.

options.label: B
options.content: Install the Amazon CloudWatch Logs agent on the ECS instances. Change the logging driver in the ECS task definition to awslogs.

options.label: C
options.content: Use Amazon EventBridge to schedule an AWS Lambda function that will run every 60 seconds and will run the Amazon CloudWatch Logs create-export-task command. Then point the output to the logging S3 bucket.

options.label: D
options.content: Activate access logging on the ALB. Then point the ALB directly to the logging S3 bucket.

options.label: E
options.content: Activate access logging on the target groups that the ECS services use. Then send the logs directly to the logging S3 bucket.

options.label: F
options.content: Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream that has a destination of the logging S3 bucket. Then create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs subscription filter for Kinesis Data Firehose.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B、D、F。将 ECS task definition 的日志驱动改为 awslogs，可把容器日志送到 CloudWatch Logs；ALB access logging 可直接写入日志 S3 桶。

再创建以该 S3 桶为目标的 Kinesis Data Firehose，并通过 CloudWatch Logs subscription filter 转发日志，可近实时交付到 S3。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B、D、F。将 ECS task definition 的日志驱动改为 awslogs，可把容器日志送到 CloudWatch Logs；ALB access logging 可直接写入日志 S3 桶。

再创建以该 S3 桶为目标的 Kinesis Data Firehose，并通过 CloudWatch Logs subscription filter 转发日志，可近实时交付到 S3。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: B, D, and F. Changing the ECS task definition logging driver to awslogs sends container logs to CloudWatch Logs, and ALB access logging can write directly to the logging S3 bucket.

A Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream with that S3 bucket as the destination, fed by a CloudWatch Logs subscription filter, can deliver logs to S3 in near real time.

questions.content: A company that uses electronic health records is running a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances with an Amazon Linux operating system. As part of patient privacy requirements, the company must ensure continuous compliance for patches for operating system and applications running on the EC2 instances. How can the deployments of the operating system and application patches be automated using a default and custom repository?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager to create a new patch baseline including the custom repository. Run the AWS-RunPatchBaseline document using the run command to verify and install patches.

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS Direct Connect to integrate the corporate repository and deploy the patches using Amazon CloudWatch scheduled events, then use the CloudWatch dashboard to create reports.

options.label: C
options.content: Use yum-config-manager to add the custom repository under /etc/yum.repos.d and run yum-config-manager-enable to activate the repository.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager to create a new patch baseline including the corporate repository. Run the AWS- AmazonLinuxDefaultPatchBaseline document using the run command to verify and install patches.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。Systems Manager patch baseline 用于定义应安装或避免的补丁，包括自定义仓库中的补丁。

随后运行 AWS-RunPatchBaseline document，可验证并安装这些补丁。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。Systems Manager patch baseline 用于定义应安装或避免的补丁，包括自定义仓库中的补丁。

随后运行 AWS-RunPatchBaseline document，可验证并安装这些补丁。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. A Systems Manager patch baseline defines which patches should be installed or avoided, including patches from a custom repository.

Running the AWS-RunPatchBaseline document verifies and installs the patches on the instance.

questions.content: A company is using AWS CodePipeline to automate its release pipeline. AWS CodeDeploy is being used in the pipeline to deploy an application to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) using the blue/green deployment model. The company wants to implement scripts to test the green version of the application before shifting traffic. These scripts will complete in 5 minutes or less. If errors are discovered during these tests, the application must be rolled back. Which strategy will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Add a stage to the CodePipeline pipeline between the source and deploy stages. Use AWS CodeBuild to create a runtime environment and build commands in the buildspec file to invoke test scripts. If errors are found, use the aws deploy stop- deployment command to stop the deployment.

options.label: B
options.content: Add a stage to the CodePipeline pipeline between the source and deploy stages. Use this stage to invoke an AWS Lambda function that will run the test scripts. If errors are found, use the aws deploy stop-deployment command to stop the deployment.

options.label: C
options.content: Add a hooks section to the CodeDeploy AppSpec file. Use the AfterAllowTestTraffic lifecycle event to invoke an AWS Lambda function to run the test scripts. If errors are found, exit the Lambda function with an error to initiate rollback.

options.label: D
options.content: Add a hooks section to the CodeDeploy AppSpec file. Use the AfterAllowTraffic lifecycle event to invoke the test scripts. If errors are found, use the aws deploy stop-deployment CLI command to stop the deployment.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。在 CodeDeploy AppSpec 中添加 hooks，并使用 AfterAllowTestTraffic 生命周期事件调用 Lambda 运行测试脚本。

如果测试发现错误，让 Lambda 以错误退出，CodeDeploy 就会将部署标记失败并触发回滚。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。在 CodeDeploy AppSpec 中添加 hooks，并使用 AfterAllowTestTraffic 生命周期事件调用 Lambda 运行测试脚本。

如果测试发现错误，让 Lambda 以错误退出，CodeDeploy 就会将部署标记失败并触发回滚。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. Add hooks to the CodeDeploy AppSpec file and use the AfterAllowTestTraffic lifecycle event to invoke a Lambda function that runs the test scripts.

If the tests find errors, the Lambda function exits with an error so CodeDeploy fails the deployment and initiates rollback.

questions.content: A company uses AWS Storage Gateway in file gateway mode in front of an Amazon S3 bucket that is used by multiple resources. In the morning when business begins, users do not see the objects processed by a third party the previous evening. When a DevOps engineer looks directly at the S3 bucket, the data is there, but it is missing in Storage Gateway. Which solution ensures that all the updated third-party files are available in the morning?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a nightly Amazon EventBridge event to invoke an AWS Lambda function to run the RefreshCache command for Storage Gateway.

options.label: B
options.content: Instruct the third party to put data into the S3 bucket using AWS Transfer for SFTP.

options.label: C
options.content: Modify Storage Gateway to run in volume gateway mode.

options.label: D
options.content: Use S3 Same-Region Replication to replicate any changes made directly in the S3 bucket to Storage Gateway.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。Storage Gateway 的文件网关缓存不会因为 S3 中被其他服务修改的数据而自动刷新。

用每晚 EventBridge 事件触发 Lambda 调用 Storage Gateway 的 RefreshCache 命令，可确保早上能看到更新后的文件。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。Storage Gateway 的文件网关缓存不会因为 S3 中被其他服务修改的数据而自动刷新。

用每晚 EventBridge 事件触发 Lambda 调用 Storage Gateway 的 RefreshCache 命令，可确保早上能看到更新后的文件。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. Storage Gateway file gateway caches do not automatically refresh when another service modifies data in S3.

A nightly EventBridge event can invoke Lambda to run the Storage Gateway RefreshCache command so updated files are available in the morning.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer needs to back up sensitive Amazon S3 objects that are stored within an S3 bucket with a private bucket policy using S3 cross-Region replication functionality. The objects need to be copied to a target bucket in a different AWS Region and account. Which combination of actions should be performed to enable this replication? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a replication IAM role in the source account

options.label: B
options.content: Create a replication I AM role in the target account.

options.label: C
options.content: Add statements to the source bucket policy allowing the replication IAM role to replicate objects.

options.label: D
options.content: Add statements to the target bucket policy allowing the replication IAM role to replicate objects.

options.label: E
options.content: Create a replication rule in the source bucket to enable the replication.

options.label: F
options.content: Create a replication rule in the target bucket to enable the replication.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A、D、E。S3 跨区域复制需要在源账户创建复制 IAM role，并在源 bucket 中创建 replication rule。

目标 bucket policy 还必须允许该复制角色复制对象，否则源 bucket 的复制配置无法写入目标 bucket。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A、D、E。S3 跨区域复制需要在源账户创建复制 IAM role，并在源 bucket 中创建 replication rule。

目标 bucket policy 还必须允许该复制角色复制对象，否则源 bucket 的复制配置无法写入目标 bucket。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: A, D, and E. S3 cross-Region replication requires a replication IAM role in the source account and a replication rule on the source bucket.

The target bucket policy must also allow that replication role to replicate objects into the destination bucket.

questions.content: A company has multiple member accounts that are part of an organization in AWS Organizations. The security team needs to review every Amazon EC2 security group and their inbound and outbound rules. The security team wants to programmatically retrieve this information from the member accounts using an AWS Lambda function in the management account of the organization. Which combination of access changes will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a trust relationship that allows users in the member accounts to assume the management account IAM role.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a trust relationship that allows users in the management account to assume the IAM roles of the member accounts.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM role in each member account that has access to the AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess managed policy.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an I AM role in each member account to allow the sts:AssumeRole action against the management account IAM role's ARN.

options.label: E
options.content: Create an I AM role in the management account that allows the sts:AssumeRole action against the member account IAM role's ARN.

options.label: F
options.content: Create an IAM role in the management account that has access to the AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess managed policy.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B、C、E。每个 member account 中需要创建附加 AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess 的 IAM role。

该角色的信任关系允许 management account 中的用户或角色假设它；management account 中还需要一个允许对成员账户 role ARN 执行 sts:AssumeRole 的 IAM role。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B、C、E。每个 member account 中需要创建附加 AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess 的 IAM role。

该角色的信任关系允许 management account 中的用户或角色假设它；management account 中还需要一个允许对成员账户 role ARN 执行 sts:AssumeRole 的 IAM role。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: B, C, and E. Each member account needs an IAM role with the AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess managed policy.

The role's trust relationship allows users or roles in the management account to assume it, and the management account also needs an IAM role that permits sts:AssumeRole against the member account role ARNs.

questions.content: A space exploration company receives telemetry data from multiple satellites.
