Small packets of data are received through Amazon API Gateway and are placed directly into an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queue. A custom application is subscribed to the queue and transforms the data into a standard format. Because of inconsistencies in the data that the satellites produce, the application is occasionally unable to transform the data. In these cases, the messages remain in the SQS queue. A DevOps engineer must develop a solution that retains the failed messages and makes them available to scientists for review and future processing. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS Lambda to poll the SQS queue and invoke a Lambda function to check whether the queue messages are valid. If validation fails, send a copy of the data that is not valid to an Amazon S3 bucket so that the scientists can review and correct the data. When the data is corrected, amend the message in the SQS queue by using a replay Lambda function with the corrected data.

options.label: B
options.content: Convert the SQS standard queue to an SQS FIFO queue. Configure AWS Lambda to poll the SQS queue every 10 minutes by using an Amazon EventBridge schedule. Invoke the Lambda function to identify any messages with a SentTimestamp value that is older than 5 minutes, push the data to the same location as the application's output location, and remove the messages from the queue.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an SQS dead-letter queue. Modify the existing queue by including a redrive policy that sets the Maximum Receives setting to 1 and sets the dead-letter queue ARN to the ARN of the newly created queue. Instruct the scientists to use the dead-letter queue to review the data that is not valid. Reprocess this data at a later time.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure API Gateway to send messages to different SQS virtual queues that are named for each of the satellites. Update the application to use a new virtual queue for any data that it cannot transform, and send the message to the new virtual queue. Instruct the scientists to use the virtual queue to review the data that is not valid. Reprocess this data at a later time.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。创建 SQS dead-letter queue，并在现有队列上配置 redrive policy，将 MaximumReceives 设为 1 后把无效消息转入 DLQ。

这样数据科学家可以在 DLQ 中查看无效数据，并在之后重新处理。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。创建 SQS dead-letter queue，并在现有队列上配置 redrive policy，将 MaximumReceives 设为 1 后把无效消息转入 DLQ。

这样数据科学家可以在 DLQ 中查看无效数据，并在之后重新处理。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. Create an SQS dead-letter queue and configure the existing queue with a redrive policy that sets MaximumReceives to 1 and points to the DLQ ARN.

This lets scientists review invalid data in the DLQ and reprocess it later.

questions.content: A company wants to use AWS CloudFormation for infrastructure deployment. The company has strict tagging and resource requirements and wants to limit the deployment to two Regions. Developers will need to deploy multiple versions of the same application. Which solution ensures resources are deployed in accordance with company policy?

options.label: A
options.content: Create AWS Trusted Advisor checks to find and remediate unapproved CloudFormation StackSets.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a Cloud Formation drift detection operation to find and remediate unapproved CloudFormation StackSets.

options.label: C
options.content: Create CloudFormation StackSets with approved CloudFormation templates.

options.label: D
options.content: Create AWS Service Catalog products with approved CloudFormation templates.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。AWS Service Catalog 可集中管理经批准的 CloudFormation 模板，让用户快速部署合规的云资源。

讨论指出它正是用于以治理方式管理基础设施即代码模板的服务。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。AWS Service Catalog 可集中管理经批准的 CloudFormation 模板，让用户快速部署合规的云资源。

讨论指出它正是用于以治理方式管理基础设施即代码模板的服务。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: D. AWS Service Catalog centrally manages approved CloudFormation templates so users can quickly deploy compliant cloud resources.

The discussion notes that this service is designed for governed management of infrastructure-as-code templates.

questions.content: A company requires that its internally facing web application be highly available. The architecture is made up of one Amazon EC2 web server instance and one NAT instance that provides outbound internet access for updates and accessing public data. Which combination of architecture adjustments should the company implement to achieve high availability? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Add the NAT instance to an EC2 Auto Scaling group that spans multiple Availability Zones. Update the route tables.

options.label: B
options.content: Create additional EC2 instances spanning multiple Availability Zones. Add an Application Load Balancer to split the load between them.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an Application Load Balancer in front of the EC2 instance. Configure Amazon CloudWatch alarms to recover the EC2 instance upon host failure.

options.label: D
options.content: Replace the NAT instance with a NAT gateway in each Availability Zone. Update the route tables.

options.label: E
options.content: Replace the NAT instance with a NAT gateway that spans multiple Availability Zones. Update the route tables.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B、D。增加跨多个可用区的 EC2 实例，并用 Application Load Balancer 分摊流量，可提高应用层可用性。

NAT gateway 不跨 AZ，因此需要在每个 AZ 中替换 NAT instance 为 NAT gateway，并更新路由表。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B、D。增加跨多个可用区的 EC2 实例，并用 Application Load Balancer 分摊流量，可提高应用层可用性。

NAT gateway 不跨 AZ，因此需要在每个 AZ 中替换 NAT instance 为 NAT gateway，并更新路由表。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: B and D. Adding EC2 instances across multiple Availability Zones behind an Application Load Balancer improves application availability.

A NAT gateway does not span Availability Zones, so replace the NAT instance with a NAT gateway in each AZ and update the route tables.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is building a multistage pipeline with AWS CodePipeline to build, verify, stage, test, and deploy an application. A manual approval stage is required between the test stage and the deploy stage. The development team uses a custom chat tool with webhook support that requires near-real-time notifications. How should the DevOps engineer configure status updates for pipeline activity and approval requests to post to the chat tool?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs subscription that filters on CodePipeline Pipeline Execution State Change. Publish subscription events to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe the chat webhook URL to the SNS topic, and complete the subscription validation.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that is invoked by AWS CloudTrail events. When a CodePipeline Pipeline Execution State Change event is detected, send the event details to the chat webhook URL.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that filters on CodePipeline Pipeline Execution State Change. Publish the events to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Create an AWS Lambda function that sends event details to the chat webhook URL. Subscribe the function to the SNS topic.

options.label: D
options.content: Modify the pipeline code to send the event details to the chat webhook URL at the end of each stage. Parameterize the URL so that each pipeline can send to a different URL based on the pipeline environment.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。使用 EventBridge 过滤 CodePipeline pipeline execution state change 事件，并发布到 SNS topic。

再用订阅该 SNS topic 的 Lambda 将事件详情发送到聊天 webhook，即可发布流水线状态和审批请求更新。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。使用 EventBridge 过滤 CodePipeline pipeline execution state change 事件，并发布到 SNS topic。

再用订阅该 SNS topic 的 Lambda 将事件详情发送到聊天 webhook，即可发布流水线状态和审批请求更新。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. Use EventBridge to filter CodePipeline pipeline execution state change events and publish them to an SNS topic.

A Lambda function subscribed to the topic can send the event details to the chat webhook for pipeline status and approval updates.

questions.content: A company's application development team uses Linux-based Amazon EC2 instances as bastion hosts. Inbound SSH access to the bastion hosts is restricted to specific IP addresses, as defined in the associated security groups. The company's security team wants to receive a notification if the security group rules are modified to allow SSH access from any IP address. What should a DevOps engineer do to meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule with a source of aws.cloudtrail and the event name AuthorizeSecurityGroupIngress. Define an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as the target.

options.label: B
options.content: Enable Amazon GuardDuty and check the findings for security groups in AWS Security Hub. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule with a custom pattern that matches GuardDuty events with an output of NON_COMPLIANT. Define an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as the target.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Config rule by using the restricted-ssh managed rule to check whether security groups disallow unrestricted incoming SSH traffic. Configure automatic remediation to publish a message to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.

options.label: D
options.content: Enable Amazon Inspector. Include the Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures-1.1 rules package to check the security groups that are associated with the bastion hosts. Configure Amazon Inspector to publish a message to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。源数据标记的正确项是使用 AWS Config 托管规则 restricted-ssh 检查安全组是否禁止不受限制的 SSH 入站流量。

自动补救可发布消息到 SNS topic，用于通知相关人员。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。源数据标记的正确项是使用 AWS Config 托管规则 restricted-ssh 检查安全组是否禁止不受限制的 SSH 入站流量。

自动补救可发布消息到 SNS topic，用于通知相关人员。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. The source marks using the AWS Config managed rule restricted-ssh to check whether security groups disallow unrestricted inbound SSH as the correct option.

Automatic remediation can publish a message to an SNS topic for notification.

questions.content: A DevOps team manages an API running on-premises that serves as a backend for an Amazon API Gateway endpoint. Customers have been complaining about high response latencies, which the development team has verified using the API Gateway latency metrics in Amazon CloudWatch. To identify the cause, the team needs to collect relevant data without introducing additional latency. Which actions should be taken to accomplish this? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Install the CloudWatch agent server side and configure the agent to upload relevant logs to CloudWatch.

options.label: B
options.content: Enable AWS X-Ray tracing in API Gateway, modify the application to capture request segments, and upload those segments to X-Ray during each request.

options.label: C
options.content: Enable AWS X-Ray tracing in API Gateway, modify the application to capture request segments, and use the X-Ray daemon to upload segments to X-Ray.

options.label: D
options.content: Modify the on-premises application to send log information back to API Gateway with each request.

options.label: E
options.content: Modify the on-premises application to calculate and upload statistical data relevant to the API service requests to CloudWatch metrics.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A、C。在服务器端安装并配置 CloudWatch agent，可将相关日志上传到 CloudWatch。

同时在 API Gateway 启用 AWS X-Ray tracing，并修改应用捕获请求 segment，再用 X-Ray daemon 上传 segment，是讨论中提到的标准方案组成部分。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A、C。在服务器端安装并配置 CloudWatch agent，可将相关日志上传到 CloudWatch。

同时在 API Gateway 启用 AWS X-Ray tracing，并修改应用捕获请求 segment，再用 X-Ray daemon 上传 segment，是讨论中提到的标准方案组成部分。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: A and C. Installing and configuring the CloudWatch agent on the server sends relevant logs to CloudWatch.

Enabling AWS X-Ray tracing in API Gateway, modifying the application to capture request segments, and using the X-Ray daemon to upload them are standard parts of the solution noted in the discussion.

questions.content: A company has an application that is using a MySQL-compatible Amazon Aurora Multi-AZ DB cluster as the database. A cross- Region read replica has been created for disaster recovery purposes. A DevOps engineer wants to automate the promotion of the replica so it becomes the primary database instance in the event of a failure. Which solution will accomplish this?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a latency-based Amazon Route 53 CNAME with health checks so it points to both the primary and replica endpoints. Subscribe an Amazon SNS topic to Amazon RDS failure notifications from AWS CloudTrail and use that topic to invoke an AWS Lambda function that will promote the replica instance as the primary.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Aurora custom endpoint to point to the primary database instance. Configure the application to use this endpoint. Configure AWS CloudTrail to run an AWS Lambda function to promote the replica instance and modify the custom endpoint to point to the newly promoted instance.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to modify the application's AWS CloudFormation template to promote the replica, apply the template to update the stack, and point the application to the newly promoted instance. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to invoke this Lambda function after the failure event occurs.

options.label: D
options.content: Store the Aurora endpoint in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Create an Amazon EventBridge event that detects the database failure and runs an AWS Lambda function to promote the replica instance and update the endpoint URL stored in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Code the application to reload the endpoint from Parameter Store if a database connection fails.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。将 Aurora endpoint 存入 Systems Manager Parameter Store，应用在连接失败时重新读取该参数。

EventBridge 检测数据库故障后运行 Lambda，Lambda 提升 replica 并更新 Parameter Store 中的 endpoint URL，从而自动切换应用使用的端点。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。将 Aurora endpoint 存入 Systems Manager Parameter Store，应用在连接失败时重新读取该参数。

EventBridge 检测数据库故障后运行 Lambda，Lambda 提升 replica 并更新 Parameter Store 中的 endpoint URL，从而自动切换应用使用的端点。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: D. Store the Aurora endpoint in Systems Manager Parameter Store and have the application reload it when a database connection fails.

EventBridge can detect the database failure and invoke Lambda to promote the replica and update the endpoint URL in Parameter Store, automating the failover path used by the application.

questions.content: A company hosts its staging website using an Amazon EC2 instance backed with Amazon EBS storage. The company wants to recover quickly with minimal data losses in the event of network connectivity issues or power failures on the EC2 instance. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Add the instance to an EC2 Auto Scaling group with the minimum, maximum, and desired capacity set to 1.

options.label: B
options.content: Add the instance to an EC2 Auto Scaling group with a lifecycle hook to detach the EBS volume when the EC2 instance shuts down or terminates.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for the StatusCheckFailed System metric and select the EC2 action to recover the instance.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for the StatusCheckFailed Instance metric and select the EC2 action to reboot the instance.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。为 EC2 StatusCheckFailed_System 指标创建 CloudWatch alarm，并选择 recover instance 的 EC2 action，可在系统状态检查失败时恢复实例。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。为 EC2 StatusCheckFailed_System 指标创建 CloudWatch alarm，并选择 recover instance 的 EC2 action，可在系统状态检查失败时恢复实例。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. Create a CloudWatch alarm for the EC2 StatusCheckFailed_System metric and select the EC2 recover instance action to recover the instance after a system status check failure.

questions.content: A company wants to use AWS development tools to replace its current bash deployment scripts. The company currently deploys a LAMP application to a group of Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). During the deployments, the company unit tests the committed application, stops and starts services, unregisters and re-registers instances with the load balancer, and updates file permissions. The company wants to maintain the same deployment functionality through the shift to using AWS services. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CodeBuild to test the application. Use bash scripts invoked by AWS CodeDeploy's appspec.yml file to restart services, and deregister and register instances with the ALB. Use the appspec.yml file to update file permissions without a custom script.

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline to move the application from the AWS CodeCommit repository to AWS CodeDeploy. Use CodeDeploy's deployment group to test the application, unregister and re-register instances with the ALand restart services. Use the appspec.yml file to update file permissions without a custom script.

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline to move the application source code from the AWS CodeCommit repository to AWS CodeDeploy. Use CodeDeploy to test the application. Use CodeDeploy's appspec.yml file to restart services and update permissions without a custom script. Use AWS CodeBuild to unregister and re-register instances with the ALB.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline to trigger AWS CodeBuild to test the application. Use bash scripts invoked by AWS CodeDeploy's appspec.yml file to restart services. Unregister and re-register the instances in the AWS CodeDeploy deployment group with the ALB. Update the appspec.yml file to update file permissions without a custom script.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。讨论指出需要 CodePipeline 将流程从 CodeBuild 测试推进到 CodeDeploy 部署。

该方案用 CodeBuild 测试应用，通过 CodeDeploy AppSpec 中的脚本重启服务、处理 ALB 注册，并用 AppSpec 更新文件权限。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。讨论指出需要 CodePipeline 将流程从 CodeBuild 测试推进到 CodeDeploy 部署。

该方案用 CodeBuild 测试应用，通过 CodeDeploy AppSpec 中的脚本重启服务、处理 ALB 注册，并用 AppSpec 更新文件权限。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: D. The discussion notes that CodePipeline is needed to move execution from CodeBuild testing to CodeDeploy deployment.

This option uses CodeBuild to test the application, CodeDeploy AppSpec scripts to restart services and handle ALB registration, and AppSpec configuration to update file permissions.

questions.content: A company runs an application with an Amazon EC2 and on-premises configuration. A DevOps engineer needs to standardize patching across both environments. Company policy dictates that patching only happens during non-business hours. Which combination of actions will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Add the physical machines into AWS Systems Manager using Systems Manager Hybrid Activations.

options.label: B
options.content: Attach an IAM role to the EC2 instances, allowing them to be managed by AWS Systems Manager.

options.label: C
options.content: Create IAM access keys for the on-premises machines to interact with AWS Systems Manager.

options.label: D
options.content: Run an AWS Systems Manager Automation document to patch the systems every hour

options.label: E
options.content: Use Amazon EventBridge scheduled events to schedule a patch window.

options.label: F
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager Maintenance Windows to schedule a patch window.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A、B、F。物理机需要通过 Systems Manager Hybrid Activations 加入 Systems Manager，EC2 实例则需要附加允许被 Systems Manager 管理的 IAM role。

使用 Systems Manager Maintenance Windows 可以把补丁安排在非业务时间执行，符合讨论中给出的排除理由。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A、B、F。物理机需要通过 Systems Manager Hybrid Activations 加入 Systems Manager，EC2 实例则需要附加允许被 Systems Manager 管理的 IAM role。

使用 Systems Manager Maintenance Windows 可以把补丁安排在非业务时间执行，符合讨论中给出的排除理由。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: A, B, and F. Physical machines should be added to Systems Manager through Hybrid Activations, while EC2 instances need an IAM role that allows Systems Manager management.

Systems Manager Maintenance Windows schedule patching during non-business hours, matching the discussion's reasoning.

questions.content: A company has chosen AWS to host a new application. The company needs to implement a multi-account strategy. A DevOps engineer creates a new AWS account and an organization in AWS Organizations. The DevOps engineer also creates the OU structure for the organization and sets up a landing zone by using AWS Control Tower. The DevOps engineer must implement a solution that automatically deploys resources for new accounts that users create through AWS Control Tower Account Factory. When a user creates a new account, the solution must apply AWS CloudFormation templates and SCPs that are customized for the OU or the account to automatically deploy all the resources that are attached to the account. All the OUs are enrolled in AWS Control Tower. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST automated way?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS Service Catalog with AWS Control Tower. Create portfolios and products in AWS Service Catalog. Grant granular permissions to provision these resources. Deploy SCPs by using the AWS CLI and JSON documents.

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy CloudFormation stack sets by using the required templates. Enable automatic deployment. Deploy stack instances to the required accounts. Deploy a CloudFormation stack set to the organization's management account to deploy SCPs.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to detect the CreateManagedAccount event. Configure AWS Service Catalog as the target to deploy resources to any new accounts. Deploy SCPs by using the AWS CLI and JSON documents.

options.label: D
options.content: Deploy the Customizations for AWS Control Tower (CfCT) solution. Use an AWS CodeCommit repository as the source. In the repository, create a custom package that includes the CloudFormation templates and the SCP JSON documents.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。Customizations for AWS Control Tower (CfCT) 正是用于在 Control Tower 环境中自动部署账户定制内容。

把 CloudFormation 模板和 SCP JSON 文档放入 CodeCommit 源仓库中的自定义包，可在新账户通过 Account Factory 创建时自动应用资源和 SCP。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。Customizations for AWS Control Tower (CfCT) 正是用于在 Control Tower 环境中自动部署账户定制内容。

把 CloudFormation 模板和 SCP JSON 文档放入 CodeCommit 源仓库中的自定义包，可在新账户通过 Account Factory 创建时自动应用资源和 SCP。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: D. Customizations for AWS Control Tower is designed to automate account customizations in a Control Tower environment.

Putting CloudFormation templates and SCP JSON documents into a custom package in a CodeCommit source repository lets those resources and SCPs be applied automatically when new accounts are created through Account Factory.

questions.content: An online retail company based in the United States plans to expand its operations to Europe and Asia in the next six months. Its product currently runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer. The instances run in an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. All data is stored in an Amazon Aurora database instance. When the product is deployed in multiple regions, the company wants a single product catalog across all regions, but for compliance purposes, its customer information and purchases must be kept in each region. How should the company meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of application changes?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon Redshift for the product catalog and Amazon DynamoDB tables for the customer information and purchases.

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon DynamoDB global tables for the product catalog and regional tables for the customer information and purchases.

options.label: C
options.content: Use Aurora with read replicas for the product catalog and additional local Aurora instances in each region for the customer information and purchases.

options.label: D
options.content: Use Aurora for the product catalog and Amazon DynamoDB global tables for the customer information and purchases.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。产品目录使用 Aurora 和跨区域 read replicas，可在各区域提供低延迟读取并保持单一产品目录。

客户信息和购买记录使用各区域本地 Aurora 实例，有助于满足客户数据和购买数据留在本区域的要求。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。产品目录使用 Aurora 和跨区域 read replicas，可在各区域提供低延迟读取并保持单一产品目录。

客户信息和购买记录使用各区域本地 Aurora 实例，有助于满足客户数据和购买数据留在本区域的要求。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. Using Aurora read replicas for the product catalog provides low-latency regional reads while keeping a single product catalog.

Using additional local Aurora instances in each Region for customer information and purchases supports the requirement to keep that data in its Region.

questions.content: A company is implementing a well-architected design for its globally accessible API stack. The design needs to ensure both high reliability and fast response times for users located in North America and Europe. The API stack contains the following three tiers: Amazon API Gateway - AWS Lambda - Amazon DynamoDB - Which solution will meet the requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure Amazon Route 53 to point to API Gateway APIs in North America and Europe using health checks. Configure the APIs to forward requests to a Lambda function in that Region. Configure the Lambda functions to retrieve and update the data in a DynamoDB table in the same Region as the Lambda function.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure Amazon Route 53 to point to API Gateway APIs in North America and Europe using latency-based routing and health checks. Configure the APIs to forward requests to a Lambda function in that Region. Configure the Lambda functions to retrieve and update the data in a DynamoDB global table.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure Amazon Route 53 to point to API Gateway in North America, create a disaster recovery API in Europe, and configure both APIs to forward requests to the Lambda functions in that Region. Retrieve the data from a DynamoDB global table. Deploy a Lambda function to check the North America API health every 5 minutes. In the event of a failure, update Route 53 to point to the disaster recovery API.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure Amazon Route 53 to point to API Gateway API in North America using latency-based routing. Configure the API to forward requests to the Lambda function in the Region nearest to the user. Configure the Lambda function to retrieve and update the data in a DynamoDB table.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B。Route 53 latency-based routing 和 health checks 可把北美和欧洲用户引导到更近且健康的 API Gateway API。

各区域 API 转发到本区域 Lambda，Lambda 读写 DynamoDB global table，以兼顾快速响应和高可靠性。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B。Route 53 latency-based routing 和 health checks 可把北美和欧洲用户引导到更近且健康的 API Gateway API。

各区域 API 转发到本区域 Lambda，Lambda 读写 DynamoDB global table，以兼顾快速响应和高可靠性。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: B. Route 53 latency-based routing and health checks direct North American and European users to the closest healthy API Gateway API.

Each regional API forwards to a Lambda function in that Region, and the functions read and update a DynamoDB global table to support fast responses and high reliability.

questions.content: A rapidly growing company wants to scale for developer demand for AWS development environments. Development environments are created manually in the AWS Management Console. The networking team uses AWS CloudFormation to manage the networking infrastructure, exporting stack output values for the Amazon VPC and all subnets. The development environments have common standards, such as Application Load Balancers, Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling groups, security groups, and Amazon DynamoDB tables. To keep up with demand, the DevOps engineer wants to automate the creation of development environments. Because the infrastructure required to support the application is expected to grow, there must be a way to easily update the deployed infrastructure. CloudFormation will be used to create a template for the development environments. Which approach will meet these requirements and quickly provide consistent AWS environments for developers?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Fn::ImportValue intrinsic functions in the Resources section of the template to retrieve Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) and subnet values. Use CloudFormation StackSets for the development environments, using the Count input parameter to indicate the number of environments needed. Use the UpdateStackSet command to update existing development environments.

options.label: B
options.content: Use nested stacks to define common infrastructure components. To access the exported values, use TemplateURL to reference the networking team's template. To retrieve Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) and subnet values, use Fn::ImportValue intrinsic functions in the Parameters section of the root template. Use the CreateChangeSet and ExecuteChangeSet commands to update existing development environments.

options.label: C
options.content: Use nested stacks to define common infrastructure components. Use Fn::ImportValue intrinsic functions with the resources of the nested stack to retrieve Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) and subnet values. Use the CreateChangeSet and ExecuteChangeSet commands to update existing development environments.

options.label: D
options.content: Use Fn::ImportValue intrinsic functions in the Parameters section of the root template to retrieve Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) and subnet values. Define the development resources in the order they need to be created in the CloudFormation nested stacks. Use the CreateChangeSet. and ExecuteChangeSet commands to update existing development environments.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。用 nested stacks 定义公共基础设施组件，再通过 Fn::ImportValue 引用嵌套栈输出的 VPC 和 subnet 值。

讨论指出参数中不能使用 intrinsic functions；对已有开发环境更新时使用 CreateChangeSet 和 ExecuteChangeSet 更合适。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。用 nested stacks 定义公共基础设施组件，再通过 Fn::ImportValue 引用嵌套栈输出的 VPC 和 subnet 值。

讨论指出参数中不能使用 intrinsic functions；对已有开发环境更新时使用 CreateChangeSet 和 ExecuteChangeSet 更合适。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. Use nested stacks for common infrastructure components, then retrieve VPC and subnet values from stack outputs with Fn::ImportValue.

The discussion notes that intrinsic functions cannot be used in parameters; use CreateChangeSet and ExecuteChangeSet to update existing development environments.

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage multiple accounts. Information security policies require that all unencrypted Amazon EBS volumes be marked as non-compliant. A DevOps engineer needs to automatically deploy the solution and ensure that this compliance check is always present. Which solution will accomplish this?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that defines an AWS Inspector rule to check whether EBS encryption is enabled. Save the template to an Amazon S3 bucket that has been shared with all accounts within the company. Update the account creation script pointing to the CloudFormation template in Amazon S3.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Config organizational rule to check whether EBS encryption is enabled and deploy the rule using the AWS CLI. Create and apply an SCP to prohibit stopping and deleting AWS Config across the organization.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an SCP in Organizations. Set the policy to prevent the launch of Amazon EC2 instances without encryption on the EBS volumes using a conditional expression. Apply the SCP to all AWS accounts. Use Amazon Athena to analyze the AWS CloudTrail output, looking for events that deny an ec2:RunInstances action.

options.label: D
options.content: Deploy an IAM role to all accounts from a single trusted account. Build a pipeline with AWS CodePipeline with a stage in AWS Lambda to assume the IAM role, and list all EBS volumes in the account. Publish a report to Amazon S3.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B。合规检查适合使用 AWS Config；创建组织级 Config 规则检查 EBS encryption 是否启用，并用 AWS CLI 部署到组织。

再应用 SCP 禁止停止或删除 AWS Config，可帮助保证组织范围内持续合规检测。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B。合规检查适合使用 AWS Config；创建组织级 Config 规则检查 EBS encryption 是否启用，并用 AWS CLI 部署到组织。

再应用 SCP 禁止停止或删除 AWS Config，可帮助保证组织范围内持续合规检测。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: B. Compliance checks fit AWS Config: create an organizational Config rule to check whether EBS encryption is enabled and deploy it with the AWS CLI.

Apply an SCP that prevents stopping or deleting AWS Config to help keep compliance monitoring active across the organization.

questions.content: A company is performing vulnerability scanning for all Amazon EC2 instances across many accounts. The accounts are in an organization in AWS Organizations. Each account's VPCs are attached to a shared transit gateway. The VPCs send traffic to the internet through a central egress VPC. The company has enabled Amazon Inspector in a delegated administrator account and has enabled scanning for all member accounts. A DevOps engineer discovers that some EC2 instances are listed in the "not scanning" tab in Amazon Inspector. Which combination of actions should the DevOps engineer take to resolve this issue? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Verify that AWS Systems Manager Agent is installed and is running on the EC2 instances that Amazon Inspector is not scanning.

options.label: B
options.content: Associate the target EC2 instances with security groups that allow outbound communication on port 443 to the AWS Systems Manager service endpoint.

options.label: C
options.content: Grant inspector:StartAssessmentRun permissions to the IAM role that the DevOps engineer is using.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure EC2 Instance Connect for the EC2 instances that Amazon Inspector is not scanning.

options.label: E
options.content: Associate the target EC2 instances with instance profiles that grant permissions to communicate with AWS Systems Manager.

options.label: F
options.content: Create a managed-instance activation. Use the Activation Code and the Activation ID to register the EC2 instances.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A、B、E。Amazon Inspector 扫描 EC2 需要目标实例上的 Systems Manager Agent 已安装并运行。

实例还需要能通过 443 出站访问 Systems Manager 服务端点，并关联授予与 Systems Manager 通信权限的 instance profile。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A、B、E。Amazon Inspector 扫描 EC2 需要目标实例上的 Systems Manager Agent 已安装并运行。

实例还需要能通过 443 出站访问 Systems Manager 服务端点，并关联授予与 Systems Manager 通信权限的 instance profile。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: A, B, and E. Amazon Inspector EC2 scanning depends on the Systems Manager Agent being installed and running on the target instances.

The instances also need outbound HTTPS access to the Systems Manager service endpoint and instance profiles that grant permission to communicate with Systems Manager.

questions.content: A development team uses AWS CodeCommit for version control for applications. The development team uses AWS CodePipeline, AWS CodeBuild. and AWS CodeDeploy for CI/CD infrastructure. In CodeCommit, the development team recently merged pull requests that did not pass long-running tests in the code base. The development team needed to perform rollbacks to branches in the codebase, resulting in lost time and wasted effort. A DevOps engineer must automate testing of pull requests in CodeCommit to ensure that reviewers more easily see the results of automated tests as part of the pull request review. What should the DevOps engineer do to meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to the pullRequestStatusChanged event. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes a CodePipeline pipeline with a CodeBuild action that runs the tests for the application. Program the Lambda function to post the CodeBuild badge as a comment on the pull request so that developers will see the badge in their code review.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to the pullRequestCreated event. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes a CodePipeline pipeline with a CodeBuild action that runs the tests for the application. Program the Lambda function to post the CodeBuild test results as a comment on the pull request when the test results are complete.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to pullRequestCreated and pullRequestSourceBranchUpdated events. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes a CodePipeline pipeline with a CodeBuild action that runs the tests for the application. Program the Lambda function to post the CodeBuild badge as a comment on the pull request so that developers will see the badge in their code review.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to the pullRequestStatusChanged event. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes a CodePipeline pipeline with a CodeBuild action that runs the tests for the application. Program the Lambda function to post the CodeBuild test results as a comment on the pull request when the test results are complete.

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。EventBridge 规则匹配 pullRequestCreated 和 pullRequestSourceBranchUpdated 事件后，可触发 Lambda 启动包含 CodeBuild 测试 action 的 CodePipeline。

Lambda 再把 CodeBuild badge 作为评论发布到 pull request，让开发者在代码评审中看到测试状态。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。EventBridge 规则匹配 pullRequestCreated 和 pullRequestSourceBranchUpdated 事件后，可触发 Lambda 启动包含 CodeBuild 测试 action 的 CodePipeline。

Lambda 再把 CodeBuild badge 作为评论发布到 pull request，让开发者在代码评审中看到测试状态。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. An EventBridge rule matching pullRequestCreated and pullRequestSourceBranchUpdated can invoke Lambda to start a CodePipeline pipeline with a CodeBuild test action.

The Lambda function can then post the CodeBuild badge as a pull request comment so developers see the test status during review.

questions.content: A company has deployed an application in a production VPC in a single AWS account. The application is popular and is experiencing heavy usage. The company's security team wants to add additional security, such as AWS WAF, to the application deployment. However, the application's product manager is concerned about cost and does not want to approve the change unless the security team can prove that additional security is necessary. The security team believes that some of the application's demand might come from users that have IP addresses that are on a deny list. The security team provides the deny list to a DevOps engineer. If any of the IP addresses on the deny list access the application, the security team wants to receive automated notification in near real time so that the security team can document that the application needs additional security. The DevOps engineer creates a VPC flow log for the production VPC. Which set of additional steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Configure the VPC flow log to capture accepted traffic and to send the data to the log group. Create an Amazon CloudWatch metric filter for IP addresses on the deny list. Create a CloudWatch alarm with the metric filter as input. Set the period to 5 minutes and the datapoints to alarm to 1. Use an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send alarm notices to the security team.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket for log files. Configure the VPC flow log to capture all traffic and to send the data to the S3 bucket. Configure Amazon Athena to return all log files in the S3 bucket for IP addresses on the deny list. Configure Amazon QuickSight to accept data from Athena and to publish the data as a dashboard that the security team can access. Create a threshold alert of 1 for successful access. Configure the alert to automatically notify the security team as frequently as possible when the alert threshold is met.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket for log files. Configure the VPC flow log to capture accepted traffic and to send the data to the S3 bucket. Configure an Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster and domain for the log files. Create an AWS Lambda function to retrieve the logs from the S3 bucket, format the logs, and load the logs into the OpenSearch Service cluster. Schedule the Lambda function to run every 5 minutes. Configure an alert and condition in OpenSearch Service to send alerts to the security team through an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when access from the IP addresses on the deny list is detected.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to hold query results. Configure the VPC flow log to capture all traffic and to send the data to the log group. Deploy an Amazon Athena CloudWatch connector in AWS Lambda. Connect the connector to the log group. Configure Athena to periodically query for all accepted traffic from the IP addresses on the deny list and to store the results in the S3 bucket. Configure an S3 event notification to automatically notify the security team through an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when new objects are added to the S3 bucket.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。该方案使用 VPC Flow Logs 将已接受流量发送到 CloudWatch Logs，再用针对拒绝列表 IP 的指标筛选器和 CloudWatch 告警触发 SNS 通知，满足监控与告警需求且讨论指出成本最低。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。该方案使用 VPC Flow Logs 将已接受流量发送到 CloudWatch Logs，再用针对拒绝列表 IP 的指标筛选器和 CloudWatch 告警触发 SNS 通知，满足监控与告警需求且讨论指出成本最低。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. This uses VPC Flow Logs to send accepted traffic to CloudWatch Logs, then uses a metric filter for deny-listed IP addresses and a CloudWatch alarm to notify the security team through SNS, meeting the requirements at the lowest cost noted in the discussion.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer has automated a web service deployment by using AWS CodePipeline with the following steps: 1. An AWS CodeBuild project compiles the deployment artifact and runs unit tests. 2. An AWS CodeDeploy deployment group deploys the web service to Amazon EC2 instances in the staging environment. 3. A CodeDeploy deployment group deploys the web service to EC2 instances in the production environment. The quality assurance (QA) team requests permission to inspect the build artifact before the deployment to the production environment occurs. The QA team wants to run an internal penetration testing tool to conduct manual tests. The tool will be invoked by a REST API call. Which combination of actions should the DevOps engineer take to fulfill this request? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Insert a manual approval action between the test actions and deployment actions of the pipeline.

options.label: B
options.content: Modify the buildspec.yml file for the compilation stage to require manual approval before completion.

options.label: C
options.content: Update the CodeDeploy deployment groups so that they require manual approval to proceed.

options.label: D
options.content: Update the pipeline to directly call the REST API for the penetration testing tool.

options.label: E
options.content: Update the pipeline to invoke an AWS Lambda function that calls the REST API for the penetration testing tool.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A 和 E。A 在测试和生产部署之间加入手动审批，让 QA 团队可以检查构建产物；E 通过 Lambda 调用渗透测试工具的 REST API，使测试可在流水线中自动执行。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A 和 E。A 在测试和生产部署之间加入手动审批，让 QA 团队可以检查构建产物；E 通过 Lambda 调用渗透测试工具的 REST API，使测试可在流水线中自动执行。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and E. A adds a manual approval between testing and production deployment so QA can inspect the artifact, while E invokes a Lambda function to call the penetration testing tool's REST API and run those tests automatically in the pipeline.

questions.content: A company is hosting a web application in an AWS Region. For disaster recovery purposes, a second region is being used as a standby. Disaster recovery requirements state that session data must be replicated between regions in near-real time and 1% of requests should route to the secondary region to continuously verify system functionality. Additionally, if there is a disruption in service in the main region, traffic should be automatically routed to the secondary region, and the secondary region must be able to scale up to handle all traffic. How should a DevOps engineer meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: In both regions, deploy the application on AWS Elastic Beanstalk and use Amazon DynamoDB global tables for session data. Use an Amazon Route 53 weighted routing policy with health checks to distribute the traffic across the regions.

options.label: B
options.content: In both regions, launch the application in Auto Scaling groups and use DynamoDB for session data. Use a Route 53 failover routing policy with health checks to distribute the traffic across the regions.

options.label: C
options.content: In both regions, deploy the application in AWS Lambda, exposed by Amazon API Gateway, and use Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL with cross-region replication for session data. Deploy the web application with client-side logic to call the API Gateway directly.

options.label: D
options.content: In both regions, launch the application in Auto Scaling groups and use DynamoDB global tables for session data. Enable an Amazon CloudFront weighted distribution across regions. Point the Amazon Route 53 DNS record at the CloudFront distribution.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。该方案在两个区域部署 Elastic Beanstalk，并使用 DynamoDB global tables 保存会话数据；Route 53 加权路由和健康检查可在区域之间分配流量并支持故障处理。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。该方案在两个区域部署 Elastic Beanstalk，并使用 DynamoDB global tables 保存会话数据；Route 53 加权路由和健康检查可在区域之间分配流量并支持故障处理。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Deploying Elastic Beanstalk in both Regions with DynamoDB global tables for session data supports regional operation, and Route 53 weighted routing with health checks distributes traffic across the Regions.

questions.content: A company runs an application on Amazon EC2 instances. The company uses a series of AWS CloudFormation stacks to define the application resources. A developer performs updates by building and testing the application on a laptop and then uploading the build output and CloudFormation stack templates to Amazon S3. The developer's peers review the changes before the developer performs the CloudFormation stack update and installs a new version of the application onto the EC2 instances. The deployment process is prone to errors and is time-consuming when the developer updates each EC2 instance with the new application. The company wants to automate as much of the application deployment process as possible while retaining a final manual approval step before the modification of the application or resources. The company already has moved the source code for the application and the CloudFormation templates to AWS CodeCommit. The company also has created an AWS CodeBuild project to build and test the application. Which combination of steps will meet the company's requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an application group and a deployment group in AWS CodeDeploy. Install the CodeDeploy agent on the EC2 instances.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an application revision and a deployment group in AWS CodeDeploy. Create an environment in CodeDeploy. Register the EC2 instances to the CodeDeploy environment.

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline to invoke the CodeBuild job, run the CloudFormation update, and pause for a manual approval step. After approval, start the AWS CodeDeploy deployment.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline to invoke the CodeBuild job, create CloudFormation change sets for each of the application stacks, and pause for a manual approval step. After approval, run the CloudFormation change sets and start the AWS CodeDeploy deployment.

options.label: E
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline to invoke the CodeBuild job, create CloudFormation change sets for each of the application stacks, and pause for a manual approval step. After approval, start the AWS CodeDeploy deployment.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A 和 D。A 为 EC2 实例部署准备 CodeDeploy 应用和部署组并安装代理；D 用 CodePipeline 编排 CodeBuild、CloudFormation change set、手动审批以及 CodeDeploy 部署。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A 和 D。A 为 EC2 实例部署准备 CodeDeploy 应用和部署组并安装代理；D 用 CodePipeline 编排 CodeBuild、CloudFormation change set、手动审批以及 CodeDeploy 部署。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and D. A sets up CodeDeploy with an application, deployment group, and agent on the EC2 instances. D uses CodePipeline to orchestrate CodeBuild, CloudFormation change sets, manual approval, and the final CodeDeploy deployment.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer manages a web application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The instances run in an EC2 Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. The engineer needs to implement a deployment strategy that: Launches a second fleet of instances with the same capacity as the original fleet. Maintains the original fleet unchanged while the second fleet is launched. Transitions traffic to the second fleet when the second fleet is fully deployed. Terminates the original fleet automatically 1 hour after transition. Which solution will satisfy these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use an AWS CloudFormation template with a retention policy for the ALB set to 1 hour. Update the Amazon Route 53 record to reflect the new ALB.

options.label: B
options.content: Use two AWS Elastic Beanstalk environments to perform a blue/green deployment from the original environment to the new one. Create an application version lifecycle policy to terminate the original environment in 1 hour.

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS CodeDeploy with a deployment group configured with a blue/green deployment configuration Select the option Terminate the original instances in the deployment group with a waiting period of 1 hour.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk with the configuration set to Immutable. Create an .ebextension using the Resources key that sets the deletion policy of the ALB to 1 hour, and deploy the application.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。CodeDeploy 的蓝/绿部署会启动第二组实例，并可将原始实例保持 1 小时后再终止，符合保留原始环境一段时间的要求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。CodeDeploy 的蓝/绿部署会启动第二组实例，并可将原始实例保持 1 小时后再终止，符合保留原始环境一段时间的要求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. A CodeDeploy blue/green deployment can launch the replacement fleet and use the option to terminate the original instances after a 1-hour waiting period, matching the requirement to keep the original fleet temporarily.

questions.content: A video-sharing company stores its videos in Amazon S3. The company has observed a sudden increase in video access requests, but the company does not know which videos are most popular. The company needs to identify the general access pattern for the video files. This pattern includes the number of users who access a certain file on a given day, as well as the number of pull requests for certain files. How can the company meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Activate S3 server access logging. Import the access logs into an Amazon Aurora database. Use an Aurora SQL query to analyze the access patterns.

options.label: B
options.content: Activate S3 server access logging. Use Amazon Athena to create an external table with the log files. Use Athena to create a SQL query to analyze the access patterns.

options.label: C
options.content: Invoke an AWS Lambda function for every S3 object access event. Configure the Lambda function to write the file access information, such as user. S3 bucket, and file key, to an Amazon Aurora database. Use an Aurora SQL query to analyze the access patterns.

options.label: D
options.content: Record an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log message for every S3 object access event. Configure a CloudWatch Logs log stream to write the file access information, such as user, S3 bucket, and file key, to an Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics for SQL application. Perform a sliding window analysis.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。启用 S3 server access logging 后，Athena 可以基于日志文件创建外部表并用 SQL 分析访问模式，讨论中也指出 Athena 适合分析 S3 中的数据。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。启用 S3 server access logging 后，Athena 可以基于日志文件创建外部表并用 SQL 分析访问模式，讨论中也指出 Athena 适合分析 S3 中的数据。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. S3 server access logging captures the access data, and Athena can create an external table over those logs and query access patterns with SQL, which matches the discussion.

questions.content: A development team wants to use AWS CloudFormation stacks to deploy an application. However, the developer IAM role does not have the required permissions to provision the resources that are specified in the AWS CloudFormation template. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution that allows the developers to deploy the stacks. The solution must follow the principle of least privilege. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an IAM policy that allows the developers to provision the required resources. Attach the policy to the developer IAM role.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an IAM policy that allows full access to AWS CloudFormation. Attach the policy to the developer IAM role.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation service role that has the required permissions. Grant the developer IAM role a cloudformation:* action. Use the new service role during stack deployments.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation service role that has the required permissions. Grant the developer IAM role the iam:PassRole permission. Use the new service role during stack deployments.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。使用具有所需权限的 CloudFormation 服务角色，并授予开发者角色 iam:PassRole，使开发者可在堆栈部署时传递该服务角色而不直接拥有全部权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。使用具有所需权限的 CloudFormation 服务角色，并授予开发者角色 iam:PassRole，使开发者可在堆栈部署时传递该服务角色而不直接拥有全部权限。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. A CloudFormation service role holds the required deployment permissions, and granting the developer role iam:PassRole lets developers use that role during stack deployments.

questions.content: A production account has a requirement that any Amazon EC2 instance that has been logged in to manually must be terminated within 24 hours. All applications in the production account are using Auto Scaling groups with the Amazon CloudWatch Logs agent configured. How can this process be automated?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Logs subscription to an AWS Step Functions application. Configure an AWS Lambda function to add a tag to the EC2 instance that produced the login event and mark the instance to be decommissioned. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke a second Lambda function once a day that will terminate all instances with this tag.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that will be invoked by the login event. Send the notification to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic that the operations team is subscribed to, and have them terminate the EC2 instance within 24 hours.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that will be invoked by the login event. Configure the alarm to send to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Use a group of worker instances to process messages from the queue, which then schedules an Amazon EventBridge rule to be invoked.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Logs subscription to an AWS Lambda function. Configure the function to add a tag to the EC2 instance that produced the login event and mark the instance to be decommissioned. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke a daily Lambda function that terminates all instances with this tag.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。该方案用 CloudWatch Logs subscription 触发 Lambda 标记产生登录事件的 EC2 实例，再由每日 EventBridge 规则调用 Lambda 终止带有该标记的实例。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。该方案用 CloudWatch Logs subscription 触发 Lambda 标记产生登录事件的 EC2 实例，再由每日 EventBridge 规则调用 Lambda 终止带有该标记的实例。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. The CloudWatch Logs subscription invokes Lambda to tag the EC2 instance that produced the login event, and a daily EventBridge rule invokes another Lambda process to terminate instances with that tag.

questions.content: A company has enabled all features for its organization in AWS Organizations. The organization contains 10 AWS accounts. The company has turned on AWS CloudTrail in all the accounts. The company expects the number of AWS accounts in the organization to increase to 500 during the next year. The company plans to use multiple OUs for these accounts. The company has enabled AWS Config in each existing AWS account in the organization. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution that enables AWS Config automatically for all future AWS accounts that are created in the organization. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: In the organization's management account, create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to a CreateAccount API call. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function that enables trusted access to AWS Config for the organization.

options.label: B
options.content: In the organization's management account, create an AWS CloudFormation stack set to enable AWS Config. Configure the stack set to deploy automatically when an account is created through Organizations.

options.label: C
options.content: In the organization's management account, create an SCP that allows the appropriate AWS Config API calls to enable AWS Config. Apply the SCP to the root-level OU.

options.label: D
options.content: In the organization's management account, create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to a CreateAccount API call. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to enable AWS Config for the account.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。CloudFormation StackSets 可从组织管理账户向成员账户部署 AWS Config，并配置为在通过 Organizations 创建新账户时自动部署，从而覆盖未来账户。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。CloudFormation StackSets 可从组织管理账户向成员账户部署 AWS Config，并配置为在通过 Organizations 创建新账户时自动部署，从而覆盖未来账户。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. A CloudFormation StackSet from the management account can enable AWS Config across accounts and automatically deploy when new accounts are created through Organizations.

questions.content: A company has many applications. Different teams in the company developed the applications by using multiple languages and frameworks. The applications run on premises and on different servers with different operating systems. Each team has its own release protocol and process. The company wants to reduce the complexity of the release and maintenance of these applications. The company is migrating its technology stacks, including these applications, to AWS. The company wants centralized control of source code, a consistent and automatic delivery pipeline, and as few maintenance tasks as possible on the underlying infrastructure. What should a DevOps engineer do to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create one AWS CodeCommit repository for all applications. Put each application's code in a different branch. Merge the branches, and use AWS CodeBuild to build the applications. Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the applications to one centralized application server.

options.label: B
options.content: Create one AWS CodeCommit repository for each of the applications. Use AWS CodeBuild to build the applications one at a time. Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the applications to one centralized application server.

options.label: C
options.content: Create one AWS CodeCommit repository for each of the applications. Use AWS CodeBuild to build the applications one at a time and to create one AMI for each server. Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to automatically provision and decommission Amazon EC2 fleets by using these AMIs.

options.label: D
options.content: Create one AWS CodeCommit repository for each of the applications. Use AWS CodeBuild to build one Docker image for each application in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the applications to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on infrastructure that AWS Fargate manages.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。每个应用使用独立 CodeCommit 仓库和 CodeBuild 构建镜像，镜像存入 ECR，再通过 CodeDeploy 部署到由 Fargate 管理的 ECS，提供集中代码控制、自动交付和较低维护量。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。每个应用使用独立 CodeCommit 仓库和 CodeBuild 构建镜像，镜像存入 ECR，再通过 CodeDeploy 部署到由 Fargate 管理的 ECS，提供集中代码控制、自动交付和较低维护量。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Separate CodeCommit repositories and CodeBuild image builds provide controlled source and consistent delivery, while ECR, ECS, CodeDeploy, and Fargate reduce operational maintenance.

questions.content: A company's application is currently deployed to a single AWS Region. Recently, the company opened a new office on a different continent. The users in the new office are experiencing high latency. The company's application runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB) and uses Amazon DynamoDB as the database layer. The instances run in an EC2 Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. A DevOps engineer is tasked with minimizing application response times and improving availability for users in both Regions. Which combination of actions should be taken to address the latency issues? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new DynamoDB table in the new Region with cross-Region replication enabled.

options.label: B
options.content: Create new ALB and Auto Scaling group global resources and configure the new ALB to direct traffic to the new Auto Scaling group.

options.label: C
options.content: Create new ALB and Auto Scaling group resources in the new Region and configure the new ALB to direct traffic to the new Auto Scaling group.

options.label: D
options.content: Create Amazon Route 53 records, health checks, and latency-based routing policies to route to the ALB.

options.label: E
options.content: Create Amazon Route 53 aliases, health checks, and failover routing policies to route to the ALB.

options.label: F
options.content: Convert the DynamoDB table to a global table.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C、D 和 F。C 在新区部署 ALB 和 Auto Scaling 组，D 用 Route 53 记录、健康检查和基于延迟的路由将用户导向合适 ALB，F 将 DynamoDB 转为 global table 以支持跨区域低延迟数据访问。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C、D 和 F。C 在新区部署 ALB 和 Auto Scaling 组，D 用 Route 53 记录、健康检查和基于延迟的路由将用户导向合适 ALB，F 将 DynamoDB 转为 global table 以支持跨区域低延迟数据访问。
explanations.en: The correct answers are C, D, and F. C adds the ALB and Auto Scaling group in the new Region, D uses Route 53 health checks and latency-based routing to direct users, and F converts DynamoDB to a global table for low-latency regional data access.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer needs to apply a core set of security controls to an existing set of AWS accounts. The accounts are in an organization in AWS Organizations. Individual teams will administer individual accounts by using the AdministratorAccess AWS managed policy. For all accounts. AWS CloudTrail and AWS Config must be turned on in all available AWS Regions. Individual account administrators must not be able to edit or delete any of the baseline resources. However, individual account administrators must be able to edit or delete their own CloudTrail trails and AWS Config rules. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that defines the standard account resources. Deploy the template to all accounts from the organization's management account by using CloudFormation StackSets. Set the stack policy to deny Update:Delete actions.

options.label: B
options.content: Enable AWS Control Tower. Enroll the existing accounts in AWS Control Tower. Grant the individual account administrators access to CloudTrail and AWS Config.

options.label: C
options.content: Designate an AWS Config management account. Create AWS Config recorders in all accounts by using AWS CloudFormation StackSets. Deploy AWS Config rules to the organization by using the AWS Config management account. Create a CloudTrail organization trail in the organization's management account. Deny modification or deletion of the AWS Config recorders by using an SCP.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that defines the standard account resources. Deploy the template to all accounts from the organization's management account by using Cloud Formation StackSets Create an SCP that prevents updates or deletions to CloudTrail resources or AWS Config resources unless the principal is an administrator of the organization's management account.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。该方案用 StackSets 在所有账户部署 AWS Config recorders，并通过 AWS Config 管理账户部署规则；组织级 CloudTrail 收集日志，SCP 防止账户管理员修改或删除 Config recorders。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。该方案用 StackSets 在所有账户部署 AWS Config recorders，并通过 AWS Config 管理账户部署规则；组织级 CloudTrail 收集日志，SCP 防止账户管理员修改或删除 Config recorders。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. StackSets deploy AWS Config recorders in all accounts, the AWS Config management account deploys rules centrally, an organization CloudTrail collects logs, and an SCP denies modification or deletion of the Config recorders.

questions.content: A company has its AWS accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations. AWS Config is manually configured in each AWS account. The company needs to implement a solution to centrally configure AWS Config for all accounts in the organization The solution also must record resource changes to a central account. Which combination of actions should a DevOps engineer perform to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a delegated administrator account for AWS Config. Enable trusted access for AWS Config in the organization.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure a delegated administrator account for AWS Config. Create a service-linked role for AWS Config in the organization's management account.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation template to create an AWS Config aggregator. Configure a CloudFormation stack set to deploy the template to all accounts in the organization.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Config organization aggregator in the organization's management account. Configure data collection from all AWS accounts in the organization and from all AWS Regions.

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS Config organization aggregator in the delegated administrator account. Configure data collection from all AWS accounts in the organization and from all AWS Regions.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A 和 E。A 为 AWS Config 配置委派管理员并启用组织可信访问；E 在该委派管理员账户中创建组织聚合器，从所有账户和所有区域集中收集配置数据。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A 和 E。A 为 AWS Config 配置委派管理员并启用组织可信访问；E 在该委派管理员账户中创建组织聚合器，从所有账户和所有区域集中收集配置数据。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and E. A configures a delegated administrator and trusted access for AWS Config, and E creates an organization aggregator in that account to collect data from all accounts and Regions.

questions.content: A company wants to migrate its content sharing web application hosted on Amazon EC2 to a serverless architecture. The company currently deploys changes to its application by creating a new Auto Scaling group of EC2 instances and a new Elastic Load Balancer, and then shifting the traffic away using an Amazon Route 53 weighted routing policy. For its new serverless application, the company is planning to use Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda. The company will need to update its deployment processes to work with the new application. It will also need to retain the ability to test new features on a small number of users before rolling the features out to the entire user base. Which deployment strategy will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CDK to deploy API Gateway and Lambda functions. When code needs to be changed, update the AWS CloudFormation stack and deploy the new version of the APIs and Lambda functions. Use a Route 53 failover routing policy for the canary release strategy.

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation to deploy API Gateway and Lambda functions using Lambda function versions. When code needs to be changed, update the CloudFormation stack with the new Lambda code and update the API versions using a canary release strategy. Promote the new version when testing is complete.

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk to deploy API Gateway and Lambda functions. When code needs to be changed, deploy a new version of the API and Lambda functions. Shift traffic gradually using an Elastic Beanstalk blue/green deployment.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS OpsWorks to deploy API Gateway in the service layer and Lambda functions in a custom layer. When code needs to be changed, use OpsWorks to perform a blue/green deployment and shift traffic gradually.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。CloudFormation 部署 API Gateway 和 Lambda 版本后，可在代码变更时更新堆栈，并使用 canary 发布策略让少量用户先测试，完成后再提升新版本。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。CloudFormation 部署 API Gateway 和 Lambda 版本后，可在代码变更时更新堆栈，并使用 canary 发布策略让少量用户先测试，完成后再提升新版本。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. CloudFormation manages API Gateway and Lambda versions, and a canary release lets the new version be tested with a small user group before promotion.

questions.content: A development team uses AWS CodeCommit, AWS CodePipeline, and AWS CodeBuild to develop and deploy an application. Changes to the code are submitted by pull requests. The development team reviews and merges the pull requests, and then the pipeline builds and tests the application. Over time, the number of pull requests has increased. The pipeline is frequently blocked because of failing tests. To prevent this blockage, the development team wants to run the unit and integration tests on each pull request before it is merged. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a CodeBuild project to run the unit and integration tests. Create a CodeCommit approval rule template. Configure the template to require the successful invocation of the CodeBuild project. Attach the approval rule to the project's CodeCommit repository.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to match pullRequestCreated events from CodeCommit Create a CodeBuild project to run the unit and integration tests. Configure the CodeBuild project as a target of the EventBridge rule that includes a custom event payload with the CodeCommit repository and branch information from the event.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to match pullRequestCreated events from CodeCommit. Modify the existing CodePipeline pipeline to not run the deploy steps if the build is started from a pull request. Configure the EventBridge rule to run the pipeline with a custom payload that contains the CodeCommit repository and branch information from the event.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CodeBuild project to run the unit and integration tests. Create a CodeCommit notification rule that matches when a pull request is created or updated. Configure the notification rule to invoke the CodeBuild project.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。EventBridge 规则匹配 CodeCommit 的 pullRequestCreated 事件，并把仓库和分支信息传给 CodeBuild 项目运行单元测试和集成测试，适合在合并前自动验证拉取请求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。EventBridge 规则匹配 CodeCommit 的 pullRequestCreated 事件，并把仓库和分支信息传给 CodeBuild 项目运行单元测试和集成测试，适合在合并前自动验证拉取请求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. An EventBridge rule matches CodeCommit pullRequestCreated events and passes repository and branch details to CodeBuild so unit and integration tests run before merge.

questions.content: A company has an application that runs on a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. The application requires frequent restarts. The application logs contain error messages when a restart is required. The application logs are published to a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. An Amazon CloudWatch alarm notifies an application engineer through an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when the logs contain a large number of restart-related error messages. The application engineer manually restarts the application on the instances after the application engineer receives a notification from the SNS topic. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to automate the application restart on the instances without restarting the instances. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient manner?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook that runs a script to restart the application on the instances. Configure the SNS topic to invoke the runbook.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that restarts the application on the instances. Configure the Lambda function as an event destination of the SNS topic.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook that runs a script to restart the application on the instances. Create an AWS Lambda function to invoke the runbook. Configure the Lambda function as an event destination of the SNS topic.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook that runs a script to restart the application on the instances. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts when the CloudWatch alarm enters ALARM state. Specify the runbook as a target of the rule.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。CloudWatch 告警进入 ALARM 状态时，EventBridge 规则直接触发 Systems Manager Automation runbook 来重启实例上的应用；讨论指出该路径组件更少、定制更少。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。CloudWatch 告警进入 ALARM 状态时，EventBridge 规则直接触发 Systems Manager Automation runbook 来重启实例上的应用；讨论指出该路径组件更少、定制更少。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. When the CloudWatch alarm enters ALARM state, EventBridge can target a Systems Manager Automation runbook that restarts the application, using fewer components and less customization as discussed.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer at a company is supporting an AWS environment in which all users use AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On). The company wants to immediately disable credentials of any new IAM user and wants the security team to receive a notification. Which combination of steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to an IAM CreateUser API call in AWS CloudTrail.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to an IAM GetLoginProfile API call in AWS CloudTrail.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that is a target of the EventBridge rule. Configure the Lambda function to disable any access keys and delete the login profiles that are associated with the IAM user.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that is a target of the EventBridge rule. Configure the Lambda function to delete the login profiles that are associated with the IAM user.

options.label: E
options.content: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic that is a target of the EventBridge rule. Subscribe the security team's group email address to the topic.

options.label: F
options.content: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue that is a target of the Lambda function. Subscribe the security team's group email address to the queue.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、C 和 E。A 用 EventBridge 检测 CloudTrail 中的 IAM CreateUser API 调用；C 触发 Lambda 禁用相关访问密钥并删除登录配置文件；E 通过 SNS 通知安全团队。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、C 和 E。A 用 EventBridge 检测 CloudTrail 中的 IAM CreateUser API 调用；C 触发 Lambda 禁用相关访问密钥并删除登录配置文件；E 通过 SNS 通知安全团队。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, C, and E. A detects IAM CreateUser calls from CloudTrail with EventBridge, C invokes Lambda to disable associated access keys and delete login profiles, and E notifies the security team through SNS.

questions.content: A company wants to set up a continuous delivery pipeline. The company stores application code in a private GitHub repository. The company needs to deploy the application components to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Amazon EC2, and AWS Lambda. The pipeline must support manual approval actions. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline with Amazon ECS. Amazon EC2, and Lambda as deploy providers.

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline with AWS CodeDeploy as the deploy provider.

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline with AWS Elastic Beanstalk as the deploy provider.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CodeDeploy with GitHub integration to deploy the application.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。使用 CodePipeline 并将 CodeDeploy 作为部署提供方，符合讨论中确认的流水线部署方式。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。使用 CodePipeline 并将 CodeDeploy 作为部署提供方，符合讨论中确认的流水线部署方式。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. CodePipeline with CodeDeploy as the deploy provider matches the deployment approach confirmed in the discussion.

questions.content: A company has an application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances that are in an Auto Scaling group. When the application starts up. the application needs to process data from an Amazon S3 bucket before the application can start to serve requests. The size of the data that is stored in the S3 bucket is growing. When the Auto Scaling group adds new instances, the application now takes several minutes to download and process the data before the application can serve requests. The company must reduce the time that elapses before new EC2 instances are ready to serve requests. Which solution is the MOST cost-effective way to reduce the application startup time?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a warm pool for the Auto Scaling group with warmed EC2 instances in the Stopped state. Configure an autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook on the Auto Scaling group. Modify the application to complete the lifecycle hook when the application is ready to serve requests.

options.label: B
options.content: Increase the maximum instance count of the Auto Scaling group. Configure an autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook on the Auto Scaling group. Modify the application to complete the lifecycle hook when the application is ready to serve requests.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure a warm pool for the Auto Scaling group with warmed EC2 instances in the Running state. Configure an autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook on the Auto Scaling group. Modify the application to complete the lifecycle hook when the application is ready to serve requests.

options.label: D
options.content: Increase the maximum instance count of the Auto Scaling group. Configure an autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook on the Auto Scaling group.
