options.content: Create two AWS CodePipeline configurations for test and production environments. Configure the production pipeline to have a manual approval step. Create one CodeCommit repository with a branch for each environment. Set up each CodePipeline to retrieve the source code from the appropriate branch in the repository. Set up the deployment step to deploy the Lambda functions with AWS CloudFormation.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild configuration for test and production environments. Configure the production pipeline to have a manual approval step. Create one CodeCommit repository with a branch for each environment. Push the Lambda function code to an Amazon S3 bucket. Set up the deployment step to deploy the Lambda functions from the S3 bucket.

explanations.en: The correct answer is C. The discussion says separate testing and production pipelines are required and each should use the appropriate CodeCommit branch; option C also adds manual approval for production and deploys Lambda functions with CloudFormation.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer wants to find a solution to migrate an application from on premises to AWS. The application is running on Linux and needs to run on specific versions of Apache Tomcat, HAProxy, and Varnish Cache to function properly. The application's operating system-level parameters require tuning. The solution must include a way to automate the deployment of new application versions. The infrastructure should be scalable and faulty servers should be replaced automatically. Which solution should the DevOps engineer use?

options.label: A
options.content: Upload the application as a Docker image that contains all the necessary software to Amazon ECR. Create an Amazon ECS cluster using an AWS Fargate launch type and an Auto Scaling group. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses Amazon ECR as a source and Amazon ECS as a deployment provider.

options.label: B
options.content: Upload the application code to an AWS CodeCommit repository with a saved configuration file to configure and install the software. Create an AWS Elastic Beanstalk web server tier and a load balanced-type environment that uses the Tomcat solution stack. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses CodeCommit as a source and Elastic Beanstalk as a deployment provider.

options.label: C
options.content: Upload the application code to an AWS CodeCommit repository with a set of .ebextensions files to configure and install the software. Create an AWS Elastic Beanstalk worker tier environment that uses the Tomcat solution stack. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses CodeCommit as a source and Elastic Beanstalk as a deployment provider.

options.label: D
options.content: Upload the application code to an AWS CodeCommit repository with an appspec.yml file to configure and install the necessary software. Create an AWS CodeDeploy deployment group associated with an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses CodeCommit as a source and CodeDeploy as a deployment provider.

questions.explanation: ????? D????? D???? Fargate ???????????? D ?? EC2 Auto Scaling?CodeDeploy AppSpec ???????? CodePipeline ? CodeCommit ? CodeDeploy ?????

explanations.zh: ????? D????? D???? Fargate ???????????? D ?? EC2 Auto Scaling?CodeDeploy AppSpec ???????? CodePipeline ? CodeCommit ? CodeDeploy ?????
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. The discussion selects D and notes that Fargate provides limited OS access; option D uses EC2 Auto Scaling with a CodeDeploy AppSpec to install software and automates release from CodeCommit through CodePipeline and CodeDeploy.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is using AWS CodeDeploy across a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances in an EC2 Auto Scaling group. The associated CodeDeploy deployment group, which is integrated with EC2 Auto Scaling, is configured to perform in-place deployments with CodeDeployDefault.OneAtATime. During an ongoing new deployment, the engineer discovers that, although the overall deployment finished successfully, two out of five instances have the previous application revision deployed. The other three instances have the newest application revision. What is likely causing this issue?

options.label: A
options.content: The two affected instances failed to fetch the new deployment.

options.label: B
options.content: A failed AfterInstall lifecycle event hook caused the CodeDeploy agent to roll back to the previous version on the affected instances.

options.label: C
options.content: The CodeDeploy agent was not installed in two affected instances.

options.label: D
options.content: EC2 Auto Scaling launched two new instances while the new deployment had not yet finished, causing the previous version to be deployed on the affected instances.

questions.explanation: ????? D????? in-place deployment ???????????? CodeDeploy agent?? Auto Scaling ????????????????????????????????

explanations.zh: ????? D????? in-place deployment ???????????? CodeDeploy agent?? Auto Scaling ????????????????????????????????
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. The discussion explains that an in-place deployment updates the agents found when deployment starts; if Auto Scaling launches new instances before deployment finishes, those instances can miss the deployment and receive the previous revision.

questions.content: A security team is concerned that a developer can unintentionally attach an Elastic IP address to an Amazon EC2 instance in production. No developer should be allowed to attach an Elastic IP address to an instance. The security team must be notified if any production server has an Elastic IP address at any time. How can this task be automated?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon Athena to query AWS CloudTrail logs to check for any associate-address attempts. Create an AWS Lambda function to disassociate the Elastic IP address from the instance, and alert the security team.

options.label: B
options.content: Attach an IAM policy to the developers' IAM group to deny associate-address permissions. Create a custom AWS Config rule to check whether an Elastic IP address is associated with any instance tagged as production, and alert the security team.

options.label: C
options.content: Ensure that all IAM groups associated with developers do not have associate-address permissions. Create a scheduled AWS Lambda function to check whether an Elastic IP address is associated with any instance tagged as production, and alert the security team if an instance has an Elastic IP address associated with it.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Config rule to check that all production instances have EC2 IAM roles that include deny associate-address permissions. Verify whether there is an Elastic IP address associated with any instance, and alert the security team if an instance has an Elastic IP address associated with it.

questions.explanation: ????? B???????? IAM ????????? associate-address ??????? Elastic IP?????? AWS Config ???????????? Elastic IP?????????

explanations.zh: ????? B???????? IAM ????????? associate-address ??????? Elastic IP?????? AWS Config ???????????? Elastic IP?????????
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion says an IAM deny on associate-address for the developers' group can block Elastic IP associations; a custom AWS Config rule then checks whether production-tagged instances have an Elastic IP and alerts the security team.

questions.content: A company is using AWS Organizations to create separate AWS accounts for each of its departments. The company needs to automate the following tasks: • Update the Linux AMIs with new patches periodically and generate a golden image • Install a new version of Chef agents in the golden image, if available • Provide the newly generated AMIs to the department's accounts Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST management overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Write a script to launch an Amazon EC2 instance from the previous golden image. Apply the patch updates. Install the new version of the Chef agent, generate a new golden image, and then modify the AMI permissions to share only the new image with the department's accounts.

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon EC2 Image Builder to create an image pipeline that consists of the base Linux AMI and components to install the Chef agent. Use AWS Resource Access Manager to share EC2 Image Builder images with the department's accounts.

options.label: C
options.content: Use an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to update the Linux AMI by using the previous image. Provide the URL for the script that will update the Chef agent. Use AWS Organizations to replace the previous golden image in the department's accounts.

options.label: D
options.content: Use Amazon EC2 Image Builder to create an image pipeline that consists of the base Linux AMI and components to install the Chef agent. Create a parameter in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store to store the new AMI ID that can be referenced by the department's accounts.

questions.explanation: ????? B??????? golden image ??? EC2 Image Builder ??????? B ? Image Builder ?? Chef agent???? AWS Resource Access Manager ????????????

explanations.zh: ????? B??????? golden image ??? EC2 Image Builder ??????? B ? Image Builder ?? Chef agent???? AWS Resource Access Manager ????????????
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion says a golden image should be built with EC2 Image Builder; option B creates an image pipeline that installs the Chef agent and shares the resulting images to department accounts with AWS Resource Access Manager.

questions.content: A company has a mission-critical application on AWS that uses automatic scaling. The company wants the deployment lifecycle to meet the following parameters: • The application must be deployed one instance at a time to ensure the remaining fleet continues to serve traffic. • The application is CPU intensive and must be closely monitored. • The deployment must automatically roll back if the CPU utilization of the deployment instance exceeds 85%. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation to create an AWS Step Functions state machine and Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to move to one instance at a time into a wait state. Use AWS Systems Manager automation to deploy the update to each instance and move it back into the Auto Scaling group using the heartbeat timeout.

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CodeDeploy with Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling Configure an alarm tied to the CPU utilization metric. Use the CodeDeployDefault OneAtAtime configuration as a deployment strategy. Configure automatic rollbacks within the deployment group to roll back the deployment if the alarm thresholds are breached.

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk for load balancing and AWS Auto Scaling. Configure an alarm tied to the CPU utilization metric. Configure rolling deployments with a fixed batch size of one instance. Enable enhanced health to monitor the status of the deployment and roll back based on the alarm previously created.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager to perform a blue/green deployment with Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling. Configure an alarm tied to the CPU utilization metric. Deploy updates one at a time. Configure automatic rollbacks within the Auto Scaling group to roll back the deployment if the alarm thresholds are breached.

questions.explanation: ????? B????????????????? CodeDeploy ???????? B ?? CodeDeployDefault OneAtATime??? CPU ??????????????????????

explanations.zh: ????? B????????????????? CodeDeploy ???????? B ?? CodeDeployDefault OneAtATime??? CPU ??????????????????????
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion says deploying one instance at a time maps to a CodeDeploy deployment configuration; option B uses CodeDeployDefault OneAtATime and configures automatic rollback tied to a CPU alarm.

questions.content: A company has a single developer writing code for an automated deployment pipeline. The developer is storing source code in an Amazon S3 bucket for each project. The company wants to add more developers to the team but is concerned about code conflicts and lost work. The company also wants to build a test environment to deploy newer versions of code for testing and allow developers to automatically deploy to both environments when code is changed in the repository. What is the MOST efficient way to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository for each project, use the main branch for production code, and create a testing branch for code deployed to testing. Use feature branches to develop new features and pull requests to merge code to testing and main branches.

options.label: B
options.content: Create another S3 bucket for each project for testing code, and use an AWS Lambda function to promote code changes between testing and production buckets. Enable versioning on all buckets to prevent code conflicts.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository for each project, and use the main branch for production and test code with different deployment pipelines for each environment. Use feature branches to develop new features.

options.label: D
options.content: Enable versioning and branching on each S3 bucket, use the main branch for production code, and create a testing branch for code deployed to testing. Have developers use each branch for developing in each environment.

questions.explanation: ????? A?????? S3 ?????????????????????????? CodeCommit??? A ??????????? main?testing ? feature branches???? pull request ???

explanations.zh: ????? A?????? S3 ?????????????????????????? CodeCommit??? A ??????????? main?testing ? feature branches???? pull request ???
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion says CodeCommit is needed to avoid conflicts and lost work when adding developers; option A creates a repository per project, uses main and testing branches, feature branches, and pull requests for merging.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer notices that all Amazon EC2 instances running behind an Application Load Balancer in an Auto Scaling group are failing to respond to user requests. The EC2 instances are also failing target group HTTP health checks. Upon inspection, the engineer notices the application process was not running in any EC2 instances. There are a significant number of out of memory messages in the system logs. The engineer needs to improve the resilience of the application to cope with a potential application memory leak. Monitoring and notifications should be enabled to alert when there is an issue. Which combination of actions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Change the Auto Scaling configuration to replace the instances when they fail the load balancer's health checks.

options.label: B
options.content: Change the target group health check HealthCheckIntervalSeconds parameter to reduce the interval between health checks.

options.label: C
options.content: Change the target group health checks from HTTP to TCP to check if the port where the application is listening is reachable.

options.label: D
options.content: Enable the available memory consumption metric within the Amazon CloudWatch dashboard for the entire Auto Scaling group. Create an alarm when the memory utilization is high. Associate an Amazon SNS topic to the alarm to receive notifications when the alarm goes off.

options.label: E
options.content: Use the Amazon CloudWatch agent to collect the memory utilization of the EC2 instances in the Auto Scaling group. Create an alarm when the memory utilization is high and associate an Amazon SNS topic to receive a notification.

explanations.en: The correct answers are A and E. The discussion says failed instances should be replaced and memory metrics require the CloudWatch agent; A makes Auto Scaling replace instances that fail load balancer health checks, and E monitors high memory usage and notifies through SNS.

questions.content: An ecommerce company uses a large number of Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) backed Amazon EC2 instances. To decrease manual work across all the instances, a DevOps engineer is tasked with automating restart actions when EC2 instance retirement events are scheduled. How can this be accomplished?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a scheduled Amazon EventBridge rule to run an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook that checks if any EC2 instances are scheduled for retirement once a week. If the instance is scheduled for retirement, the runbook will hibernate the instance.

options.label: B
options.content: Enable EC2 Auto Recovery on all of the instances. Create an AWS Config rule to limit the recovery to occur during a maintenance window only.

options.label: C
options.content: Reboot all EC2 instances during an approved maintenance window that is outside of standard business hours. Set up Amazon CloudWatch alarms to send a notification in case any instance is failing EC2 instance status checks.

options.label: D
options.content: Set up an AWS Health Amazon EventBridge rule to run AWS Systems Manager Automation runbooks that stop and start the EC2 instance when a retirement scheduled event occurs.

questions.explanation: ????? D????? EC2 instance retirement ????????????????????????????? D ? AWS Health EventBridge ???? Systems Manager Automation runbook ??????

explanations.zh: ????? D????? EC2 instance retirement ????????????????????????????? D ? AWS Health EventBridge ???? Systems Manager Automation runbook ??????
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. The discussion explains that EC2 instance retirement events require stopping and starting the instance to move it to different underlying hardware; option D triggers Systems Manager Automation runbooks from an AWS Health EventBridge rule.

questions.content: A company manages AWS accounts for application teams in AWS Control Tower. Individual application teams are responsible for securing their respective AWS accounts. A DevOps engineer needs to enable Amazon GuardDuty for all AWS accounts in which the application teams have not already enabled GuardDuty. The DevOps engineer is using AWS CloudFormation StackSets from the AWS Control Tower management account. How should the DevOps engineer configure the CloudFormation template to prevent failure during the StackSets deployment?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a CloudFormation custom resource that invokes an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to conditionally enable GuardDuty if GuardDuty is not already enabled in the accounts.

options.label: B
options.content: Use the Conditions section of the CloudFormation template to enable GuardDuty in accounts where GuardDuty is not already enabled.

options.label: C
options.content: Use the CloudFormation Fn::GetAtt intrinsic function to check whether GuardDuty is already enabled. If GuardDuty is not already enabled, use the Resources section of the CloudFormation template to enable GuardDuty.

options.label: D
options.content: Manually discover the list of AWS account IDs where GuardDuty is not enabled. Use the CloudFormation Fn::ImportValue intrinsic function to import the list of account IDs into the CloudFormation template to skip deployment for the listed AWS accounts.

questions.explanation: ????? A????? CloudFormation ???????? GuardDuty?????????????????? Lambda?Lambda ?? GuardDuty ???????????

explanations.zh: ????? A????? CloudFormation ???????? GuardDuty?????????????????? Lambda?Lambda ?? GuardDuty ???????????
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion says CloudFormation does not directly enable GuardDuty by default, so the template should use a custom resource that invokes Lambda; the function conditionally enables GuardDuty when it is not already enabled.

questions.content: A company has an AWS Control Tower landing zone. The company's DevOps team creates a workload OU. A development OU and a production OU are nested under the workload OU. The company grants users full access to the company's AWS accounts to deploy applications. The DevOps team needs to allow only a specific management IAM role to manage the IAM roles and policies of any AWS accounts in only the production OU. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an SCP that denies full access with a condition to exclude the management IAM role for the organization root.

options.label: B
options.content: Ensure that the FullAWSAccess SCP is applied at the organization root.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an SCP that allows IAM related actions. Attach the SCP to the development OU.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an SCP that denies IAM related actions with a condition to exclude the management IAM role. Attach the SCP to the workload OU.

options.label: E
options.content: Create an SCP that denies IAM related actions with a condition to exclude the management IAM role. Attach the SCP to the production OU.

questions.explanation: ????? B?E????? SCP ?????Deny ????????????? FullAWSAccess ?????????????? FullAWSAccess??? production OU ???????? Deny IAM ?? SCP?

explanations.zh: ????? B?E????? SCP ?????Deny ????????????? FullAWSAccess ?????????????? FullAWSAccess??? production OU ???????? Deny IAM ?? SCP?
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and E. The discussion emphasizes SCP inheritance: Deny policies inherit downward, while the root normally keeps FullAWSAccess as the default allow; therefore keep FullAWSAccess at the root and attach a deny-IAM SCP with an exception for the management role to the production OU.

questions.content: A company hired a penetration tester to simulate an internal security breach. The tester performed port scans on the company's Amazon EC2 instances. The company's security measures did not detect the port scans. The company needs a solution that automatically provides notification when port scans are performed on EC2 instances. The company creates and subscribes to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. What should the company do next to meet the requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Ensure that Amazon GuardDuty is enabled. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for detected EC2 and port scan findings. Connect the alarm to the SNS topic.

options.label: B
options.content: Ensure that Amazon Inspector is enabled. Create an Amazon EventBridge event for detected network reachability findings that indicate port scans. Connect the event to the SNS topic.

options.label: C
options.content: Ensure that Amazon Inspector is enabled. Create an Amazon EventBridge event for detected CVEs that cause open port vulnerabilities. Connect the event to the SNS topic.

options.label: D
options.content: Ensure that AWS CloudTrail is enabled. Create an AWS Lambda function to analyze the CloudTrail logs for unusual amounts of traffic from an IP address range. Connect the Lambda function to the SNS topic.

questions.explanation: ????? A????? GuardDuty ? Inspector?GuardDuty ???????????????? EC2 ?????????? A ?? GuardDuty??? CloudWatch alarm ?? SNS ???

explanations.zh: ????? A????? GuardDuty ? Inspector?GuardDuty ???????????????? EC2 ?????????? A ?? GuardDuty??? CloudWatch alarm ?? SNS ???
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion distinguishes GuardDuty from Inspector: GuardDuty provides continuous threat detection and alerting, which fits EC2 and port scan findings; option A enables GuardDuty and connects a CloudWatch alarm to SNS.

questions.content: A company runs applications in an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster. The EKS cluster uses an Application Load Balancer to route traffic to the applications that run in the cluster. A new application that was migrated to the EKS cluster is performing poorly. All the other applications in the EKS cluster maintain appropriate operation. The new application scales out horizontally to the preconfigured maximum number of pods immediately upon deployment, before any user traffic routes to the web application. Which solution will resolve the scaling behavior of the web application in the EKS cluster?

options.label: A
options.content: Implement the Horizontal Pod Autoscaler in the EKS cluster.

options.label: B
options.content: Implement the Vertical Pod Autoscaler in the EKS cluster.

options.label: C
options.content: Implement the Cluster Autoscaler.

options.label: D
options.content: Implement the AWS Load Balancer Controller in the EKS cluster.

questions.explanation: ????? B???????????????? pod ??????????????????????Vertical Pod Autoscaler ???? Pod ???? right sizing????? B?

explanations.zh: ????? B???????????????? pod ??????????????????????Vertical Pod Autoscaler ???? Pod ???? right sizing????? B?
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion says the application already scales horizontally to the maximum pod count but still performs poorly, indicating resource allocation may be wrong; Vertical Pod Autoscaler helps right-size pod resources, so B fits.

questions.content: A company has an AWS Control Tower landing zone that manages its organization in AWS Organizations. The company created an OU structure that is based on the company's requirements. The company's DevOps team has established the core accounts for the solution and an account for all centralized AWS CloudFormation and AWS Service Catalog solutions. The company wants to offer a series of customizations that an account can request through AWS Control Tower. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Enable trusted access for CloudFormation with Organizations by using service-managed permissions.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an IAM role that is named AWSControlTowerBlueprintAccess. Configure the role with a trust policy that allows the AWSControlTowerAdmin role in the management account to assume the role. Attach the AWSServiceCatalogAdminFullAccess IAM policy to the AWSControlTowerBlueprintAccess role.

options.label: C
options.content: Create a Service Catalog product for each CloudFormation template.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CloudFormation stack set for each CloudFormation template. Enable automatic deployment for each stack set. Create a CloudFormation stack instance that targets specific OUs.

options.label: E
options.content: Deploy the Customizations for AWS Control Tower (CfCT) CloudFormation stack.

options.label: F
options.content: Create a CloudFormation template that contains the resources for each customization.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、C、F。F 先为每个自定义项创建包含资源的 CloudFormation 模板，C 再把每个模板封装为 Service Catalog 产品，B 则创建 AWSControlTowerBlueprintAccess 角色并授权管理账号中的 AWSControlTowerAdmin 角色代入，以便 Control Tower 蓝图访问这些产品。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、C、F。F 先为每个自定义项创建包含资源的 CloudFormation 模板，C 再把每个模板封装为 Service Catalog 产品，B 则创建 AWSControlTowerBlueprintAccess 角色并授权管理账号中的 AWSControlTowerAdmin 角色代入，以便 Control Tower 蓝图访问这些产品。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B, C, and F. F creates the CloudFormation templates that contain each customization, C wraps each template as a Service Catalog product, and B creates the AWSControlTowerBlueprintAccess role with trust for AWSControlTowerAdmin in the management account so Control Tower can access the blueprint resources.

questions.content: A company runs a workload on Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs a control that requires the use of Instance Metadata Service Version 2 (IMDSv2) on all EC2 instances in the AWS account. If an EC2 instance does not prevent the use of Instance Metadata Service Version 1 (IMDSv1), the EC2 instance must be terminated. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Set up AWS Config in the account. Use a managed rule to check EC2 instances. Configure the rule to remediate the findings by using AWS Systems Manager Automation to terminate the instance.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a permissions boundary that prevents the ec2:RunInstance action if the ec2:MetadataHttpTokens condition key is not set to a value of required. Attach the permissions boundary to the IAM role that was used to launch the instance.

options.label: C
options.content: Set up Amazon Inspector in the account. Configure Amazon Inspector to activate deep inspection for EC2 instances. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for an Inspector2 finding. Set an AWS Lambda function as the target to terminate the instance.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for the EC2 instance launch successful event. Send the event to an AWS Lambda function to inspect the EC2 metadata and to terminate the instance.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。讨论指出 AWS Config 的托管规则 ec2-imdsv2-check 可以检查 EC2 实例是否使用 IMDSv2；将该规则配置为通过 Systems Manager Automation 终止不合规实例，符合自动发现和修复的要求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。讨论指出 AWS Config 的托管规则 ec2-imdsv2-check 可以检查 EC2 实例是否使用 IMDSv2；将该规则配置为通过 Systems Manager Automation 终止不合规实例，符合自动发现和修复的要求。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. The discussion identifies the AWS Config managed rule ec2-imdsv2-check for checking EC2 instances. Configuring remediation with Systems Manager Automation to terminate noncompliant instances matches the required automated check and response.

questions.content: A company builds an application that uses an Application Load Balancer in front of Amazon EC2 instances that are in an Auto Scaling group. The application is stateless. The Auto Scaling group uses a custom AMI that is fully prebuilt. The EC2 instances do not have a custom bootstrapping process. The AMI that the Auto Scaling group uses was recently deleted. The Auto Scaling group's scaling activities show failures because the AMI ID does not exist. Which combination of steps should a DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new launch template that uses the new AMI.

options.label: B
options.content: Update the Auto Scaling group to use the new launch template.

options.label: C
options.content: Reduce the Auto Scaling group's desired capacity to 0.

options.label: D
options.content: Increase the Auto Scaling group's desired capacity by 1.

options.label: E
options.content: Create a new AMI from a running EC2 instance in the Auto Scaling group.

options.label: F
options.content: Create a new AMI by copying the most recent public AMI of the operating system that the EC2 instances use.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、B、E。原 Auto Scaling 组使用的 AMI 已删除，因此需要先从正在运行的实例创建新 AMI（E），再创建使用该 AMI 的新启动模板（A），最后让 Auto Scaling 组使用新的启动模板（B）。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、B、E。原 Auto Scaling 组使用的 AMI 已删除，因此需要先从正在运行的实例创建新 AMI（E），再创建使用该 AMI 的新启动模板（A），最后让 Auto Scaling 组使用新的启动模板（B）。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A, B, and E. Because the AMI used by the Auto Scaling group was deleted, a new AMI must be created from a running instance (E), a new launch template must use that AMI (A), and the Auto Scaling group must be updated to use the new template (B).

questions.content: A company deploys a web application on Amazon EC2 instances that are behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The company stores the application code in an AWS CodeCommit repository. When code is merged to the main branch, an AWS Lambda function invokes an AWS CodeBuild project. The CodeBuild project packages the code, stores the packaged code in AWS CodeArtifact, and invokes AWS Systems Manager Run Command to deploy the packaged code to the EC2 instances. Previous deployments have resulted in defects, EC2 instances that are not running the latest version of the packaged code, and inconsistencies between instances. Which combination of actions should a DevOps engineer take to implement a more reliable deployment solution? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline that uses the CodeCommit repository as a source provider. Configure pipeline stages that run the CodeBuild project in parallel to build and test the application. In the pipeline, pass the CodeBuild project output artifact to an AWS CodeDeploy action.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline that uses the CodeCommit repository as a source provider. Create separate pipeline stages that run a CodeBuild project to build and then test the application. In the pipeline, pass the CodeBuild project output artifact to an AWS CodeDeploy action.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CodeDeploy application and a deployment group to deploy the packaged code to the EC2 instances. Configure the ALB for the deployment group.

options.label: D
options.content: Create individual Lambda functions that use AWS CodeDeploy instead of Systems Manager to run build, test, and deploy actions.

options.label: E
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Modify the CodeBuild project to store the packages in the S3 bucket instead of in CodeArtifact. Use deploy actions in CodeDeploy to deploy the artifact to the EC2 instances.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、C。B 使用 CodePipeline 从 CodeCommit 获取代码，并通过 CodeBuild 构建和测试后把构件交给 CodeDeploy；C 创建 CodeDeploy 应用和部署组，并把 ALB 配置到部署组中，以便将打包代码部署到 EC2 实例。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、C。B 使用 CodePipeline 从 CodeCommit 获取代码，并通过 CodeBuild 构建和测试后把构件交给 CodeDeploy；C 创建 CodeDeploy 应用和部署组，并把 ALB 配置到部署组中，以便将打包代码部署到 EC2 实例。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B and C. B builds the pipeline from CodeCommit through CodeBuild build and test stages and passes the output to CodeDeploy. C supplies the CodeDeploy application and deployment group, including ALB configuration, to deploy the package to the EC2 instances.

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The company's automation account contains a CI/CD pipeline that creates and configures new AWS accounts. The company has a group of internal service teams that provide services to accounts in the organization. The service teams operate out of a set of services accounts. The service teams want to receive an AWS CloudTrail event in their services accounts when the CreateAccount API call creates a new account. How should the company share this CloudTrail event with the service accounts?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule in the automation account to send account creation events to the default event bus in the services accounts. Update the default event bus in the services accounts to allow events from the automation account.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a custom Amazon EventBridge event bus in the services accounts. Update the custom event bus to allow events from the automation account. Create an EventBridge rule in the services account that directly listens to CloudTrail events from the automation account.

options.label: C
options.content: Create a custom Amazon EventBridge event bus in the automation account and the services accounts. Create an EventBridge rule and policy that connects the custom event buses that are in the automation account and the services accounts.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a custom Amazon EventBridge event bus in the automation account. Create an EventBridge rule and policy that connects the custom event bus to the default event buses in the services accounts.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。应在自动化账号中创建 EventBridge 规则，将账号创建事件发送到服务账号的默认事件总线，并在服务账号中允许来自自动化账号的事件；讨论也强调规则应由自动化账号推送事件，而不是让服务账号直接监听自动化账号的 CloudTrail 事件。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。应在自动化账号中创建 EventBridge 规则，将账号创建事件发送到服务账号的默认事件总线，并在服务账号中允许来自自动化账号的事件；讨论也强调规则应由自动化账号推送事件，而不是让服务账号直接监听自动化账号的 CloudTrail 事件。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. The EventBridge rule belongs in the automation account to forward account creation events to the services accounts' default event buses, and those buses must allow events from the automation account. The discussion notes that the services accounts should not directly listen for CloudTrail events from the automation account.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is building a solution that uses Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queues. The solution also includes an AWS Lambda function and an Amazon DynamoDB table. The Lambda function pulls content from an SQS queue event source and writes the content to the DynamoDB table. The solution must maximize the scalability of Lambda and must prevent successfully processed SQS messages from being processed multiple times. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Decrease the batch window to 1 second when configuring the Lambda function's event source mapping.

options.label: B
options.content: Decrease the batch size to 1 when configuring the Lambda function's event source mapping.

options.label: C
options.content: Include the ReportBatchItemFailures value in the FunctionResponseTypes list in the Lambda function's event source mapping.

options.label: D
options.content: Set the queue visibility timeout on the Lambda function's event source mapping to account for invocation throttling of the Lambda function.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。对于 SQS 触发的 Lambda 批处理失败，应在事件源映射的 FunctionResponseTypes 中加入 ReportBatchItemFailures，让函数可以报告单个失败消息，而不是让整个批次都重试。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。对于 SQS 触发的 Lambda 批处理失败，应在事件源映射的 FunctionResponseTypes 中加入 ReportBatchItemFailures，让函数可以报告单个失败消息，而不是让整个批次都重试。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. For Lambda processing SQS batches, adding ReportBatchItemFailures to FunctionResponseTypes in the event source mapping lets the function report only failed records, avoiding a retry of the entire batch.

questions.content: A company has a new AWS account that teams will use to deploy various applications. The teams will create many Amazon S3 buckets for application-specific purposes and to store AWS CloudTrail logs. The company has enabled Amazon Macie for the account. A DevOps engineer needs to optimize the Macie costs for the account without compromising the account's functionality. Which solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Exclude S3 buckets that contain CloudTrail logs from automated discovery.

options.label: B
options.content: Exclude S3 buckets that have public read access from automated discovery.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure scheduled daily discovery jobs for all S3 buckets in the account.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure discovery jobs to include S3 objects based on the last modified criterion.

options.label: E
options.content: Configure discovery jobs to include S3 objects that are tagged as production only.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、D。讨论强调应让敏感数据发现作业尽量有针对性：A 排除包含 CloudTrail 日志的 S3 存储桶，D 使用最后修改时间等对象条件限定扫描范围，从而减少无关发现作业。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、D。讨论强调应让敏感数据发现作业尽量有针对性：A 排除包含 CloudTrail 日志的 S3 存储桶，D 使用最后修改时间等对象条件限定扫描范围，从而减少无关发现作业。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A and D. The discussion says sensitive data discovery jobs should be targeted. A excludes S3 buckets that hold CloudTrail logs, and D uses object criteria such as last modified time to limit which S3 objects are included.

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The company recently acquired another company that has standalone AWS accounts. The acquiring company's DevOps team needs to consolidate the administration of the AWS accounts for both companies and retain full administrative control of the accounts. The DevOps team also needs to collect and group findings across all the accounts to implement and maintain a security posture. Which combination of steps should the DevOps team take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Invite the acquired company's AWS accounts to join the organization. Create an SCP that has full administrative privileges. Attach the SCP to the management account.

options.label: B
options.content: Invite the acquired company's AWS accounts to join the organization. Create the OrganizationAccountAccessRole IAM role in the invited accounts. Grant permission to the management account to assume the role.

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Security Hub to collect and group findings across all accounts. Use Security Hub to automatically detect new accounts as the accounts are added to the organization.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Firewall Manager to collect and group findings across all accounts. Enable all features for the organization. Designate an account in the organization as the delegated administrator account for Firewall Manager.

options.label: E
options.content: Use Amazon Inspector to collect and group findings across all accounts. Designate an account in the organization as the delegated administrator account for Amazon Inspector.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、C。B 将被收购公司的账号邀请加入现有 AWS Organizations，并创建 OrganizationAccountAccessRole 以便管理账号保留管理控制；C 使用 Security Hub 跨账号收集和汇总发现结果，并在新账号加入组织时自动纳入。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、C。B 将被收购公司的账号邀请加入现有 AWS Organizations，并创建 OrganizationAccountAccessRole 以便管理账号保留管理控制；C 使用 Security Hub 跨账号收集和汇总发现结果，并在新账号加入组织时自动纳入。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B and C. B consolidates administration by inviting the acquired company's accounts into the existing organization and enabling management account access. C uses Security Hub to collect and group findings across accounts and detect new organization accounts automatically.

questions.content: A company has an application and a CI/CD pipeline. The CI/CD pipeline consists of an AWS CodePipeline pipeline and an AWS CodeBuild project. The CodeBuild project runs tests against the application as part of the build process and outputs a test report. The company must keep the test reports for 90 days. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Add a new stage in the CodePipeline pipeline after the stage that contains the CodeBuild project. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to store the reports. Configure an S3 deploy action type in the new CodePipeline stage with the appropriate path and format for the reports.

options.label: B
options.content: Add a report group in the CodeBuild project buildspec file with the appropriate path and format for the reports. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to store the reports. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes an AWS Lambda function to copy the reports to the S3 bucket when a build is completed. Create an S3 Lifecycle rule to expire the objects after 90 days.

options.label: C
options.content: Add a new stage in the CodePipeline pipeline. Configure a test action type with the appropriate path and format for the reports. Configure the report expiration time to be 90 days in the CodeBuild project buildspec file.

options.label: D
options.content: Add a report group in the CodeBuild project buildspec file with the appropriate path and format for the reports. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to store the reports. Configure the report group as an artifact in the CodeBuild project buildspec file. Configure the S3 bucket as the artifact destination. Set the object expiration to 90 days.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。需要让 CodeBuild 生成测试报告并保留 90 天；B 在 buildspec 中添加 report group，构建完成后通过 EventBridge 和 Lambda 将报告复制到 S3，并用 S3 生命周期规则在 90 天后过期对象。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。需要让 CodeBuild 生成测试报告并保留 90 天；B 在 buildspec 中添加 report group，构建完成后通过 EventBridge 和 Lambda 将报告复制到 S3，并用 S3 生命周期规则在 90 天后过期对象。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. The reports need to be produced by CodeBuild and retained for 90 days. B adds a report group in the buildspec, copies completed reports to S3 with EventBridge and Lambda, and uses an S3 Lifecycle rule to expire them after 90 days.

questions.content: A company uses an Amazon API Gateway regional REST API to host its application API. The REST API has a custom domain. The REST API's default endpoint is deactivated. The company's internal teams consume the API. The company wants to use mutual TLS between the API and the internal teams as an additional layer of authentication. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) to create a private certificate authority (CA). Provision a client certificate that is signed by the private CA.

options.label: B
options.content: Provision a client certificate that is signed by a public certificate authority (CA). Import the certificate into AWS Certificate Manager (ACM).

options.label: C
options.content: Upload the provisioned client certificate to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the API Gateway mutual TLS to use the client certificate that is stored in the S3 bucket as the trust store.

options.label: D
options.content: Upload the provisioned client certificate private key to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the API Gateway mutual TLS to use the private key that is stored in the S3 bucket as the trust store.

options.label: E
options.content: Upload the root private certificate authority (CA) certificate to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the API Gateway mutual TLS to use the private CA certificate that is stored in the S3 bucket as the trust store.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、E。因为证书仅供内部团队使用，A 使用 ACM 私有 CA 创建并签发客户端证书；E 将根私有 CA 证书作为 API Gateway mutual TLS 的信任存储放在 S3 中，使 API Gateway 信任该 CA 签发的客户端证书。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、E。因为证书仅供内部团队使用，A 使用 ACM 私有 CA 创建并签发客户端证书；E 将根私有 CA 证书作为 API Gateway mutual TLS 的信任存储放在 S3 中，使 API Gateway 信任该 CA 签发的客户端证书。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A and E. Because the clients are internal, A creates a private CA in ACM and provisions a client certificate signed by it. E places the root private CA certificate in S3 as the API Gateway mutual TLS trust store so API Gateway trusts certificates from that CA.

questions.content: A company uses AWS Directory Service for Microsoft Active Directory as its identity provider (IdP). The company requires all infrastructure to be defined and deployed by AWS CloudFormation. A DevOps engineer needs to create a fleet of Windows-based Amazon EC2 instances to host an application. The DevOps engineer has created a CloudFormation template that contains an EC2 launch template, IAM role, EC2 security group, and EC2 Auto Scaling group. The DevOps engineer must implement a solution that joins all EC2 instances to the domain of the AWS Managed Microsoft AD directory. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: In the CloudFormation template, create an AWS::SSM::Document resource that joins the EC2 instance to the AWS Managed Microsoft AD domain by using the parameters for the existing directory. Update the launch template to include the SSMAssociation property to use the new SSM document. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore and AmazonSSMDirectoryServiceAccess AWS managed policies to the IAM role that the EC2 instances use.

options.label: B
options.content: In the CloudFormation template, update the launch template to include specific tags that propagate on launch. Create an AWS::SSM::Association resource to associate the AWS-JoinDirectoryServiceDomain Automation runbook with the EC2 instances that have the specified tags. Define the required parameters to join the AWS Managed Microsoft AD directory. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore and AmazonSSMDirectoryServiceAccess AWS managed policies to the IAM role that the EC2 instances use.

options.label: C
options.content: Store the existing AWS Managed Microsoft AD domain connection details in AWS Secrets Manager. In the CloudFormation template, create an AWS::SSM::Association resource to associate the AWS-CreateManagedWindowsInstanceWithApproval Automation runbook with the EC2 Auto Scaling group. Pass the ARNs for the parameters from Secrets Manager to join the domain. Attach the AmazonSSMDirectoryServiceAccess and SecretsManagerReadWrite AWS managed policies to the IAM role that the EC2 instances use.

options.label: D
options.content: Store the existing AWS Managed Microsoft AD domain administrator credentials in AWS Secrets Manager. In the CloudFormation template, update the EC2 launch template to include user data. Configure the user data to pull the administrator credentials from Secrets Manager and to join the AWS Managed Microsoft AD domain. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore and SecretsManagerReadWrite AWS managed policies to the IAM role that the EC2 instances use.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。B 在 CloudFormation 中为启动模板添加启动时传播的标签，再用 AWS::SSM::Association 将 AWS-JoinDirectoryServiceDomain 自动化运行手册关联到带这些标签的实例，并为实例角色附加 SSM 与 Directory Service 所需的托管策略。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。B 在 CloudFormation 中为启动模板添加启动时传播的标签，再用 AWS::SSM::Association 将 AWS-JoinDirectoryServiceDomain 自动化运行手册关联到带这些标签的实例，并为实例角色附加 SSM 与 Directory Service 所需的托管策略。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. B tags instances from the launch template, associates the AWS-JoinDirectoryServiceDomain Automation runbook through AWS::SSM::Association for instances with those tags, and attaches the required SSM and Directory Service managed policies to the EC2 role.

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The company has a root OU that has a child OU. The root OU has an SCP that allows all actions on all resources. The child OU has an SCP that allows all actions for Amazon DynamoDB and AWS Lambda, and denies all other actions. The company has an AWS account that is named vendor-data in the child OU. A DevOps engineer has an IAM user that is attached to the Administrator Access IAM policy in the vendor-data account. The DevOps engineer attempts to launch an Amazon EC2 instance in the vendor-data account but receives an access denied error. Which change should the DevOps engineer make to launch the EC2 instance in the vendor-data account?

options.label: A
options.content: Attach the AmazonEC2FullAccess IAM policy to the IAM user.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new SCP that allows all actions for Amazon EC2. Attach the SCP to the vendor-data account.

options.label: C
options.content: Update the SCP in the child OU to allow all actions for Amazon EC2.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a new SCP that allows all actions for Amazon EC2. Attach the SCP to the root OU.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。源答案要求更新子 OU 的 SCP 以允许 Amazon EC2 的所有操作；讨论也承认 C 可行，但指出它会影响该子 OU 下其他账号，因此关键点是 SCP 附加在 OU 层级会控制该 OU 内账号的 EC2 权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。源答案要求更新子 OU 的 SCP 以允许 Amazon EC2 的所有操作；讨论也承认 C 可行，但指出它会影响该子 OU 下其他账号，因此关键点是 SCP 附加在 OU 层级会控制该 OU 内账号的 EC2 权限。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. The source answer updates the SCP on the child OU to allow all EC2 actions. The discussion notes that this is possible, while also observing that an OU-level SCP affects the other accounts under that child OU.

questions.content: A company's security policies require the use of security hardened AMIs in production environments. A DevOps engineer has used EC2 Image Builder to create a pipeline that builds the AMIs on a recurring schedule. The DevOps engineer needs to update the launch templates of the company's Auto Scaling groups. The Auto Scaling groups must use the newest AMIs during the launch of Amazon EC2 instances. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to receive new AMI events from Image Builder. Target an AWS Systems Manager Run Command document that updates the launch templates of the Auto Scaling groups with the newest AMI ID.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to receive new AMI events from Image Builder. Target an AWS Lambda function that updates the launch templates of the Auto Scaling groups with the newest AMI ID.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the launch template to use a value from AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store for the AMI ID. Configure the Image Builder pipeline to update the Parameter Store value with the newest AMI ID.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the Image Builder distribution settings to update the launch templates with the newest AMI IConfigure the Auto Scaling groups to use the newest version of the launch template.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。讨论指出 EC2 Image Builder 内置支持在分发设置中更新启动模板；因此应让分发设置写入最新 AMI，并让 Auto Scaling 组使用启动模板的最新版本。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。讨论指出 EC2 Image Builder 内置支持在分发设置中更新启动模板；因此应让分发设置写入最新 AMI，并让 Auto Scaling 组使用启动模板的最新版本。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. The discussion notes that EC2 Image Builder can update launch templates through distribution settings. The Auto Scaling groups then use the newest launch template version that contains the latest AMI.

questions.content: A company has configured an Amazon S3 event source on an AWS Lambda function. The company needs the Lambda function to run when a new object is created or an existing object is modified in a particular S3 bucket. The Lambda function will use the S3 bucket name and the S3 object key of the incoming event to read the contents of the created or modified S3 object. The Lambda function will parse the contents and save the parsed contents to an Amazon DynamoDB table. The Lambda function's execution role has permissions to read from the S3 bucket and to write to the DynamoDB table. During testing, a DevOps engineer discovers that the Lambda function does not run when objects are added to the S3 bucket or when existing objects are modified. Which solution will resolve this problem?

options.label: A
options.content: Increase the memory of the Lambda function to give the function the ability to process large files from the S3 bucket.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a resource policy on the Lambda function to grant Amazon S3 the permission to invoke the Lambda function for the S3 bucket.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue as an OnFailure destination for the Lambda function.

options.label: D
options.content: Provision space in the /tmp folder of the Lambda function to give the function the ability to process large files from the S3 bucket.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。S3 事件没有触发 Lambda 时，需要在 Lambda 的资源型策略中授予该 S3 存储桶调用函数的权限；讨论也说明这是函数完全未运行的权限问题，而不是内存、磁盘或 DLQ 问题。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。S3 事件没有触发 Lambda 时，需要在 Lambda 的资源型策略中授予该 S3 存储桶调用函数的权限；讨论也说明这是函数完全未运行的权限问题，而不是内存、磁盘或 DLQ 问题。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. If S3 is not invoking the Lambda function, the Lambda resource-based policy must grant the S3 bucket permission to invoke it. The discussion frames this as an invocation permission issue, not memory, disk, or dead-letter queue behavior.

questions.content: A company has deployed a critical application in two AWS Regions. The application uses an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in both Regions. The company has Amazon Route 53 alias DNS records for both ALBs. The company uses Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller to ensure that the application can fail over between the two Regions. The Route 53 ARC configuration includes a routing control for both Regions. The company uses Route 53 ARC to perform quarterly disaster recovery (DR) tests. During the most recent DR test, a DevOps engineer accidentally turned off both routing controls. The company needs to ensure that at least one routing control is turned on at all times. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: In Route 53 ARC, create a new assertion safety rule. Apply the assertion safety rule to the two routing controls. Configure the rule with the ATLEAST type with a threshold of 1.

options.label: B
options.content: In Route 53 ARC, create a new gating safety rule. Apply the assertion safety rule to the two routing controls. Configure the rule with the OR type with a threshold of 1.

options.label: C
options.content: In Route 53 ARC, create a new resource set. Configure the resource set with an AWS::Route53::HealthCheck resource type. Specify the ARNs of the two routing controls as the target resource. Create a new readiness check for the resource set.

options.label: D
options.content: In Route 53 ARC, create a new resource set. Configure the resource set with an AWS::Route53RecoveryReadiness::DNSTargetResource resource type. Add the domain names of the two Route 53 alias DNS records as the target resource. Create a new readiness check for the resource set.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。Route 53 ARC 的 assertion safety rule 可以约束两个 routing controls 的状态；使用 ATLEAST 且阈值为 1，可确保至少一个 routing control 保持开启，从而避免两个都关闭。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。Route 53 ARC 的 assertion safety rule 可以约束两个 routing controls 的状态；使用 ATLEAST 且阈值为 1，可确保至少一个 routing control 保持开启，从而避免两个都关闭。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. A Route 53 ARC assertion safety rule can constrain the two routing controls. Using the ATLEAST type with a threshold of 1 ensures at least one routing control remains on.

questions.content: A healthcare services company is concerned about the growing costs of software licensing for an application for monitoring patient wellness. The company wants to create an audit process to ensure that the application is running exclusively on Amazon EC2 Dedicated Hosts. A DevOps engineer must create a workflow to audit the application to ensure compliance. What steps should the engineer take to meet this requirement with the LEAST administrative overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager Configuration Compliance. Use calls to the put-compliance-items API action to scan and build a database of noncompliant EC2 instances based on their host placement configuration. Use an Amazon DynamoDB table to store these instance IDs for fast access. Generate a report through Systems Manager by calling the list-compliance-summaries API action.

options.label: B
options.content: Use custom Java code running on an EC2 instance. Set up EC2 Auto Scaling for the instance depending on the number of instances to be checked. Send the list of noncompliant EC2 instance IDs to an Amazon SQS queue. Set up another worker instance to process instance IDs from the SQS queue and write them to Amazon DynamoDUse an AWS Lambda function to terminate noncompliant instance IDs obtained from the queue, and send them to an Amazon SNS email topic for distribution.

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Config. Identify all EC2 instances to be audited by enabling Config Recording on all Amazon EC2 resources for the region. Create a custom AWS Config rule that triggers an AWS Lambda function by using the "config-rule-change -triggered" blueprint. Modify the Lambda evaluateCompliance() function to verify host placement to return a NON_COMPLIANT result if the instance is not running on an EC2 Dedicated Host. Use the AWS Config report to address noncompliant instances.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CloudTrail. Identify all EC2 instances to be audited by analyzing all calls to the EC2 RunCommand API action. Invoke an AWS Lambda function that analyzes the host placement of the instance. Store the EC2 instance ID of noncompliant resources in an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance. Generate a report by querying the RDS instance and exporting the query results to a CSV text file.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。讨论很简短，因此依据正确选项内容：C 使用 AWS Config 记录该区域的 EC2 资源，并通过自定义 Config 规则触发 Lambda，在 evaluateCompliance 中检查实例是否运行在 EC2 Dedicated Host 上，对不合规实例返回 NON_COMPLIANT。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。讨论很简短，因此依据正确选项内容：C 使用 AWS Config 记录该区域的 EC2 资源，并通过自定义 Config 规则触发 Lambda，在 evaluateCompliance 中检查实例是否运行在 EC2 Dedicated Host 上，对不合规实例返回 NON_COMPLIANT。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. The discussion is thin, so the correct option provides the basis: use AWS Config to record EC2 resources and a custom Config rule backed by Lambda to evaluate whether each instance runs on an EC2 Dedicated Host, returning NON_COMPLIANT when it does not.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is planning to deploy a Ruby-based application to production. The application needs to interact with an Amazon RDS for MySQL database and should have automatic scaling and high availability. The stored data in the database is critical and should persist regardless of the state of the application stack. The DevOps engineer needs to set up an automated deployment strategy for the application with automatic rollbacks. The solution also must alert the application team when a deployment fails. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy the application on AWS Elastic Beanstalk. Deploy an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance as part of the Elastic Beanstalk configuration.

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy the application on AWS Elastic Beanstalk. Deploy a separate Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance outside of Elastic Beanstalk.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure a notification email address that alerts the application team in the AWS Elastic Beanstalk configuration.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to monitor AWS Health events. Use an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as a target to alert the application team.

options.label: E
options.content: Use the immutable deployment method to deploy new application versions.

options.label: F
options.content: Use the rolling deployment method to deploy new application versions.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、C、E。B 将应用部署到 Elastic Beanstalk，并把关键的 MySQL RDS 实例放在 Beanstalk 外部以避免随环境生命周期受影响；C 配置通知邮件以提醒应用团队；E 使用 immutable deployment 发布新版本以降低部署风险。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、C、E。B 将应用部署到 Elastic Beanstalk，并把关键的 MySQL RDS 实例放在 Beanstalk 外部以避免随环境生命周期受影响；C 配置通知邮件以提醒应用团队；E 使用 immutable deployment 发布新版本以降低部署风险。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B, C, and E. B deploys the application on Elastic Beanstalk while keeping the critical RDS for MySQL database outside the Beanstalk environment, C configures notification email alerts for the team, and E uses immutable deployments for new versions.

questions.content: A company is using AWS CodePipeline to deploy an application. According to a new guideline, a member of the company's security team must sign off on any application changes before the changes are deployed into production. The approval must be recorded and retained. Which combination of actions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Configure CodePipeline to write actions to Amazon CloudWatch Logs.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure CodePipeline to write actions to an Amazon S3 bucket at the end of each pipeline stage.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CloudTrail trail to deliver logs to Amazon S3.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CodePipeline custom action to invoke an AWS Lambda function for approval. Create a policy that gives the security team access to manage CodePipeline custom actions.

options.label: E
options.content: Create a CodePipeline manual approval action before the deployment step. Create a policy that grants the security team access to approve manual approval stages.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C、E。C 使用 CloudTrail 将用户操作日志交付到 S3，以满足审计监控需求；E 在部署前加入 CodePipeline 手动审批动作，并授权安全团队审批，从而把发布控制交给安全团队。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C、E。C 使用 CloudTrail 将用户操作日志交付到 S3，以满足审计监控需求；E 在部署前加入 CodePipeline 手动审批动作，并授权安全团队审批，从而把发布控制交给安全团队。
explanations.en: Correct answers: C and E. C uses CloudTrail to deliver user activity logs to S3 for auditing, and E adds a CodePipeline manual approval action before deployment with a policy that lets the security team approve it.

questions.content: A company requires its internal business teams to launch resources through pre-approved AWS CloudFormation templates only. The security team requires automated monitoring when resources drift from their expected state. Which strategy should be used to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Allow users to deploy CloudFormation stacks using a CloudFormation service role only. Use CloudFormation drift detection to detect when resources have drifted from their expected state.

options.label: B
options.content: Allow users to deploy CloudFormation stacks using a CloudFormation service role only. Use AWS Config rules to detect when resources have drifted from their expected state.

options.label: C
options.content: Allow users to deploy CloudFormation stacks using AWS Service Catalog only. Enforce the use of a launch constraint. Use AWS Config rules to detect when resources have drifted from their expected state.

options.label: D
options.content: Allow users to deploy CloudFormation stacks using AWS Service Catalog only. Enforce the use of a template constraint. Use Amazon EventBridge notifications to detect when resources have drifted from their expected state.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。讨论指出单纯依赖手动或定时漂移检测不完全满足自动监控要求；C 通过 Service Catalog 和启动约束控制 CloudFormation 堆栈部署，并用 AWS Config 规则自动检测资源是否偏离预期状态。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。讨论指出单纯依赖手动或定时漂移检测不完全满足自动监控要求；C 通过 Service Catalog 和启动约束控制 CloudFormation 堆栈部署，并用 AWS Config 规则自动检测资源是否偏离预期状态。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. The discussion says manual or scheduled drift detection alone does not fully meet automated monitoring. C controls stack deployment through Service Catalog with a launch constraint and uses AWS Config rules to detect drift from the expected state.

questions.content: A company has multiple development groups working in a single shared AWS account. The senior manager of the groups wants to be alerted via a third-party API call when the creation of resources approaches the service limits for the account. Which solution will accomplish this with the LEAST amount of development effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that runs periodically and targets an AWS Lambda function. Within the Lambda function, evaluate the current state of the AWS environment and compare deployed resource values to resource limits on the account. Notify the senior manager if the account is approaching a service limit.

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy an AWS Lambda function that refreshes AWS Trusted Advisor checks, and configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to run the Lambda function periodically. Create another EventBridge rule with an event pattern matching Trusted Advisor events and a target Lambda function. In the target Lambda function, notify the senior manager.

options.label: C
options.content: Deploy an AWS Lambda function that refreshes AWS Health Dashboard checks, and configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to run the Lambda function periodically. Create another EventBridge rule with an event pattern matching Health Dashboard events and a target Lambda function. In the target Lambda function, notify the senior manager.

options.label: D
options.content: Add an AWS Config custom rule that runs periodically, checks the AWS service limit status, and streams notifications to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Deploy an AWS Lambda function that notifies the senior manager, and subscribe the Lambda function to the SNS topic.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。讨论强调需要持续监控服务配额；B 定期用 Lambda 刷新 Trusted Advisor 检查，再用 EventBridge 匹配 Trusted Advisor 事件并触发另一个 Lambda 通知高级经理，符合自动化配额告警流程。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。讨论强调需要持续监控服务配额；B 定期用 Lambda 刷新 Trusted Advisor 检查，再用 EventBridge 匹配 Trusted Advisor 事件并触发另一个 Lambda 通知高级经理，符合自动化配额告警流程。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. The discussion emphasizes continuous monitoring of service limits. B periodically refreshes Trusted Advisor checks with Lambda, then uses EventBridge to match Trusted Advisor events and invoke a Lambda function that notifies the senior manager.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is setting up a container-based architecture. The engineer has decided to use AWS CloudFormation to automatically provision an Amazon ECS cluster and an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group to launch the EC2 container instances. After successfully creating the CloudFormation stack, the engineer noticed that, even though the ECS cluster and the EC2 instances were created successfully and the stack finished the creation, the EC2 instances were associating with a different cluster. How should the DevOps engineer update the CloudFormation template to resolve this issue?

options.label: A
options.content: Reference the EC2 instances in the AWS::ECS::Cluster resource and reference the ECS cluster in the AWS::ECS::Service resource.

options.label: B
options.content: Reference the ECS cluster in the AWS::AutoScaling::LaunchConfiguration resource of the UserData property.

options.label: C
options.content: Reference the ECS cluster in the AWS::EC2::Instance resource of the UserData property.

options.label: D
options.content: Reference the ECS cluster in the AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource resource to trigger an AWS Lambda function that registers the EC2 instances with the appropriate ECS cluster.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。讨论引用 CloudFormation 的 ECS 集群资源文档；正确做法是在 Auto Scaling 启动配置的 UserData 中引用 ECS 集群，使启动的 EC2 实例加入指定 ECS 集群。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。讨论引用 CloudFormation 的 ECS 集群资源文档；正确做法是在 Auto Scaling 启动配置的 UserData 中引用 ECS 集群，使启动的 EC2 实例加入指定 ECS 集群。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. The discussion points to the CloudFormation ECS cluster resource. Referencing the ECS cluster in the LaunchConfiguration UserData lets EC2 instances launched by Auto Scaling join the intended ECS cluster.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is implementing governance controls for a company that requires its infrastructure to be housed within the United States. The engineer must restrict which AWS Regions can be used, and ensure an alert is sent as soon as possible if any activity outside the governance policy takes place. The controls should be automatically enabled on any new Region outside the United States (US). Which combination of actions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS Organizations SCP that denies access to all non-global services in non-US Regions. Attach the policy to the root of the organization.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure AWS CloudTrail to send logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs and enable it for all Regions. Use a CloudWatch Logs metric filter to send an alert on any service activity in non-US Regions.

options.label: C
options.content: Use an AWS Lambda function that checks for AWS service activity and deploy it to all Regions. Write an Amazon EventBridge rule that runs the Lambda function every hour, sending an alert if activity is found in a non-US Region.

options.label: D
options.content: Use an AWS Lambda function to query Amazon Inspector to look for service activity in non-US Regions and send alerts if any activity is found.

options.label: E
options.content: Write an SCP using the aws:RequestedRegion condition key limiting access to US Regions. Apply the policy to all users, groups, and roles.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、B。A 通过 Organizations SCP 在组织根上拒绝非美国区域中的非全局服务访问，实现预防控制；B 在所有区域启用 CloudTrail 并发送到 CloudWatch Logs，再用指标筛选器对非美国区域活动告警，实现监控。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、B。A 通过 Organizations SCP 在组织根上拒绝非美国区域中的非全局服务访问，实现预防控制；B 在所有区域启用 CloudTrail 并发送到 CloudWatch Logs，再用指标筛选器对非美国区域活动告警，实现监控。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A and B. A uses an Organizations SCP at the root to deny non-global services in non-US Regions, providing preventive control. B enables CloudTrail in all Regions, sends logs to CloudWatch Logs, and alerts on non-US Region activity with a metric filter.

questions.content: A company sells products through an ecommerce web application. The company wants a dashboard that shows a pie chart of product transaction details. The company wants to integrate the dashboard with the company's existing Amazon CloudWatch dashboards. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Update the ecommerce application to emit a JSON object to a CloudWatch log group for each processed transaction. Use CloudWatch Logs Insights to query the log group and to visualize the results in a pie chart format. Attach the results to the desired CloudWatch dashboard.

options.label: B
options.content: Update the ecommerce application to emit a JSON object to an Amazon S3 bucket for each processed transaction. Use Amazon Athena to query the S3 bucket and to visualize the results in a pie chart format. Export the results from Athena. Attach the results to the desired CloudWatch dashboard.

options.label: C
options.content: Update the ecommerce application to use AWS X-Ray for instrumentation. Create a new X-Ray subsegment. Add an annotation for each processed transaction. Use X-Ray traces to query the data and to visualize the results in a pie chart format. Attach the results to the desired CloudWatch dashboard.

options.label: D
options.content: Update the ecommerce application to emit a JSON object to a CloudWatch log group for each processed transaction. Create an AWS Lambda function to aggregate and write the results to Amazon DynamoDB. Create a Lambda subscription filter for the log file. Attach the results to the desired CloudWatch dashboard.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。应用应为每笔交易向 CloudWatch Logs 输出 JSON 对象，然后使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询并以饼图展示结果，再把图表加入 CloudWatch dashboard；讨论也指出 CloudWatch 支持饼图展示。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。应用应为每笔交易向 CloudWatch Logs 输出 JSON 对象，然后使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询并以饼图展示结果，再把图表加入 CloudWatch dashboard；讨论也指出 CloudWatch 支持饼图展示。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. The application should emit a JSON object for each processed transaction to CloudWatch Logs, use CloudWatch Logs Insights to query and visualize the results as a pie chart, and attach the visualization to the CloudWatch dashboard.

questions.content: A company is launching an application. The application must use only approved AWS services. The account that runs the application was created less than 1 year ago and is assigned to an AWS Organizations OU. The company needs to create a new Organizations account structure. The account structure must have an appropriate SCP that supports the use of only services that are currently active in the AWS account. The company will use AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) Access Analyzer in the solution. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an SCP that allows the services that IAM Access Analyzer identifies. Create an OU for the account. Move the account into the new OU. Attach the new SCP to the new OU. Detach the default FullAWSAccess SCP from the new OU.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an SCP that denies the services that IAM Access Analyzer identifies. Create an OU for the account. Move the account into the new OU. Attach the new SCP to the new OU.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an SCP that allows the services that IAM Access Analyzer identifies. Attach the new SCP to the organization's root.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an SCP that allows the services that IAM Access Analyzer identifies. Create an OU for the account. Move the account into the new OU. Attach the new SCP to the management account. Detach the default FullAWSAccess SCP from the new OU.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。A 根据 IAM Access Analyzer 识别出的服务创建允许型 SCP，把账号移动到新的 OU，附加该 SCP，并从该 OU 分离默认 FullAWSAccess，从而按已识别的实际访问需求收紧权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。A 根据 IAM Access Analyzer 识别出的服务创建允许型 SCP，把账号移动到新的 OU，附加该 SCP，并从该 OU 分离默认 FullAWSAccess，从而按已识别的实际访问需求收紧权限。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. A creates an SCP that allows the services identified by IAM Access Analyzer, moves the account into a new OU, attaches the SCP, and detaches the default FullAWSAccess policy from that OU to restrict access to observed needs.

questions.content: A company has multiple development teams in different business units that work in a shared single AWS account. All Amazon EC2 resources that are created in the account must include tags that specify who created the resources. The tagging must occur within the first hour of resource creation. A DevOps engineer needs to add tags to the created resources that include the user ID that created the resource and the cost center ID. The DevOps engineer configures an AWS Lambda function with the cost center mappings to tag the resources. The DevOps engineer also sets up AWS CloudTrail in the AWS account. An Amazon S3 bucket stores the CloudTrail event logs. Which solution will meet the tagging requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an S3 event notification on the S3 bucket to invoke the Lambda function for s3:ObjectTagging:Put events. Enable bucket versioning on the S3 bucket.

options.label: B
options.content: Enable server access logging on the S3 bucket. Create an S3 event notification on the S3 bucket for s3:ObjectTagging:* events.

options.label: C
options.content: Create a recurring hourly Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule that invokes the Lambda function. Modify the Lambda function to read the logs from the S3 bucket.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses Amazon EC2 as the event source. Configure the rule to match events delivered by CloudTrail. Configure the rule to target the Lambda function.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。讨论认为 D 更相关；D 创建以 EC2 为事件源、匹配 CloudTrail 交付事件的 EventBridge 规则，并把 Lambda 函数作为目标，从而在相关 EC2 API 活动发生时触发自动处理。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。讨论认为 D 更相关；D 创建以 EC2 为事件源、匹配 CloudTrail 交付事件的 EventBridge 规则，并把 Lambda 函数作为目标，从而在相关 EC2 API 活动发生时触发自动处理。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. The discussion identifies D as most relevant. It creates an EventBridge rule using EC2 as the event source, matches events delivered by CloudTrail, and targets the Lambda function for automated handling.

questions.content: A company runs an application for multiple environments in a single AWS account. An AWS CodePipeline pipeline uses a development Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster to test an image for the application from an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. The pipeline promotes the image to a production ECS cluster. The company needs to move the production cluster into a separate AWS account in the same AWS Region. The production cluster must be able to download the images over a private connection. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon ECR VPC endpoints and an Amazon S3 gateway endpoint. In the separate AWS account, create an ECR repository. Set the repository policy to allow the production ECS tasks to pull images from the main AWS account. Configure the production ECS task execution role to have permission to download the image from the ECR repository.

options.label: B
options.content: Set a repository policy on the production ECR repository in the main AWS account. Configure the repository policy to allow the production ECS tasks in the separate AWS account to pull images from the main account. Configure the production ECS task execution role to have permission to download the image from the ECR repository.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure ECR private image replication in the main AWS account. Activate cross-account replication. Define the destination account ID of the separate AWS account.

options.label: D
options.content: Use Amazon ECR VPC endpoints and an Amazon S3 gateway endpoint. Set a repository policy on the production ECR repository in the main AWS account. Configure the repository policy to allow the production ECS tasks in the separate AWS account to pull images from the main account.
