Configure the production ECS task execution role to have permission to download the image from the ECR repository.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。D 通过 ECR VPC 端点和 S3 网关端点支持私有拉取镜像，并在主账号的 ECR 仓库策略中允许另一个账号的生产 ECS 任务拉取，同时让生产 ECS 任务执行角色具备下载镜像权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。D 通过 ECR VPC 端点和 S3 网关端点支持私有拉取镜像，并在主账号的 ECR 仓库策略中允许另一个账号的生产 ECS 任务拉取，同时让生产 ECS 任务执行角色具备下载镜像权限。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. D uses ECR VPC endpoints and an S3 gateway endpoint, allows the production ECS tasks in the separate account to pull from the main account ECR repository through a repository policy, and grants the ECS task execution role permission to download the image.

questions.content: A company needs to ensure that flow logs remain configured for all existing and new VPCs in its AWS account. The company uses an AWS CloudFormation stack to manage its VPCs. The company needs a solution that will work for any VPCs that any IAM user creates. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Add the AWS::EC2::FlowLog resource to the CloudFormation stack that creates the VPCs.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an organization in AWS Organizations. Add the company's AWS account to the organization. Create an SCP to prevent users from modifying VPC flow logs.

options.label: C
options.content: Turn on AWS Config. Create an AWS Config rule to check whether VPC flow logs are turned on. Configure automatic remediation to turn on VPC flow logs.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an IAM policy to deny the use of API calls for VPC flow logs. Attach the IAM policy to all IAM users.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。AWS Config 可以持续检查现有和新建 VPC 是否启用 VPC Flow Logs；C 创建对应的 Config 规则并配置自动修复来开启 Flow Logs，讨论也指出这同时覆盖监控和修复。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。AWS Config 可以持续检查现有和新建 VPC 是否启用 VPC Flow Logs；C 创建对应的 Config 规则并配置自动修复来开启 Flow Logs，讨论也指出这同时覆盖监控和修复。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. AWS Config can monitor both existing and new VPCs for VPC flow logs. C creates a Config rule to check whether flow logs are enabled and configures automatic remediation to turn them on.

questions.content: A company's application teams use AWS CodeCommit repositories for their applications. The application teams have repositories in multiple AWS accounts. All accounts are in an organization in AWS Organizations. Each application team uses AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) configured with an external IdP to assume a developer IAM role. The developer role allows the application teams to use Git to work with the code in the repositories. A security audit reveals that the application teams can modify the main branch in any repository. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution that allows the application teams to modify the main branch of only the repositories that they manage. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Update the SAML assertion to pass the user's team name. Update the IAM role's trust policy to add an access-team session tag that has the team name.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an approval rule template for each team in the Organizations management account. Associate the template with all the repositories. Add the developer role ARN as an approver.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an approval rule template for each account. Associate the template with all repositories. Add the "aws:ResourceTag/access-team": "$ ;{aws:PrincipalTag/access-team}" condition to the approval rule template.

options.label: D
options.content: For each CodeCommit repository, add an access-team tag that has the value set to the name of the associated team.

options.label: E
options.content: Attach an SCP to the accounts. Include the following statement:

options.label: F
options.content: Create an IAM permissions boundary in each account. Include the following statement:

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、D、E。A 让 SAML 断言传递用户团队名，并在角色信任策略中形成 access-team 会话标签；D 给每个 CodeCommit 仓库设置对应的 access-team 资源标签；E 通过 SCP 使用资源标签条件实施访问控制。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、D、E。A 让 SAML 断言传递用户团队名，并在角色信任策略中形成 access-team 会话标签；D 给每个 CodeCommit 仓库设置对应的 access-team 资源标签；E 通过 SCP 使用资源标签条件实施访问控制。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A, D, and E. A passes the user's team name through the SAML assertion and trust policy as an access-team session tag. D tags each CodeCommit repository with the matching access-team value, and E applies an SCP whose condition is based on that resource tag.

questions.content: A company uses AWS WAF to protect its cloud infrastructure. A DevOps engineer needs to give an operations team the ability to analyze log messages from AWS WAF. The operations team needs to be able to create alarms for specific patterns in the log output. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Configure the appropriate AWS WAF web ACL to send log messages to the log group. Instruct the operations team to create CloudWatch metric filters.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster and appropriate indexes. Configure an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream to stream log data to the indexes. Use OpenSearch Dashboards to create filters and widgets.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket for the log output. Configure AWS WAF to send log outputs to the S3 bucket. Instruct the operations team to create AWS Lambda functions that detect each desired log message pattern. Configure the Lambda functions to publish to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket for the log output. Configure AWS WAF to send log outputs to the S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to create an external table definition that fits the log message pattern. Instruct the operations team to write SQL queries and to create Amazon CloudWatch metric filters for the Athena queries.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。应创建 CloudWatch Logs 日志组，并配置相应 AWS WAF web ACL 将日志发送到该日志组；之后运维团队可以基于这些日志创建 CloudWatch metric filters。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。应创建 CloudWatch Logs 日志组，并配置相应 AWS WAF web ACL 将日志发送到该日志组；之后运维团队可以基于这些日志创建 CloudWatch metric filters。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. Create a CloudWatch Logs log group and configure the AWS WAF web ACL to send logs to it. Once WAF logging is enabled, the operations team can create CloudWatch metric filters from those log messages.

questions.content: A software team is using AWS CodePipeline to automate its Java application release pipeline. The pipeline consists of a source stage, then a build stage, and then a deploy stage. Each stage contains a single action that has a runOrder value of 1. The team wants to integrate unit tests into the existing release pipeline. The team needs a solution that deploys only the code changes that pass all unit tests. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Modify the build stage. Add a test action that has a runOrder value of 1. Use AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider to run unit tests.

options.label: B
options.content: Modify the build stage. Add a test action that has a runOrder value of 2. Use AWS CodeBuild as the action provider to run unit tests.

options.label: C
options.content: Modify the deploy stage. Add a test action that has a runOrder value of 1. Use AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider to run unit tests.

options.label: D
options.content: Modify the deploy stage. Add a test action that has a runOrder value of 2. Use AWS CodeBuild as the action provider to run unit tests.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。单元测试必须在构建产物完成后运行；B 修改 build 阶段，添加 runOrder 为 2 的 CodeBuild 测试动作，确保测试在构建动作之后执行，而不是与构建并行或等到部署前才处理。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。单元测试必须在构建产物完成后运行；B 修改 build 阶段，添加 runOrder 为 2 的 CodeBuild 测试动作，确保测试在构建动作之后执行，而不是与构建并行或等到部署前才处理。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. Unit tests should run after artifacts are built. B adds a CodeBuild test action in the build stage with runOrder 2, ensuring it runs after the build action rather than in parallel or only before deployment.

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage several AWS accounts that the company's developers use. The company requires all data to be encrypted in transit. Multiple Amazon S3 buckets that were created in developer accounts allow unencrypted connections. A DevOps engineer must enforce encryption of data in transit for all existing S3 buckets that are created in accounts in the organization. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy an AWS Network Firewall firewall to each account. Route all outbound requests from the AWS environment through the firewall. Deploy a policy to block access to all outbound requests on port 80.

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy an AWS Network Firewall firewall to each account. Route all inbound requests to the AWS environment through the firewall. Deploy a policy to block access to all inbound requests on port 80.

options.label: C
options.content: Turn on AWS Config for the organization. Deploy a conformance pack that uses the s3-bucket-ssl-requests-only managed rule and an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook. Use a runbook that adds a bucket policy statement to deny access to an S3 bucket when the value of the aws:SecureTransport condition key is false.

options.label: D
options.content: Turn on AWS Config for the organization. Deploy a conformance pack that uses the s3-bucket-ssl-requests-only managed rule and an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook. Use a runbook that adds a bucket policy statement to deny access to an S3 bucket when the value of the s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption-aws-kms-key-id condition key is null.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。讨论强调需要使用 aws:SecureTransport 条件只允许 HTTPS/TLS 访问。C 在组织中启用 AWS Config，并部署包含 s3-bucket-ssl-requests-only 托管规则和 Systems Manager 自动化运行手册的合规包，通过桶策略拒绝 aws:SecureTransport 为 false 的请求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。讨论强调需要使用 aws:SecureTransport 条件只允许 HTTPS/TLS 访问。C 在组织中启用 AWS Config，并部署包含 s3-bucket-ssl-requests-only 托管规则和 Systems Manager 自动化运行手册的合规包，通过桶策略拒绝 aws:SecureTransport 为 false 的请求。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. The discussion highlights aws:SecureTransport as the needed condition for HTTPS/TLS-only access. C enables AWS Config for the organization and deploys a conformance pack with the s3-bucket-ssl-requests-only rule and an Automation runbook that adds a bucket policy denying requests where aws:SecureTransport is false.

questions.content: A company is reviewing its IAM policies. One policy written by the DevOps engineer has been flagged as too permissive. The policy is used by an AWS Lambda function that issues a stop command to Amazon EC2 instances tagged with Environment: NonProduction over the weekend. The current policy is: What changes should the engineer make to achieve a policy of least permission? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Add the following conditional expression:

options.label: B
options.content: Change "Resource": "*"to "Resource": "arn:aws:ec2:*:*:instance/*"

options.label: C
options.content: Add the following conditional expression:

options.label: D
options.content: Add the following conditional expression:

options.label: E
options.content: Change "Action": "ec2:*"to "Action": "ec2:StopInstances"

options.label: F
options.content: Add the following conditional expression:

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。B 将策略中的 Resource 从通配符改为 arn:aws:ec2:*:*:instance/*，把允许范围限制为 EC2 实例资源；讨论也指出这能让相关操作只作用在 EC2 实例上。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。B 将策略中的 Resource 从通配符改为 arn:aws:ec2:*:*:instance/*，把允许范围限制为 EC2 实例资源；讨论也指出这能让相关操作只作用在 EC2 实例上。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. B changes Resource from a wildcard to arn:aws:ec2:*:*:instance/*, limiting the permission scope to EC2 instance resources. The discussion notes this is the relevant resource restriction for EC2 actions.

questions.content: A company is developing an application that will generate log events. The log events consist of five distinct metrics every one tenth of a second and produce a large amount of data. The company needs to configure the application to write the logs to Amazon Timestream. The company will configure a daily query against the Timestream table. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the FASTEST query performance? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use batch writes to write multiple log events in a single write operation.

options.label: B
options.content: Write each log event as a single write operation.

options.label: C
options.content: Treat each log as a single-measure record.

options.label: D
options.content: Treat each log as a multi-measure record.

options.label: E
options.content: Configure the memory store retention period to be longer than the magnetic store retention period.

options.label: F
options.content: Configure the memory store retention period to be shorter than the magnetic store retention period.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、D、F。A 使用批量写入减少写入调用，D 将每条日志作为多度量记录以提高 Timestream 写入和查询效率，F 将内存存储保留期设置短于磁性存储保留期，符合按近期数据加速查询、长期数据降本保存的思路。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、D、F。A 使用批量写入减少写入调用，D 将每条日志作为多度量记录以提高 Timestream 写入和查询效率，F 将内存存储保留期设置短于磁性存储保留期，符合按近期数据加速查询、长期数据降本保存的思路。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A, D, and F. A batches log writes, D treats each log as a multi-measure record, and F keeps memory store retention shorter than magnetic store retention, aligning fast access for recent data with longer-term storage for older data.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer has created an AWS CloudFormation template that deploys an application on Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances run Amazon Linux. The application is deployed to the EC2 instances by using shell scripts that contain user data. The EC2 instances have an IAM instance profile that has an IAM role with the AmazonSSMManagedinstanceCore managed policy attached. The DevOps engineer has modified the user data in the CloudFormation template to install a new version of the application. The engineer has also applied the stack update. However, the application was not updated on the running EC2 instances. The engineer needs to ensure that the changes to the application are installed on the running EC2 instances. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the user data content to use the Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions (MIME) multipart format. Set the scripts- user parameter to always in the text/cloud-config section.

options.label: B
options.content: Refactor the user data commands to use the cfn-init helper script. Update the user data to install and configure the cfn-hup and cfn-init helper scripts to monitor and apply the metadata changes.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an EC2 launch template for the EC2 instances. Create a new EC2 Auto Scaling group. Associate the Auto Scaling group with the EC2 launch template. Use the AutoScalingScheduledAction update policy for the Auto Scaling group.

options.label: D
options.content: Refactor the user data commands to use an AWS Systems Manager document (SSM document). Add an AWS CLI command in the user data to use Systems Manager Run Command to apply the SSM document to the EC2 instances.

options.label: E
options.content: Refactor the user data command to use an AWS Systems Manager document (SSM document). Use Systems Manager State Manager to create an association between the SSM document and the EC2 instances.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、E。B 将用户数据重构为 cfn-init，并配置 cfn-hup 监控和应用元数据变化；E 将配置逻辑重构为 SSM document，并用 Systems Manager State Manager 关联到实例。两者都能让运行中的 EC2 实例接收后续配置更新。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、E。B 将用户数据重构为 cfn-init，并配置 cfn-hup 监控和应用元数据变化；E 将配置逻辑重构为 SSM document，并用 Systems Manager State Manager 关联到实例。两者都能让运行中的 EC2 实例接收后续配置更新。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B and E. B refactors user data to use cfn-init and cfn-hup so metadata changes can be monitored and applied. E uses an SSM document with State Manager associations, giving another managed way to apply updates to running EC2 instances.

questions.content: A company is refactoring applications to use AWS. The company identifies an internal web application that needs to make Amazon S3 API calls in a specific AWS account. The company wants to use its existing identity provider (IdP) auth.company.com for authentication. The IdP supports only OpenID Connect (OIDC). A DevOps engineer needs to secure the web application's access to the AWS account. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On). Configure an IdP. Upload the IdP metadata from the existing IdP.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an IAM IdP by using the provider URL, audience, and signature from the existing IP.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows the necessary S3 actions. Configure the role's trust policy to allow the OIDC IP to assume the role if the sts.amazon.com:aud context key is appid_from_idp.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows the necessary S3 actions. Configure the role's trust policy to allow the OIDC IP to assume the role if the auth.company.com:aud context key is appid_from_idp.

options.label: E
options.content: Configure the web application to use the AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity API operation to retrieve temporary credentials. Use the temporary credentials to make the S3 API calls.

options.label: F
options.content: Configure the web application to use the GetFederationToken API operation to retrieve temporary credentials. Use the temporary credentials to make the S3 API calls.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、D、E。B 使用现有 OIDC 身份提供商的信息创建 IAM IdP；D 创建具有必要 S3 权限的角色，并在信任策略中限制特定 audience；E 让 Web 应用调用 AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity 获取临时凭证，再用这些凭证访问 S3。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、D、E。B 使用现有 OIDC 身份提供商的信息创建 IAM IdP；D 创建具有必要 S3 权限的角色，并在信任策略中限制特定 audience；E 让 Web 应用调用 AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity 获取临时凭证，再用这些凭证访问 S3。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B, D, and E. B creates an IAM OIDC identity provider from the existing provider details. D creates an IAM role with required S3 permissions and a trust policy constrained by the audience value. E has the web application call AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity to obtain temporary credentials for S3 API calls.

questions.content: A company uses Amazon RDS for all databases in its AWS accounts. The company uses AWS Control Tower to build a landing zone that has an audit and logging account. All databases must be encrypted at rest for compliance reasons. The company's security engineer needs to receive notification about any noncompliant databases that are in the company's accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS Control Tower to activate the optional detective control (guardrail) to determine whether the RDS storage is encrypted. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic in the company's audit account. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to filter noncompliant events from the AWS Control Tower control (guardrail) to notify the SNS topic. Subscribe the security engineer's email address to the SNS topic.

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy AWS Lambda functions to every account. Write the Lambda function code to determine whether the RDS storage is encrypted in the account the function is deployed to. Send the findings as an Amazon CloudWatch metric to the management account. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Create a CloudWatch alarm that notifies the SNS topic when metric thresholds are met. Subscribe the security engineer's email address to the SNS topic.

options.label: C
options.content: Create a custom AWS Config rule in every account to determine whether the RDS storage is encrypted. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic in the audit account. Create an Amazon EventBidge rule to filter noncompliant events from the AWS Control Tower control (guardrail) to notify the SNS topic. Subscribe the security engineer's email address to the SNS topic.

options.label: D
options.content: Launch an Amazon C2 instance. Run an hourly cron job by using the AWS CLI to determine whether the RDS storage is encrypted in each AWS account. Store the results in an RDS database. Notify the security engineer by sending email messages from the EC2 instance when noncompliance is detected

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。题干使用 AWS Control Tower；A 启用用于检测 RDS 存储加密的可选侦测控制，并在审计账号中用 EventBridge 过滤不合规事件发送到 SNS，以通知安全工程师。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。题干使用 AWS Control Tower；A 启用用于检测 RDS 存储加密的可选侦测控制，并在审计账号中用 EventBridge 过滤不合规事件发送到 SNS，以通知安全工程师。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. Because the company uses AWS Control Tower, A activates the optional detective control for RDS storage encryption and uses EventBridge in the audit account to route noncompliant events to an SNS topic for the security engineer.

questions.content: A company is migrating from its on-premises data center to AWS. The company currently uses a custom on-premises Cl/CD pipeline solution to build and package software. The company wants its software packages and dependent public repositories to be available in AWS CodeArtifact to facilitate the creation of application-specific pipelines. Which combination of steps should the company take to update the CI/CD pipeline solution and to configure CodeArtifact with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Update the C1ICD pipeline to create a VM image that contains newly packaged software. Use AWS Import/Export to make the VM image available as an Amazon EC2 AMI. Launch the AMI with an attached IAM instance profile that allows CodeArtifact actions. Use AWS CLI commands to publish the packages to a CodeArtifact repository.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Identity and Access Management Roles Anywhere trust anchor. Create an IAM role that allows CodeArtifact actions and that has a trust relationship on the trust anchor. Update the on-premises CI/CD pipeline to assume the new IAM role and to publish the packages to CodeArtifact.

options.label: C
options.content: Create a new Amazon S3 bucket. Generate a presigned URL that allows the PutObject request. Update the on-premises CI/CD pipeline to use the presigned URL to publish the packages from the on-premises location to the S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function that runs when packages are created in the bucket through a put command. Configure the Lambda function to publish the packages to CodeArtifact.

options.label: D
options.content: For each public repository, create a CodeArutact repository that is configured with an external connection. Configure the dependent repositories as upstream public repositories.

options.label: E
options.content: Create a Codeartitact repository that is configured with a set of external connections to the public repositories. Configure the external connections to be downstream of the repository.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、D。B 使用 IAM Roles Anywhere 信任锚和 IAM 角色，让本地 CI/CD 流水线代入角色并发布包到 CodeArtifact；D 为每个公共仓库创建带 external connection 的 CodeArtifact 仓库，并把依赖仓库配置为上游公共仓库。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、D。B 使用 IAM Roles Anywhere 信任锚和 IAM 角色，让本地 CI/CD 流水线代入角色并发布包到 CodeArtifact；D 为每个公共仓库创建带 external connection 的 CodeArtifact 仓库，并把依赖仓库配置为上游公共仓库。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B and D. B uses IAM Roles Anywhere with a trust anchor and IAM role so the on-premises CI/CD pipeline can assume the role and publish packages to CodeArtifact. D creates CodeArtifact repositories with external connections and configures dependent public repositories as upstreams.

questions.content: A DevOps team uses AWS CodePipeline, AWS CodeBuild, and AWS CodeDeploy to deploy an application. The application is a REST API that uses AWS Lambda functions and Amazon API Gateway. Recent deployments have introduced errors that have affected many customers. The DevOps team needs a solution that reverts to the most recent stable version of the application when an error is detected. The solution must affect the fewest customers possible. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Set the deployment configuration in CodeDeploy to LambdaAllAtOnce. Configure automatic rollbacks on the deployment group. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that detects HTTP Bad Gateway errors on API Gateway. Configure the deployment group to roll back when the number of alarms meets the alarm threshold.

options.label: B
options.content: Set the deployment configuration in CodeDeploy to LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes. Configure automatic rollbacks on the deployment group. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that detects HTTP Bad Gateway errors on API Gateway. Configure the deployment group to roll back when the number of alarms meets the alarm threshold.

options.label: C
options.content: Set the deployment configuration in CodeDeploy to LambdaAllAtOnce. Configure manual rollbacks on the deployment group. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send notifications every time a deployment fails. Configure the SNS topic to invoke a new Lambda function that stops the current deployment and starts the most recent successful deployment.

options.label: D
options.content: Set the deployment configuration in CodeDeploy to LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes. Configure manual rollbacks on the deployment group. Create a metric filter on an Amazon CloudWatch log group for API Gateway to monitor HTTP Bad Gateway errors. Configure the metric filter to invoke a new Lambda function that stops the current deployment and starts the most recent successful deployment.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。B 使用 LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes 金丝雀部署，而不是一次性全量替换；同时配置自动回滚和 API Gateway 502 错误的 CloudWatch alarm，让 CodeDeploy 在告警达到阈值时回滚。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。B 使用 LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes 金丝雀部署，而不是一次性全量替换；同时配置自动回滚和 API Gateway 502 错误的 CloudWatch alarm，让 CodeDeploy 在告警达到阈值时回滚。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. B uses the LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes deployment configuration instead of all-at-once replacement, enables automatic rollback, and ties rollback to a CloudWatch alarm for API Gateway Bad Gateway errors.

questions.content: A company recently deployed its web application on AWS. The company is preparing for a large-scale sales event and must ensure that the web application can scale to meet the demand. The application's frontend infrastructure includes an Amazon CloudFront distribution that has an Amazon S3 bucket as an origin. The backend infrastructure includes an Amazon API Gateway API, several AWS Lambda functions, and an Amazon Aurora DB cluster. The company's DevOps engineer conducts a load test and identifies that the Lambda functions can fulfil the peak number of requests. However, the DevOps engineer notices request latency during the initial burst of requests. Most of the requests to the Lambda functions produce queries to the database. A large portion of the invocation time is used to establish database connections. Which combination of steps will provide the application with the required scalability? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a higher reserved concurrency for the Lambda functions.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure a higher provisioned concurrency for the Lambda functions.

options.label: C
options.content: Convert the DB cluster to an Aurora global database. Add additional Aurora Replicas in AWS Regions based on the locations of the company's customers.

options.label: D
options.content: Refactor the Lambda functions. Move the code blocks that initialize database connections into the function handlers.

options.label: F
options.content: Use Amazon RDS Proxy to create a proxy for the Aurora database. Update the Lambda functions to use the proxy endpoints for database connections.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、C、F。B 提高 Lambda 预置并发以降低突发流量下的冷启动延迟；C 将 Aurora 转为 global database 并按客户位置添加跨区域只读副本；F 使用 RDS Proxy，并让 Lambda 通过代理端点连接数据库，以缓解连接管理问题。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、C、F。B 提高 Lambda 预置并发以降低突发流量下的冷启动延迟；C 将 Aurora 转为 global database 并按客户位置添加跨区域只读副本；F 使用 RDS Proxy，并让 Lambda 通过代理端点连接数据库，以缓解连接管理问题。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B, C, and F. B raises provisioned concurrency to reduce Lambda cold-start latency during bursts, C converts Aurora to a global database with regional read replicas for customer locations, and F uses RDS Proxy so Lambda connects through proxy endpoints instead of overwhelming the database with direct connections.

questions.content: A company runs a web application that extends across multiple Availability Zones. The company uses an Application Load Balancer (ALB) for routing, AWS Fargate for the application, and Amazon Aurora for the application data. The company uses AWS CloudFormation templates to deploy the application. The company stores all Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository in the same AWS account and AWS Region. A DevOps engineer needs to establish a disaster recovery (DR) process in another Region. The solution must meet an RPO of 8 hours and an RTO of 2 hours. The company sometimes needs more than 2 hours to build the Docker images from the Dockerfile. Which solution will meet the RTO and RPO requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.label: A
options.content: Copy the CloudFormation templates and the Dockerfile to an Amazon S3 bucket in the DR Region. Use AWS Backup to configure automated Aurora cross-Region hourly snapshots. In case of DR, build the most recent Docker image and upload the Docker image to an ECR repository in the DR Region. Use the CloudFormation template that has the most recent Aurora snapshot and the Docker image from the ECR repository to launch a new CloudFormation stack in the DR Region. Update the application DNS records to point to the new ALB.

options.label: B
options.content: Copy the CloudFormation templates to an Amazon S3 bucket in the DR Region. Configure Aurora automated backup Cross- Region Replication. Configure ECR Cross-Region Replication. In case of DR, use the CloudFormation template with the most recent Aurora snapshot and the Docker image from the local ECR repository to launch a new CloudFormation stack in the DR Region. Update the application DNS records to point to the new ALB.

options.label: C
options.content: Copy the CloudFormation templates to an Amazon S3 bucket in the DR Region. Use Amazon EventBridge to schedule an AWS Lambda function to take an hourly snapshot of the Aurora database and of the most recent Docker image in the ECR repository. Copy the snapshot and the Docker image to the DR Region. In case of DR, use the CloudFormation template with the most recent Aurora snapshot and the Docker image from the local ECR repository to launch a new CloudFormation stack in the DR Region.

options.label: D
options.content: Copy the CloudFormation templates to an Amazon S3 bucket in the DR Region. Deploy a second application CloudFormation stack in the DR Region. Reconfigure Aurora to be a global database. Update both CloudFormation stacks when a new application release in the current Region is needed. In case of DR, update the application DNS records to point to the new ALB.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。B 预先把 CloudFormation 模板复制到灾备区域，启用 Aurora 自动备份跨区域复制和 ECR 跨区域复制；灾难发生时使用最新 Aurora 快照和本地 ECR 镜像在灾备区域启动新堆栈，再更新 DNS 指向新 ALB，以满足较短 RTO。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。B 预先把 CloudFormation 模板复制到灾备区域，启用 Aurora 自动备份跨区域复制和 ECR 跨区域复制；灾难发生时使用最新 Aurora 快照和本地 ECR 镜像在灾备区域启动新堆栈，再更新 DNS 指向新 ALB，以满足较短 RTO。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. B prepositions the CloudFormation templates in the DR Region, enables Aurora automated backup cross-Region replication and ECR cross-Region replication, then launches a new stack from the latest Aurora snapshot and local ECR image and updates DNS to the new ALB.

questions.content: A company's application runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The application writes to a log file that records the username, date, time, and source IP address of the login. The log is published to a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. The company is performing a root cause analysis for an event that occurred on the previous day. The company needs to know the number of logins for a specific user from the past 7 days. Which solution will provide this information?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Logs metric filter on the log group. Use a filter pattern that matches the username. Publish a CloudWatch metric that sums the number of logins over the past 7 days.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Logs subscription on the log group. Use a filter pattern that matches the username. Publish a CloudWatch metric that sums the number of logins over the past 7 days.

options.label: C
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Logs Insights query that uses an aggregation function to count the number of logins for the username over the past 7 days. Run the query against the log group.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CloudWatch dashboard. Add a number widget that has a filter pattern that counts the number of logins for the username over the past 7 days directly from the log group.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。需要统计过去 7 天某用户名的登录次数；C 使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 聚合查询在日志组上计数，正好匹配讨论中所说的获取所需信息。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。需要统计过去 7 天某用户名的登录次数；C 使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 聚合查询在日志组上计数，正好匹配讨论中所说的获取所需信息。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. To get the number of logins for a username over the past 7 days, C runs a CloudWatch Logs Insights query with an aggregation function against the log group.

questions.content: A company has an AWS CodeDeploy application. The application has a deployment group that uses a single tag group to identify instances for the deployment of Application. The single tag group configuration identifies instances that have Environment=Production and Name=ApplicationA tags for the deployment of ApplicationA. The company launches an additional Amazon EC2 instance with Department=Marketing, Environment=Production, and Name=ApplicationB tags. On the next CodeDeploy deployment of Application, the additional instance has ApplicationA installed on it. A DevOps engineer needs to configure the existing deployment group to prevent ApplicationA from being installed on the additional instance. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Change the current single tag group to include only the Environment=Production tag. Add another single tag group that includes only the Name=ApplicationA tag.

options.label: B
options.content: Change the current single tag group to include the Department=Marketing, Environment=production, and Name=ApplicationA tags.

options.label: C
options.content: Add another single tag group that includes only the Department=Marketing tag. Keep the Environment=Production and Name=ApplicationA tags with the current single tag group.

options.label: D
options.content: Change the current single tag group to include only the Environment=Production tag. Add another single tag group that includes only the Department=Marketing tag.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。讨论指出同一个标签组内的标签是 OR 关系，不同标签组之间是 AND 关系；因此 A 将 Environment=Production 和 Name=ApplicationA 放入两个单独标签组，才能同时匹配生产环境和指定应用。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。讨论指出同一个标签组内的标签是 OR 关系，不同标签组之间是 AND 关系；因此 A 将 Environment=Production 和 Name=ApplicationA 放入两个单独标签组，才能同时匹配生产环境和指定应用。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. The discussion states that tags within one tag group use OR logic, while separate tag groups use AND logic. A places Environment=Production and Name=ApplicationA in separate single tag groups so both conditions must match.

questions.content: A company is launching an application that stores raw data in an Amazon S3 bucket. Three applications need to access the data to generate reports. The data must be redacted differently for each application before the applications can access the data. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an S3 bucket for each application. Configure S3 Same-Region Replication (SRR) from the raw data's S3 bucket to each application's S3 bucket. Configure each application to consume data from its own S3 bucket.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream. Create an AWS Lambda function that is invoked by object creation events in the raw data's S3 bucket. Program the Lambda function to redact data for each application. Publish the data on the Kinesis data stream. Configure each application to consume data from the Kinesis data stream.

options.label: C
options.content: For each application, create an S3 access point that uses the raw data's S3 bucket as the destination. Create an AWS Lambda function that is invoked by object creation events in the raw data's S3 bucket. Program the Lambda function to redact data for each application. Store the data in each application's S3 access point. Configure each application to consume data from its own S3 access point.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an S3 access point that uses the raw data's S3 bucket as the destination. For each application, create an S3 Object Lambda access point that uses the S3 access point. Configure the AWS Lambda function for each S3 Object Lambda access point to redact data when objects are retrieved. Configure each application to consume data from its own S3 Object Lambda access point

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。讨论关键词是使用 S3 Object Lambda access point 进行数据脱敏；D 为原始数据桶创建 S3 access point，再为每个应用创建自己的 S3 Object Lambda access point，并配置各自 Lambda 在对象读取时进行脱敏。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。讨论关键词是使用 S3 Object Lambda access point 进行数据脱敏；D 为原始数据桶创建 S3 access point，再为每个应用创建自己的 S3 Object Lambda access point，并配置各自 Lambda 在对象读取时进行脱敏。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. The discussion identifies S3 Object Lambda access points for redaction. D creates an S3 access point for the raw data bucket, then gives each application its own S3 Object Lambda access point backed by a Lambda function that redacts data on retrieval.

questions.content: A company uses AWS Control Tower and AWS CloudFormation to manage its AWS accounts and to create AWS resources. The company requires all Amazon S3 buckets to be encrypted with AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) when the S3 buckets are created in a CloudFormation stack. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS Organizations. Attach an SCP that denies the s3:PutObject permission if the request does not include an x-amz- server-side-encryption header that requests server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS).

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS Control Tower with a multi-account environment. Configure and enable proactive AWS Control Tower controls on all OUs with CloudFormation hooks.

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Control Tower with a multi-account environment. Configure and enable detective AWS Control Tower controls on all OUs with CloudFormation hooks.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Organizations. Create an AWS Config organizational rule to check whether a KMS encryption key is enabled for all S3 buckets. Deploy the rule. Create and apply an SCP to prevent users from stopping and deleting AWS Config across all AWS accounts,

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。B 使用 AWS Control Tower 的多账号环境，并在所有 OU 上启用 proactive controls 与 CloudFormation hooks；讨论说明 proactive controls 能在创建资源前阻止不合规操作，适合强制通过 CloudFormation 创建的 S3 桶启用加密。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。B 使用 AWS Control Tower 的多账号环境，并在所有 OU 上启用 proactive controls 与 CloudFormation hooks；讨论说明 proactive controls 能在创建资源前阻止不合规操作，适合强制通过 CloudFormation 创建的 S3 桶启用加密。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. B uses AWS Control Tower across a multi-account environment and enables proactive controls on all OUs with CloudFormation hooks. The discussion explains that proactive controls prevent noncompliant resource creation, making them suitable for enforcing S3 encryption during CloudFormation stack operations.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer has developed an AWS Lambda function. The Lambda function starts an AWS CloudFormation drift detection operation on all supported resources for a specific CloudFormation stack. The Lambda function then exits its invocation. The DevOps engineer has created an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule that invokes the Lambda function every hour. An Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic already exists in the AWS account. The DevOps engineer has subscribed to the SNS topic to receive notifications. The DevOps engineer needs to receive a notification as soon as possible when drift is detected in this specific stack configuration. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the existing EventBridge rule to also target the SNS topic. Configure an SNS subscription filter policy to match the CloudFormation stack. Attach the subscription filter policy to the SNS topic.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a second Lambda function to query the CloudFormation API for the drift detection results for the stack. Configure the second Lambda function to publish a message to the SNS topic if drift is detected. Adjust the existing EventBridge rule to also target the second Lambda function.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure Amazon GuardDuty in the account with drift detection for all CloudFormation stacks. Create a second EventBridge rule that reacts to the GuardDuty drift detection event finding for the specific CloudFormation stack. Configure the SNS topic as a target of the second EventBridge rule.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure AWS Config in the account. Use the cloudformation-stack-drift-detection-check managed rule. Create a second EventBridge rule that reacts to a compliance change event for the CloudFormation stack. Configure the SNS topic as a target of the second EventBridge rule.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。D 使用 AWS Config 的 cloudformation-stack-drift-detection-check 托管规则检测堆栈漂移，再创建第二个 EventBridge 规则响应 CloudFormation 堆栈合规性变化，并把 SNS topic 作为目标发送通知。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。D 使用 AWS Config 的 cloudformation-stack-drift-detection-check 托管规则检测堆栈漂移，再创建第二个 EventBridge 规则响应 CloudFormation 堆栈合规性变化，并把 SNS topic 作为目标发送通知。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. D configures AWS Config with the cloudformation-stack-drift-detection-check managed rule, then uses a second EventBridge rule for compliance change events on the CloudFormation stack and sends those events to the SNS topic.

questions.content: A company has deployed a complex container-based workload on AWS. The workload uses Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus for monitoring. The workload runs in an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster in an AWS account. The company's DevOps team wants to receive workload alerts by using the company's Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. The SNS topic is in the same AWS account as the EKS cluster. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use the Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus remote write URL to send alerts to the SNS topic

options.label: B
options.content: Create an alerting rule that checks the availability of each of the workload's containers.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an alert manager configuration for the SNS topic.

options.label: D
options.content: Modify the access policy of the SNS topic. Grant the aps.amazonaws.com service principal the sns:Publish permission and the sns:GetTopicAttributes permission for the SNS topic.

options.label: E
options.content: Modify the IAM role that Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus uses. Grant the role the sns:Publish permission and the sns:GetTopicAttributes permission for the SNS topic.

options.label: F
options.content: Create an OpenID Connect (OIDC) provider for the EKS cluster. Create a cluster service account. Grant the account the sns:Publish permission and the sns:GetTopicAttributes permission by using an IAM role.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、C、D。讨论只给出 BCD，因此依据正确选项内容：B 创建检查每个容器可用性的告警规则，C 为 SNS topic 创建 alert manager 配置，D 修改 SNS topic 策略允许 aps.amazonaws.com 发布并读取主题属性。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、C、D。讨论只给出 BCD，因此依据正确选项内容：B 创建检查每个容器可用性的告警规则，C 为 SNS topic 创建 alert manager 配置，D 修改 SNS topic 策略允许 aps.amazonaws.com 发布并读取主题属性。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B, C, and D. The discussion is brief, so the option text provides the basis: B creates alerting rules for container availability, C creates the alert manager configuration for the SNS topic, and D grants the aps.amazonaws.com service principal permission to publish to and read attributes from the SNS topic.

questions.content: A company's organization in AWS Organizations has a single OU. The company runs Amazon EC2 instances in the OU accounts. The company needs to limit the use of each EC2 instance's credentials to the specific EC2 instance that the credential is assigned to. A DevOps engineer must configure security for the EC2 instances. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an SCP that specifies the VPC CIDR block. Configure the SCP to check whether the value of the aws:VpcSourcelp condition key is in the specified block. In the same SCP check, check whether the values of the aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivatelPv4 and aws:SourceVpc condition keys are the same. Deny access if either condition is false. Apply the SCP to the OU.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an SCP that checks whether the values of the aws:EC2InstanceSourceVPC and aws:SourceVpc condition keys are the same. Deny access if the values are not the same. In the same SCP check, check whether the values of the aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivateIPv4 and aws:VpcSourceIp condition keys are the same. Deny access if the values are not the same. Apply the SCP to the OU.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an SCP that includes a list of acceptable VPC values and checks whether the value of the aws:SourceVpc condition key is in the list. In the same SCP check, define a list of acceptable IP address values and check whether the value of the aws:VpcSourceIp condition key is in the list. Deny access if either condition is false. Apply the SCP to each account in the organization.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an SCP that checks whether the values of the aws:EC2InstanceSourceVPC and aws:VpcSourceIp condition keys are the same. Deny access if the values are not the same. In the same SCP check, check whether the values of the aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivateIPv4 and aws:SourceVpc condition keys are the same. Deny access if the values are not the same. Apply the SCP to each account in the organization.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。B 使用 SCP 比较 aws:EC2InstanceSourceVPC 与 aws:SourceVpc，以及 aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivateIPv4 与 aws:VpcSourceIp；如果来源 VPC 或私有 IP 不匹配就拒绝访问，用于限制 EC2 实例凭证只能从其预期网络位置使用。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。B 使用 SCP 比较 aws:EC2InstanceSourceVPC 与 aws:SourceVpc，以及 aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivateIPv4 与 aws:VpcSourceIp；如果来源 VPC 或私有 IP 不匹配就拒绝访问，用于限制 EC2 实例凭证只能从其预期网络位置使用。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. B applies an SCP that compares aws:EC2InstanceSourceVPC with aws:SourceVpc and aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivateIPv4 with aws:VpcSourceIp, denying access when they do not match. This restricts where EC2 instance credentials can be used from.

questions.content: A company has a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances that run Linux in a single AWS account. The company is using an AWS Systems Manager Automation task across the EC2 instances. During the most recent patch cycle, several EC2 instances went into an error state because of insufficient available disk space. A DevOps engineer needs to ensure that the EC2 instances have sufficient available disk space during the patching process in the future. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Ensure that the Amazon CloudWatch agent is installed on all EC2 instances.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a cron job that is installed on each EC2 instance to periodically delete temporary files.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch log group for the EC2 instances. Configure a cron job that is installed on each EC2 instance to write the available disk space to a CloudWatch log stream for the relevant EC2 instance.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to monitor available disk space on all EC2 instances. Add the alarm as a safety control to the Systems Manager Automation task.

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to periodically check for sufficient available disk space on all EC2 instances by evaluating each EC2 instance's respective Amazon CloudWatch log stream.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、D。A 在所有 EC2 实例上安装 CloudWatch agent，以收集磁盘空间等系统级指标；D 创建 CloudWatch alarm 监控可用磁盘空间，并把该告警作为 Systems Manager Automation 任务的安全控制，确保空间不足时不继续补丁流程。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、D。A 在所有 EC2 实例上安装 CloudWatch agent，以收集磁盘空间等系统级指标；D 创建 CloudWatch alarm 监控可用磁盘空间，并把该告警作为 Systems Manager Automation 任务的安全控制，确保空间不足时不继续补丁流程。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A and D. A installs the CloudWatch agent on all EC2 instances so disk space metrics can be collected. D creates a CloudWatch alarm for available disk space and adds it as a safety control to the Systems Manager Automation task.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is building an application that uses an AWS Lambda function to query an Amazon Aurora MySQL DB cluster. The Lambda function performs only read queries. Amazon EventBridge events invoke the Lambda function. As more events invoke the Lambda function each second, the database's latency increases and the database's throughput decreases. The DevOps engineer needs to improve the performance of the application. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon RDS Proxy to create a proxy. Connect the proxy to the Aurora cluster reader endpoint. Set a maximum connections percentage on the proxy.

options.label: B
options.content: Implement database connection pooling inside the Lambda code. Set a maximum number of connections on the database connection pool.

options.label: C
options.content: Implement the database connection opening outside the Lambda event handler code.

options.label: D
options.content: Implement the database connection opening and closing inside the Lambda event handler code.

options.label: E
options.content: Connect to the proxy endpoint from the Lambda function.

options.label: F
options.content: Connect to the Aurora cluster endpoint from the Lambda function.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、C、E。A 创建 RDS Proxy 并连接到 Aurora reader endpoint，同时设置最大连接百分比；C 将数据库连接打开逻辑放在 Lambda handler 外部以复用连接；E 让 Lambda 连接代理端点，从而改善 Lambda 到 Aurora 的连接管理。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、C、E。A 创建 RDS Proxy 并连接到 Aurora reader endpoint，同时设置最大连接百分比；C 将数据库连接打开逻辑放在 Lambda handler 外部以复用连接；E 让 Lambda 连接代理端点，从而改善 Lambda 到 Aurora 的连接管理。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A, C, and E. A creates an RDS Proxy connected to the Aurora reader endpoint and caps connections, C opens the database connection outside the Lambda event handler for reuse, and E has the Lambda function connect through the proxy endpoint.

questions.content: A company has an AWS CloudFormation stack that is deployed in a single AWS account. The company has configured the stack to send event notifications to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. A DevOps engineer must implement an automated solution that applies a tag to the specific CloudFormation stack instance only after a successful stack update occurs. The DevOps engineer has created an AWS Lambda function that applies and updates this tag for the specific stack instance. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Run the AWS-UpdateCloudFormationStack AWS Systems ManagerAutomation runbook when Systems Manager detects an UPDATE_COMPLETE event for the instance status of the CloudFormation stack. Configure the runbook to invoke the Lambda function.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a custom AWS Config rule that produces a compliance change event if the CloudFormation stack has an UPDATE_COMPLETE instance status. Configure AWS Config to directly invoke the Lambda function to automatically remediate the change event.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that matches the UPDATE_COMPLETE event pattern for the instance status of the CloudFormation stack. Configure the rule to invoke the Lambda function.

options.label: D
options.content: Adjust the configuration of the CloudFormation stack to send notifications for only an UPDATE_COMPLETE instance status event to the SNS topic. Subscribe the Lambda function to the SNS topic.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。EventBridge 可以匹配 CloudFormation 的 UPDATE_COMPLETE 事件；C 创建匹配该实例状态事件模式的规则并调用 Lambda，让 Lambda 在堆栈更新完成时自动给 stack instances 添加所需标签。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。EventBridge 可以匹配 CloudFormation 的 UPDATE_COMPLETE 事件；C 创建匹配该实例状态事件模式的规则并调用 Lambda，让 Lambda 在堆栈更新完成时自动给 stack instances 添加所需标签。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. EventBridge can match CloudFormation UPDATE_COMPLETE events. C creates a rule for that stack instance status event pattern and invokes Lambda so the tag can be applied automatically when the stack update completes.

questions.content: A company deploys an application to two AWS Regions. The application creates and stores objects in an Amazon S3 bucket that is in the same Region as the application. Both deployments of the application need to have access to all the objects and their metadata from both Regions. The company has configured two-way replication between the S3 buckets and has enabled S3 Replication metrics on each S3 bucket. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution that retries the replication process if an object fails to replicate. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that listens to S3 event notifications for failed replication events. Create an AWS Lambda function that downloads the failed replication object and then runs a PutObject command for the object to the destination bucket. Configure the EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function to handle the object that failed to replicate.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure S3 event notifications to send failed replication notifications to the SQS queue. Create an AWS Lambda function that downloads the failed replication object and then runs a PutObject command for the object to the destination bucket. Configure the Lambda function to poll the queue for notifications to process.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that listens to S3 event notifications for failed replications. Create an AWS Lambda function that downloads the failed replication object and then runs a PutObject command for the object to the destination bucket.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that will use S3 batch operations to retry the replication on the existing object for a failed replication. Configure S3 event notifications to send failed replication notifications to the Lambda function.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。讨论说明 S3 Batch Replication 可复制之前存在、已复制过或复制失败的对象；D 用 S3 事件通知把失败复制事件发送给 Lambda，再由 Lambda 使用 S3 Batch Operations 对失败对象重试复制。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。讨论说明 S3 Batch Replication 可复制之前存在、已复制过或复制失败的对象；D 用 S3 事件通知把失败复制事件发送给 Lambda，再由 Lambda 使用 S3 Batch Operations 对失败对象重试复制。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. The discussion notes that S3 Batch Replication can handle objects that existed before replication, were already replicated, or failed replication. D sends failed replication notifications to Lambda, which uses S3 Batch Operations to retry replication for those objects.

questions.content: A company needs to implement failover for its application. The application includes an Amazon CloudFront distribution and a public Application Load Balancer (ALB) in an AWS Region. The company has configured the ALB as the default origin for the distribution. After some recent application outages, the company wants a zero-second RTO. The company deploys the application to a secondary Region in a warm standby configuration. A DevOps engineer needs to automate the failover of the application to the secondary Region so that HTTP GET requests meet the desired RTO. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a second CloudFront distribution that has the secondary ALB as the default origin. Create Amazon Route 53 alias records that have a failover policy and Evaluate Target Health set to Yes for both CloudFront distributions. Update the application to use the new record set.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new origin on the distribution for the secondary ALCreate a new origin group. Set the original ALB as the primary origin. Configure the origin group to fail over for HTTP 5xx status codes. Update the default behavior to use the origin group.

options.label: C
options.content: Create Amazon Route 53 alias records that have a failover policy and Evaluate Target Health set to Yes for both ALBs. Set the TTL of both records to 0. Update the distribution's origin to use the new record set.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CloudFront function that detects HTTP 5xx status codes. Configure the function to return a 307 Temporary Redirect error response to the secondary ALB if the function detects 5xx status codes. Update the distribution's default behavior to send origin responses to the function.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。讨论很简短，因此依据正确选项内容：B 在 CloudFront 分配中为辅助 ALB 创建新源，建立 origin group，将原 ALB 设为主源，并配置在 HTTP 5xx 时故障转移，最后让默认行为使用该 origin group。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。讨论很简短，因此依据正确选项内容：B 在 CloudFront 分配中为辅助 ALB 创建新源，建立 origin group，将原 ALB 设为主源，并配置在 HTTP 5xx 时故障转移，最后让默认行为使用该 origin group。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. The discussion is brief, so the correct option provides the basis: add a secondary ALB as a new CloudFront origin, create an origin group with the original ALB as primary, configure failover for HTTP 5xx status codes, and update the default behavior to use the origin group.

questions.content: A cloud team uses AWS Organizations and AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) to manage a company's AWS accounts. The company recently established a research team. The research team requires the ability to fully manage the resources in its account. The research team must not be able to create IAM users. The cloud team creates a Research Administrator permission set in IAM Identity Center for the research team. The permission set has the AdministratorAccess AWS managed policy attached. The cloud team must ensure that no one on the research team can create IAM users. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an IAM policy that denies the iam:CreateUser action. Attach the IAM policy to the Research Administrator permission set.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an IAM policy that allows all actions except the iam:CreateUser action. Use the IAM policy to set the permissions boundary for the Research Administrator permission set.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an SCP that denies the iam:CreateUser action. Attach the SCP to the research team's AWS account.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that deletes IAM users. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that detects the IAM CreateUser event. Configure the rule to invoke the Lambda function.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。C 创建拒绝 iam:CreateUser 操作的 SCP，并将其附加到研究团队的 AWS 账号；讨论也选择 C，说明这是阻止该账号中创建 IAM 用户的集中式 Organizations 控制。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。C 创建拒绝 iam:CreateUser 操作的 SCP，并将其附加到研究团队的 AWS 账号；讨论也选择 C，说明这是阻止该账号中创建 IAM 用户的集中式 Organizations 控制。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. C creates an SCP that denies iam:CreateUser and attaches it to the research team's AWS account, providing the centralized Organizations control needed to prevent IAM user creation there.

questions.content: A company releases a new application in a new AWS account. The application includes an AWS Lambda function that processes messages from an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queue. The Lambda function stores the results in an Amazon S3 bucket for further downstream processing. The Lambda function needs to process the messages within a specific period of time after the messages are published. The Lambda function has a batch size of 10 messages and takes a few seconds to process a batch of messages. As load increases on the application's first day of service, messages in the queue accumulate at a greater rate than the Lambda function can process the messages. Some messages miss the required processing timelines. The logs show that many messages in the queue have data that is not valid. The company needs to meet the timeline requirements for messages that have valid data. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Increase the Lambda function's batch size. Change the SQS standard queue to an SQS FIFO queue. Request a Lambda concurrency increase in the AWS Region.

options.label: B
options.content: Reduce the Lambda function's batch size. Increase the SQS message throughput quota. Request a Lambda concurrency increase in the AWS Region.

options.label: C
options.content: Increase the Lambda function's batch size. Configure S3 Transfer Acceleration on the S3 bucket. Configure an SQS dead- letter queue.

options.label: D
options.content: Keep the Lambda function's batch size the same. Configure the Lambda function to report failed batch items. Configure an SQS dead-letter queue.

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。D 保持 Lambda 批大小不变，但启用 failed batch item reporting，并配置 SQS dead-letter queue；讨论指出 ReportBatchItemFailures 可只让失败消息重新可见，而 DLQ 可避免失败消息不断回流形成 snowball anti-pattern。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。D 保持 Lambda 批大小不变，但启用 failed batch item reporting，并配置 SQS dead-letter queue；讨论指出 ReportBatchItemFailures 可只让失败消息重新可见，而 DLQ 可避免失败消息不断回流形成 snowball anti-pattern。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. D keeps the Lambda batch size unchanged, enables reporting of failed batch items, and configures an SQS dead-letter queue. The discussion notes that ReportBatchItemFailures makes only failed messages visible again, while a DLQ helps avoid a snowball anti-pattern.

questions.content: A company has an application that runs on AWS Lambda and sends logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. An Amazon Kinesis data stream is subscribed to the log groups in CloudWatch Logs. A single consumer Lambda function processes the logs from the data stream and stores the logs in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company's DevOps team has noticed high latency during the processing and ingestion of some logs. Which combination of steps will reduce the latency? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a data stream consumer with enhanced fan-out. Set the Lambda function that processes the logs as the consumer.

options.label: B
options.content: Increase the ParallelizationFactor setting in the Lambda event source mapping.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure reserved concurrency for the Lambda function that processes the logs.

options.label: D
options.content: Increase the batch size in the Kinesis data stream.

options.label: E
options.content: Turn off the ReportBatchItemFailures setting in the Lambda event source mapping.

options.label: F
options.content: Increase the number of shards in the Kinesis data stream.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、B、F。A 使用 Kinesis enhanced fan-out，让 Lambda 消费者获得每个分片专用吞吐量，避免与其他消费者争用。B 提高 Lambda 事件源映射的 ParallelizationFactor，增加并行处理能力。F 增加 Kinesis 分片数，因为流的总容量由分片容量相加而来。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、B、F。A 使用 Kinesis enhanced fan-out，让 Lambda 消费者获得每个分片专用吞吐量，避免与其他消费者争用。B 提高 Lambda 事件源映射的 ParallelizationFactor，增加并行处理能力。F 增加 Kinesis 分片数，因为流的总容量由分片容量相加而来。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, B, and F. A uses Kinesis enhanced fan-out so the Lambda consumer gets dedicated per-shard throughput and does not compete with other consumers. B increases the Lambda event source mapping ParallelizationFactor to process records in parallel. F increases the number of Kinesis shards, because stream capacity is the sum of shard capacity.

questions.content: A company operates sensitive workloads across the AWS accounts that are in the company's organization in AWS Organizations. The company uses an IP address range to delegate IP addresses for Amazon VPC CIDR blocks and all non-cloud hardware. The company needs a solution that prevents principals that are outside the company's IP address range from performing AWS actions in the organization's accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS Firewall Manager for the organization. Create an AWS Network Firewall policy that allows only source traffic from the company's IP address range. Set the policy scope to all accounts in the organization.

options.label: B
options.content: In Organizations, create an SCP that denies source IP addresses that are outside of the company's IP address range. Attach the SCP to the organization's root.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure Amazon GuardDuty for the organization. Create a GuardDuty trusted IP address list for the company's IP range. Activate the trusted IP list for the organization.

options.label: D
options.content: In Organizations, create an SCP that allows source IP addresses that are inside of the company's IP address range. Attach the SCP to the organization's root.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。通过在 AWS Organizations 中创建 SCP，拒绝公司 IP 范围之外的源 IP，并附加到组织根，可以在整个组织范围内强制该访问限制。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。通过在 AWS Organizations 中创建 SCP，拒绝公司 IP 范围之外的源 IP，并附加到组织根，可以在整个组织范围内强制该访问限制。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Creating an SCP in AWS Organizations that denies source IPs outside the company's range and attaching it to the organization root enforces the restriction across the organization.

questions.content: A company deploys an application in two AWS Regions. The application currently uses an Amazon S3 bucket in the primary Region to store data. A DevOps engineer needs to ensure that the application is highly available in both Regions. The DevOps engineer has created a new S3 bucket in the secondary Region. All existing and new objects must be in both S3 buckets. The application must fail over between the Regions with no data loss. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new IAM role that allows the Amazon S3 and S3 Batch Operations service principals to assume the role that has the necessary permissions for S3 replication.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new IAM role that allows the AWS Batch service principal to assume the role that has the necessary permissions for S3 replication.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) rule on the source S3 bucket. Configure the rule to use the IAM role for Amazon S3 to replicate to the target S3 bucket.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a two-way replication rule on the source S3 bucket. Configure the rule to use the IAM role for Amazon S3 to replicate to the target S3 bucket.

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS Batch job that has an AWS Fargate orchestration type. Configure the job to use the IAM role for AWS Batch. Specify a Bash command to use the AWS CLI to synchronize the contents of the source S3 bucket and the target S3 bucket

options.label: F
options.content: Create an operation in S3 Batch Operations to replicate the contents of the source S3 bucket to the target S3 bucket. Configure the operation to use the IAM role for Amazon S3.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、D、F。题目要求现有对象和新对象都存在于两个 S3 存储桶中，因此需要 A 创建可供 S3 和 S3 Batch Operations 使用的复制 IAM 角色，D 配置双向复制规则处理新对象，F 使用 S3 Batch Operations 复制源桶中的现有对象。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、D、F。题目要求现有对象和新对象都存在于两个 S3 存储桶中，因此需要 A 创建可供 S3 和 S3 Batch Operations 使用的复制 IAM 角色，D 配置双向复制规则处理新对象，F 使用 S3 Batch Operations 复制源桶中的现有对象。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, D, and F. Because all existing and new objects must be in both S3 buckets, A creates the replication IAM role for S3 and S3 Batch Operations, D configures two-way replication for new objects, and F uses S3 Batch Operations to replicate existing objects.

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage multiple AWS accounts. The company needs an automated process across all AWS accounts to isolate any compromised Amazon EC2 instances when the instances receive a specific tag. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy the CloudFormation stacks in all AWS accounts.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an SCP that has a Deny statement for the ec2:* action with a condition of "aws:RequestTag/isolation": false.

options.label: C
options.content: Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that creates an EC2 instance role that has no IAM policies attached. Configure the template to have a security group that has an explicit Deny rule on all traffic. Use the CloudFormation template to create an AWS Lambda function that attaches the IAM role to instances. Configure the Lambda function to add a network ACL. Set up an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function when a specific tag is applied to a compromised EC2 instance.

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that creates an EC2 instance role that has no IAM policies attached. Configure the template to have a security group that has no inbound rules or outbound rules. Use the CloudFormation template to create an AWS Lambda function that attaches the IAM role to instances. Configure the Lambda function to replace any existing security groups with the new security group. Set up an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function when a specific tag is applied to a compromised EC2 instance.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、E。A 使用 CloudFormation StackSets 在所有 AWS 账户中统一部署所需堆栈。E 通过无策略实例角色、无入站/出站规则的安全组和 EventBridge 触发的 Lambda，在实例被打上特定标签时隔离受影响的 EC2 实例。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、E。A 使用 CloudFormation StackSets 在所有 AWS 账户中统一部署所需堆栈。E 通过无策略实例角色、无入站/出站规则的安全组和 EventBridge 触发的 Lambda，在实例被打上特定标签时隔离受影响的 EC2 实例。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and E. A uses CloudFormation StackSets to deploy the required stacks across all AWS accounts. E isolates a tagged compromised EC2 instance by attaching a role with no policies and replacing security groups with one that has no inbound or outbound rules through an EventBridge-triggered Lambda function.

questions.content: A company manages multiple AWS accounts by using AWS Organizations with OUs for the different business divisions. The company is updating their corporate network to use new IP address ranges. The company has 10 Amazon S3 buckets in different AWS accounts. The S3 buckets store reports for the different divisions. The S3 bucket configurations allow only private corporate network IP addresses to access the S3 buckets. A DevOps engineer needs to change the range of IP addresses that have permission to access the contents of the S3 buckets. The DevOps engineer also needs to revoke the permissions of two OUs in the company. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new SCP that has two statements, one that allows access to the new range of IP addresses for all the S3 buckets and one that denies access to the old range of IP addresses for all the S3 buckets. Set a permissions boundary for the OrganizationAccountAccessRole role in the two OUs to deny access to the S3 buckets.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new SCP that has a statement that allows only the new range of IP addresses to access the S3 buckets. Create another SCP that denies access to the S3 buckets. Attach the second SCP to the two OUs.

options.label: C
options.content: On all the S3 buckets, configure resource-based policies that allow only the new range of IP addresses to access the S3 buckets. Create a new SCP that denies access to the S3 buckets. Attach the SCP to the two OUs.

options.label: D
options.content: On all the S3 buckets, configure resource-based policies that allow only the new range of IP addresses to access the S3 buckets. Set a permissions boundary for the OrganizationAccountAccessRole role in the two OUs to deny access to the S3 buckets.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。S3 存储桶资源策略只允许新的 IP 地址范围访问，从网络来源层面限制访问；同时对两个 OU 附加拒绝访问这些存储桶的 SCP，可以撤销这些 OU 对存储桶的访问。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。S3 存储桶资源策略只允许新的 IP 地址范围访问，从网络来源层面限制访问；同时对两个 OU 附加拒绝访问这些存储桶的 SCP，可以撤销这些 OU 对存储桶的访问。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. Resource-based policies on the S3 buckets allow access only from the new IP ranges, controlling access by network source. Attaching an SCP that denies access to the buckets to the two OUs revokes those OUs' access.

questions.content: A company has started using AWS across several teams. Each team has multiple accounts and unique security profiles. The company manages the accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations. Each account has its own configuration and security controls. The company's DevOps team wants to use preventive and detective controls to govern all accounts. The DevOps team needs to ensure the security of accounts now and in the future as the company creates new accounts in the organization. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Organizations to create OUs that have appropriate SCPs attached for each team. Place team accounts in the appropriate OUs to apply security controls. Create any new team accounts in the appropriate OUs.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Control Tower landing zone. Configure OUs and appropriate controls in AWS Control Tower for the existing teams. Configure trusted access for AWS Control Tower. Enroll the existing accounts in the appropriate OUs that match the appropriate security policies for each team. Use AWS Control Tower to provision any new accounts.

options.label: C
options.content: Create AWS CloudFormation stack sets in the organization's management account. Configure a stack set that deploys AWS Config with configuration rules and remediation actions for all controls to each account in the organization. Update the stack sets to deploy to new accounts as the accounts are created.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure AWS Config to manage the AWS Config rules across all AWS accounts in the organization. Deploy conformance packs that provide AWS Config rules and remediation actions across the organization.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。AWS Control Tower landing zone 可以通过 OU 和控制项为账户提供持续治理；启用可信访问并将现有账户纳入匹配安全策略的 OU 后，新账户也可通过 Account Factory 以同样治理方式创建。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。AWS Control Tower landing zone 可以通过 OU 和控制项为账户提供持续治理；启用可信访问并将现有账户纳入匹配安全策略的 OU 后，新账户也可通过 Account Factory 以同样治理方式创建。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. An AWS Control Tower landing zone provides ongoing governance through OUs and controls. After trusted access is configured and existing accounts are enrolled into OUs with the right security policies, new accounts can be provisioned consistently through Control Tower.

questions.content: A company uses an AWS CodeCommit repository to store its source code and corresponding unit tests. The company has configured an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that includes an AWS CodeBuild project that runs when code is merged to the main branch of the repository. The company wants the CodeBuild project to run the unit tests. If the unit tests pass, the CodeBuild project must tag the most recent commit. How should the company configure the CodeBuild project to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the CodeBuild project to use native Git to done the CodeCommit repository. Configure the project to run the unit tests. Configure the project to use native Git to create a tag and to push the Git tag to the repository if the code passes the unit tests.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure the CodeBuild projed to use native Git to done the CodeCommit repository. Configure the project to run the unit tests. Configure the project to use AWS CLI commands to create a new repository tag in the repository if the code passes the unit tests.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the CodeBuild project to use AWS CLI commands to copy the code from the CodeCommit repository. Configure the project to run the unit tests. Configure the project to use AWS CLI commands to create a new Git tag in the repository if the code passes the unit tests.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the CodeBuild project to use AWS CLI commands to copy the code from the CodeCommit repository. Configure the project to run the unit tests. Configure the project to use AWS CLI commands to create a new repository tag in the repository if the code passes the unit tests.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。CodeBuild 使用原生 Git 克隆 CodeCommit 仓库、运行单元测试，并在测试通过后用 Git 创建并推送标签，满足基于测试结果管理仓库标签的要求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。CodeBuild 使用原生 Git 克隆 CodeCommit 仓库、运行单元测试，并在测试通过后用 Git 创建并推送标签，满足基于测试结果管理仓库标签的要求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. CodeBuild can use native Git to clone the CodeCommit repository, run unit tests, and create and push a Git tag only when the tests pass, which matches the required workflow.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer manages a company's Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster. The cluster runs on several Amazon EC2 instances that are in an Auto Scaling group. The DevOps engineer must implement a solution that logs and reviews all stopped tasks for errors. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to capture task state changes. Send the event to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Use CloudWatch Logs Insights to investigate stopped tasks.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure tasks to write log data in the embedded metric format. Store the logs in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Monitor the ContainerInstanceCount metric for changes.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the EC2 instances to store logs in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create a CloudWatch Contributor Insights rule that uses the EC2 instance log data. Use the Contributor Insights rule to investigate stopped tasks.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an EC2 Auto Scaling lifecycle hook for the EC2_INSTANCE_TERMINATING scale-in event. Write the SystemEventLog file to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to query the log file for errors.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。EventBridge 捕获 ECS 任务状态变化并发送到 CloudWatch Logs 后，可以使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询和调查停止的任务及其错误信息。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。EventBridge 捕获 ECS 任务状态变化并发送到 CloudWatch Logs 后，可以使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询和调查停止的任务及其错误信息。
