explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Capturing ECS task state changes with EventBridge and sending them to CloudWatch Logs lets CloudWatch Logs Insights query and investigate stopped tasks and related errors.

questions.content: A company wants to deploy a workload on several hundred Amazon EC2 instances. The company will provision the EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group by using a launch template. The workload will pull files from an Amazon S3 bucket, process the data, and put the results into a different S3 bucket. The EC2 instances must have least-privilege permissions and must use temporary security credentials. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an IAM role that has the appropriate permissions for S3 buckets Add the IAM role to an instance profile.

options.label: B
options.content: Update the launch template to include the IAM instance profile.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM user that has the appropriate permissions for Amazon S3 Generate a secret key and token.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a trust anchor and profile Attach the IAM role to the profile.

options.label: E
options.content: Update the launch template Modify the user data to use the new secret key and token.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、B。A 创建具备 S3 访问权限的 IAM 角色并放入实例配置文件，使 EC2 实例无需长期凭证即可访问存储桶。B 更新启动模板以包含该实例配置文件，确保 Auto Scaling 组新启动的实例自动获得这些权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、B。A 创建具备 S3 访问权限的 IAM 角色并放入实例配置文件，使 EC2 实例无需长期凭证即可访问存储桶。B 更新启动模板以包含该实例配置文件，确保 Auto Scaling 组新启动的实例自动获得这些权限。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and B. A creates an IAM role with the needed S3 permissions and adds it to an instance profile, avoiding long-term credentials. B updates the launch template so instances launched by the Auto Scaling group automatically use that profile.

questions.content: A company is using AWS CodeDeploy to automate software deployment. The deployment must meet these requirements: • A number of instances must be available to serve traffic during the deployment. Traffic must be balanced across those instances, and the instances must automatically heal in the event of failure. • A new fleet of instances must be launched for deploying a new revision automatically, with no manual provisioning. • Traffic must be rerouted to the new environment to half of the new instances at a time. The deployment should succeed if traffic is rerouted to at least half of the instances: otherwise, it should fail. • Before routing traffic to the new fleet of instances, the temporary files generated during the deployment process must be deleted. • At the end of a successful deployment, the original instances in the deployment group must be deleted immediately to reduce costs. How can a DevOps engineer meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use an Application Load Balancer and an in-place deployment. Associate the Auto Scaling group with the deployment group. Use the Automatically copy Auto Scaling group option, and use CodeDeployDefault.OneAtAtime as the deployment configuration. Instruct AWS CodeDeploy to terminate the original instances in the deployment group, and use the AllowTraffic hook within appspec.yml to delete the temporary files.

options.label: B
options.content: Use an Application Load Balancer and a blue/green deployment. Associate the Auto Scaling group and Application Load Balancer target group with the deployment group. Use the Automatically copy Auto Scaling group option, create a custom deployment configuration with minimum healthy hosts defined as 50%, and assign the configuration to the deployment group. Instruct AWS CodeDeploy to terminate the original instances in the deployment group, and use the BeforeBlockTraffic hook within appspec.yml to delete the temporary files.

options.label: C
options.content: Use an Application Load Balancer and a blue/green deployment. Associate the Auto Scaling group and the Application Load Balancer target group with the deployment group. Use the Automatically copy Auto Scaling group option, and use CodeDeployDefault.HalfAtAtime as the deployment configuration. Instruct AWS CodeDeploy to terminate the original instances in the deployment group, and use the BeforeAllowTraffic hook within appspec.yml to delete the temporary files.

options.label: D
options.content: Use an Application Load Balancer and an in-place deployment. Associate the Auto Scaling group and Application Load Balancer target group with the deployment group. Use the Automatically copy Auto Scaling group option, and use CodeDeployDefault.AllatOnce as a deployment configuration. Instruct AWS CodeDeploy to terminate the original instances in the deployment group, and use the BlockTraffic hook within appspec.yml to delete the temporary files.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。该选项使用 ALB 和蓝/绿部署，自动复制 Auto Scaling 组，并使用 CodeDeployDefault.HalfAtATime 配置控制流量切换；BeforeAllowTraffic 钩子在允许流量前删除临时文件，原实例随后由 CodeDeploy 终止以控制成本。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。该选项使用 ALB 和蓝/绿部署，自动复制 Auto Scaling 组，并使用 CodeDeployDefault.HalfAtATime 配置控制流量切换；BeforeAllowTraffic 钩子在允许流量前删除临时文件，原实例随后由 CodeDeploy 终止以控制成本。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. It uses an ALB with a blue/green deployment, automatically copies the Auto Scaling group, and uses the CodeDeployDefault.HalfAtATime configuration for traffic shifting. The BeforeAllowTraffic hook removes temporary files before traffic is allowed, and CodeDeploy terminates the original instances to manage cost.

questions.content: A company needs to adopt a multi-account strategy to deploy its applications and the associated CI/CD infrastructure. The company has created an organization in AWS Organizations that has all features enabled. The company has configured AWS Control Tower and has set up a landing zone. The company needs to use AWS Control Tower controls (guardrails) in all AWS accounts in the organization. The company must create the accounts for a multi-environment application and must ensure that all accounts are configured to an initial baseline. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS Control Tower Account Factory Customization (AFC) blueprint that uses the baseline configuration. Use AWS Control Tower Account Factory to provision a dedicated AWS account for each environment and a CI/CD account by using the blueprint.

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS Control Tower Account Factory to provision a dedicated AWS account for each environment and a CI/CD account. Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to apply the baseline configuration to the new accounts.

options.label: C
options.content: Use Organizations to provision a multi-environment AWS account and a CI/CD account. In the Organizations management account, create an AWS Lambda function that assumes the Organizations access role to apply the baseline configuration to the new accounts.

options.label: D
options.content: Use Organizations to provision a dedicated AWS account for each environment, an audit account, and a CI/CD account. Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to apply the baseline configuration to the new accounts.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。AWS Control Tower Account Factory Customization blueprint 可以包含基线配置，并通过 Account Factory 为每个环境和 CI/CD 账户创建专用账户，从而减少手动配置并保持一致性。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。AWS Control Tower Account Factory Customization blueprint 可以包含基线配置，并通过 Account Factory 为每个环境和 CI/CD 账户创建专用账户，从而减少手动配置并保持一致性。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. An AWS Control Tower Account Factory Customization blueprint can include the baseline configuration and use Account Factory to provision dedicated accounts for each environment and for CI/CD, reducing manual work and keeping accounts consistent.

questions.content: A DevOps team has created a Custom Lambda rule in AWS Config. The rule monitors Amazon Elastic Container Repository (Amazon ECR) policy statements for ecr:* actions. When a noncompliant repository is detected, Amazon EventBridge uses Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to route the notification to a security team. When the custom AWS Config rule is evaluated, the AWS Lambda function fails to run. Which solution will resolve the issue?

options.label: A
options.content: Modify the Lambda function's resource policy to grant AWS Config permission to invoke the function.

options.label: B
options.content: Modify the SNS topic policy to include configuration changes for EventBridge to publish to the SNS topic.

options.label: C
options.content: Modify the Lambda function's execution role to include configuration changes for custom AWS Config rules.

options.label: D
options.content: Modify all the ECR repository policies to grant AWS Config access to the necessary ECR API actions.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。问题实际是 AWS Config 无法调用 Lambda；修改 Lambda 资源策略授予 AWS Config 调用函数的权限，可以解决该调用权限问题。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。问题实际是 AWS Config 无法调用 Lambda；修改 Lambda 资源策略授予 AWS Config 调用函数的权限，可以解决该调用权限问题。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The issue is that AWS Config cannot invoke the Lambda function. Updating the Lambda resource policy to grant AWS Config permission to invoke the function fixes that invocation permission problem.

questions.content: A developer is creating a proof of concept for a new software as a service (SaaS) application. The application is in a shared development AWS account that is part of an organization in AWS Organizations. The developer needs to create service-linked IAM roles for the AWS services that are being considered for the proof of concept. The solution needs to give the developer the ability to create and configure the service-linked roles only. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an IAM user for the developer in the organization's management account. Configure a cross-account role in the development account for the developer to use. Limit the scope of the cross-account role to common services.

options.label: B
options.content: Add the developer to an IAM group. Attach the PowerUserAccess managed policy to the IAM group. Enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) on the user account.

options.label: C
options.content: Add an SCP to the development account in Organizations. Configure the SCP with a Deny rule for iam:* to limit the developer's access.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an IAM role that has the necessary IAM access to allow the developer to create policies and roles. Create and attach a permissions boundary to the role. Grant the developer access to assume the role.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。创建可由开发人员代入的 IAM 角色，并用权限边界限制该角色，可以授予创建策略和角色所需权限，同时避免 PowerUserAccess 之类的过宽权限；SCP 只提供限制，不会授予权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。创建可由开发人员代入的 IAM 角色，并用权限边界限制该角色，可以授予创建策略和角色所需权限，同时避免 PowerUserAccess 之类的过宽权限；SCP 只提供限制，不会授予权限。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Creating an assumable IAM role with the needed permissions and attaching a permissions boundary gives the developer controlled ability to create policies and roles without broad PowerUserAccess. SCPs are guardrails and do not grant permissions.

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The company wants its monitoring system to receive an alert when a root user logs in. The company also needs a dashboard to display any log activity that the root user generates. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Enable AWS Config with a multi-account aggregator. Configure log forwarding to Amazon CloudWatch Logs.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon QuickSight dashboard that uses an Amazon CloudWatch Logs query.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs metric filter to match root user login events. Configure a CloudWatch alarm and an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send alerts to the company's monitoring system.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs subscription filter to match root user login events. Configure the filter to forward events to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Configure the SNS topic to send alerts to the company's monitoring system.

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS CloudTrail organization trail. Configure the organization trail to send events to Amazon CloudWatch Logs.

options.label: F
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard that uses a CloudWatch Logs Insights query.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C、E、F。E 创建组织级 CloudTrail 并把事件发送到 CloudWatch Logs；C 用 CloudWatch Logs metric filter 匹配 root 用户登录事件并通过告警和 SNS 通知监控系统；F 使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询构建仪表板。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C、E、F。E 创建组织级 CloudTrail 并把事件发送到 CloudWatch Logs；C 用 CloudWatch Logs metric filter 匹配 root 用户登录事件并通过告警和 SNS 通知监控系统；F 使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询构建仪表板。
explanations.en: The correct answers are C, E, and F. E creates an organization CloudTrail trail and sends events to CloudWatch Logs. C adds a metric filter for root user login events with an alarm and SNS notifications. F uses a CloudWatch Logs Insights query for a CloudWatch dashboard.

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. A DevOps engineer must ensure that all users who access the AWS Management Console are authenticated through the company's corporate identity provider (IdP). Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon GuardDuty with a delegated administrator account Use GuardDuty to enforce denial of IAM user logins.

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS IAM Identity Center to configure identity federation with SAML 2.0.

options.label: C
options.content: Create a permissions boundary in AWS IAM Identity Center to deny password logins for IAM users.

options.label: D
options.content: Create IAM groups in the Organizations management account to apply consistent permissions for all IAM users.

options.label: E
options.content: Create an SCP in Organizations to deny password creation for IAM users.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、E。B 使用 IAM Identity Center 通过 SAML 2.0 与公司 IdP 联合身份验证，使用户通过企业身份源登录。E 通过 Organizations 中的 SCP 拒绝为 IAM 用户创建密码，减少 IAM 用户控制台密码登录的可能。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、E。B 使用 IAM Identity Center 通过 SAML 2.0 与公司 IdP 联合身份验证，使用户通过企业身份源登录。E 通过 Organizations 中的 SCP 拒绝为 IAM 用户创建密码，减少 IAM 用户控制台密码登录的可能。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and E. B configures IAM Identity Center for SAML 2.0 federation with the corporate IdP so users authenticate through the company identity source. E uses an Organizations SCP to deny password creation for IAM users, reducing native IAM console password logins.

questions.content: A company has deployed a new platform that runs on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). The new platform hosts web applications that users frequently update. The application developers build the Docker images for the applications and deploy the Docker images manually to the platform. The platform usage has increased to more than 500 users every day. Frequent updates, building the updated Docker images for the applications, and deploying the Docker images on the platform manually have all become difficult to manage. The company needs to receive an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) notification if Docker image scanning returns any HIGH or CRITICAL findings for operating system or programming language package vulnerabilities. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository to store the Dockerfile and Kubernetes deployment files. Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline. Use an Amazon S3 event to invoke the pipeline when a newer version of the Dockerfile is committed. Add a step to the pipeline to initiate the AWS CodeBuild project.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository to store the Dockerfile and Kubernetes deployment files. Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline. Use an Amazon EventBridge event to invoke the pipeline when a newer version of the Dockerfile is committed. Add a step to the pipeline to initiate the AWS CodeBuild project.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild project that builds the Docker images and stores the Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. Turn on basic scanning for the ECR repository. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that monitors Amazon GuardDuty events. Configure the EventBridge rule to send an event to an SNS topic when the finding-severity-counts parameter is more than 0 at a CRITICAL or HIGH level.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild project that builds the Docker images and stores the Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. Turn on enhanced scanning for the ECR repository. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that monitors ECR image scan events. Configure the EventBridge rule to send an event to an SNS topic when the finding-severity-counts parameter is more than 0 at a CRITICAL or HIGH level.

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild project that scans the Dockerfile. Configure the project to build the Docker images and store the Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository if the scan is successful. Configure an SNS topic to provide notification if the scan returns any vulnerabilities.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、D。B 在 CodeCommit 中存放 Dockerfile 和 Kubernetes 部署文件，并用 EventBridge 在提交新版本时触发 CodePipeline 和 CodeBuild。D 由 CodeBuild 构建镜像并推送到 ECR，启用 enhanced scanning，并在 HIGH 或 CRITICAL 漏洞扫描事件出现时通过 EventBridge 和 SNS 通知。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、D。B 在 CodeCommit 中存放 Dockerfile 和 Kubernetes 部署文件，并用 EventBridge 在提交新版本时触发 CodePipeline 和 CodeBuild。D 由 CodeBuild 构建镜像并推送到 ECR，启用 enhanced scanning，并在 HIGH 或 CRITICAL 漏洞扫描事件出现时通过 EventBridge 和 SNS 通知。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and D. B stores the Dockerfile and Kubernetes deployment files in CodeCommit and uses EventBridge to trigger CodePipeline and CodeBuild on new commits. D builds and pushes images to ECR, enables enhanced scanning, and uses EventBridge plus SNS to notify on HIGH or CRITICAL findings.

questions.content: A company groups its AWS accounts in OUs in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company has deployed a set of Amazon API Gateway APIs in one of the Organizations accounts. The APIs are bound to the account's VPC and have no existing authentication mechanism. Only principals in a specific OU can have permissions to invoke the APIs. The company applies the following policy to the API Gateway interface VPC endpoint: The company also updates the API Gateway resource policies to deny invocations that do not come through the interface VPC endpoint. After the updates, the following error message appears during attempts to use the interface VPC endpoint URL to invoke an API: "User: anonymous is not authorized." Which combination of steps will solve this problem? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Enable IAM authentication on all API methods by setting AWS JAM as the authorization method.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a token-based AWS Lambda authorizer that passes the caller's identity in a bearer token.

options.label: C
options.content: Create a request parameter-based AWS Lambda authorizer that passes the caller's identity in a combination of headers, query string parameters, stage variables, and $cortext variables.

options.label: D
options.content: Use Amazon Cognito user pools as the authorizer to control access to the API.

options.label: E
options.content: Verify the identity of the requester by using Signature Version 4 to sign client requests by using AWS credentials.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、E。A 将所有 API 方法的授权方式设置为 AWS IAM，阻止匿名访问。E 要求客户端使用 AWS 凭证和 Signature Version 4 对请求签名，从而验证请求者身份并按 IAM 策略授权。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、E。A 将所有 API 方法的授权方式设置为 AWS IAM，阻止匿名访问。E 要求客户端使用 AWS 凭证和 Signature Version 4 对请求签名，从而验证请求者身份并按 IAM 策略授权。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and E. A sets AWS IAM as the authorization method for all API methods, preventing anonymous access. E requires clients to sign requests with AWS credentials using Signature Version 4 so the requester identity can be verified and authorized by IAM policy.

questions.content: A company wants to decrease the time it takes to develop new features. The company uses AWS CodeBuild and AWS CodeDeploy to build and deploy its applications. The company uses AWS CodePipeline to deploy each microservice with its own CI/CD pipeline. The company needs more visibility into the average time between the release of new features and the average time to recover after a failed deployment. Which solution will provide this visibility with the LEAST configuration effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Program an AWS Lambda function that creates Amazon CloudWatch custom metrics with information about successful runs and failed runs for each pipeline. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function every 5 minutes. Use the metrics to build a CloudWatch dashboard.

options.label: B
options.content: Program an AWS Lambda function that creates Amazon CloudWatch custom metrics with information about successful runs and failed runs for each pipeline. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function after every successful run and after every failed run. Use the metrics to build a CloudWatch dashboard.

options.label: C
options.content: Program an AWS Lambda function that writes information about successful runs and failed runs to Amazon DynamoDB. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function after every successful run and after every failed run. Build an Amazon QuickSight dashboard to show the information from DynamoDB.

options.label: D
options.content: Program an AWS Lambda function that writes information about successful runs and failed runs to Amazon DynamoDB. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function every 5 minutes. Build an Amazon QuickSight dashboard to show the information from DynamoDB.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。EventBridge 在每次管道成功或失败后调用 Lambda，Lambda 发布包含每条管道成功和失败运行情况的 CloudWatch 自定义指标，再用这些指标构建 CloudWatch dashboard。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。EventBridge 在每次管道成功或失败后调用 Lambda，Lambda 发布包含每条管道成功和失败运行情况的 CloudWatch 自定义指标，再用这些指标构建 CloudWatch dashboard。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. EventBridge invokes a Lambda function after each successful or failed pipeline run. The Lambda function publishes CloudWatch custom metrics for successful and failed runs per pipeline, and those metrics are used for the CloudWatch dashboard.

questions.content: A company has developed a static website hosted on an Amazon S3 bucket. The website is deployed using AWS CloudFormation. The CloudFormation template defines an S3 bucket and a custom resource that copies content into the bucket from a source location. The company has decided that it needs to move the website to a new location, so the existing CloudFormation stack must be deleted and re-created. However, CloudFormation reports that the stack could not be deleted cleanly. What is the MOST likely cause and how can the DevOps engineer mitigate this problem for this and future versions of the website?

options.label: A
options.content: Deletion has failed because the S3 bucket has an active website configuration. Modify the CloudFormation template to remove the WebsiteConfiguration property from the S3 bucket resource.

options.label: B
options.content: Deletion has failed because the S3 bucket is not empty. Modify the custom resource's AWS Lambda function code to recursively empty the bucket when RequestType is Delete.

options.label: C
options.content: Deletion has failed because the custom resource does not define a deletion policy. Add a DeletionPolicy property to the custom resource definition with a value of RemoveOnDeletion.

options.label: D
options.content: Deletion has failed because the S3 bucket is not empty. Modify the S3 bucket resource in the CloudFormation template to add a DeletionPolicy property with a value of Empty.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。S3 存储桶必须为空才能删除；如果 CloudFormation 删除失败是因为桶中仍有对象，则应修改自定义资源 Lambda，在 RequestType 为 Delete 时递归清空存储桶。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。S3 存储桶必须为空才能删除；如果 CloudFormation 删除失败是因为桶中仍有对象，则应修改自定义资源 Lambda，在 RequestType 为 Delete 时递归清空存储桶。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. An S3 bucket must be empty before it can be deleted. If CloudFormation deletion fails because the bucket still has contents, the custom resource Lambda should recursively empty the bucket when RequestType is Delete.

questions.content: A company uses Amazon EC2 as its primary compute platform. A DevOps team wants to audit the company's EC2 instances to check whether any prohibited applications have been installed on the EC2 instances. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS Systems Manager on each instance. Use AWS Systems Manager Inventory. Use Systems Manager resource data sync to synchronize and store findings in an Amazon S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function that runs when new objects are added to the S3 bucket. Configure the Lambda function to identify prohibited applications.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure AWS Systems Manager on each instance. Use Systems Manager Inventory Create AWS Config rules that monitor changes from Systems Manager Inventory to identify prohibited applications.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure AWS Systems Manager on each instance. Use Systems Manager Inventory. Filter a trail in AWS CloudTrail for Systems Manager Inventory events to identify prohibited applications.

options.label: D
options.content: Designate Amazon CloudWatch Logs as the log destination for all application instances. Run an automated script across all instances to create an inventory of installed applications. Configure the script to forward the results to CloudWatch Logs. Create a CloudWatch alarm that uses filter patterns to search log data to identify prohibited applications.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。在每个实例上配置 AWS Systems Manager 并使用 Systems Manager Inventory，可以收集已安装软件信息；再用 AWS Config 规则监控 Inventory 变化，即可识别被禁止的应用程序。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。在每个实例上配置 AWS Systems Manager 并使用 Systems Manager Inventory，可以收集已安装软件信息；再用 AWS Config 规则监控 Inventory 变化，即可识别被禁止的应用程序。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Configuring AWS Systems Manager on each instance and using Systems Manager Inventory collects installed software data. AWS Config rules can then monitor Inventory changes to identify prohibited applications.

questions.content: A company has an event-driven JavaScript application. The application uses decoupled AWS managed services that publish, consume, and route events. During application testing, events are not delivered to the target that is specified by an Amazon EventBridge rule. A DevOps team must provide application testers with additional functionality to view, troubleshoot, and prevent the loss of events without redeployment of the application. Which combination of steps should the DevOps team take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Launch AWS Device Farm with a standard test environment and project to run a specific build of the application.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Enable AWS CloudTrail. Create a CloudTrail trail that specifies the S3 bucket as the storage location.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the EventBridge rule to use an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queue as a dead-letter queue.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the EventBridge rule to use an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue as a dead-letter queue.

options.label: E
options.content: Create a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs Specify the log group as an additional target of the EventBridge rule.

options.label: F
options.content: Update the application code base to use the AWS X-Ray SDK tracing feature to instrument the code with support for the X- Amzn-Trace-Id header.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、C、E。B 启用 CloudTrail 并将日志写入 S3 以保留事件记录。C 为 EventBridge 规则配置 SQS 标准队列作为死信队列，帮助捕获投递失败。E 将 CloudWatch Logs 日志组作为额外目标，便于查看事件。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、C、E。B 启用 CloudTrail 并将日志写入 S3 以保留事件记录。C 为 EventBridge 规则配置 SQS 标准队列作为死信队列，帮助捕获投递失败。E 将 CloudWatch Logs 日志组作为额外目标，便于查看事件。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B, C, and E. B enables CloudTrail and stores the trail in S3 to retain event records. C configures an SQS standard queue as the EventBridge rule dead-letter queue to capture delivery failures. E adds a CloudWatch Logs log group as another target for event visibility.

questions.content: A company is migrating its container-based workloads to an AWS Organizations multi-account environment. The environment consists of application workload accounts that the company uses to deploy and run the containerized workloads. The company has also provisioned a shared services account for shared workloads in the organization. The company must follow strict compliance regulations. All container images must receive security scanning before they are deployed to any environment. Images can be consumed by downstream deployment mechanisms after the images pass a scan with no critical vulnerabilities. Pre-scan and post-scan images must be isolated from one another so that a deployment can never use pre-scan images. A DevOps engineer needs to create a strategy to centralize this process. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST administrative overhead? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repositories in the shared services account: one repository for each pre-scan image and one repository for each post-scan image. Configure Amazon ECR image scanning to run on new image pushes to the pre-scan repositories. Use resource-based policies to grant the organization write access to the pre-scan repositories and read access to the post-scan repositories.

options.label: B
options.content: Create pre-scan Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repositories in each account that publishes container images. Create repositories for post-scan images in the shared services account. Configure Amazon ECR image scanning to run on new image pushes to the pre-scan repositories. Use resource-based policies to grant the organization read access to the post-scan repositories.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure image replication for each image from the image's pre-scan repository to the image's post-scan repository.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline for each pre-scan repository. Create a source stage that runs when new images are pushed to the pre-scan repositories. Create a stage that uses AWS CodeBuild as the action provider. Write a buildspec.yaml definition that determines the image scanning status and pushes images without critical vulnerabilities to the post-scan repositories.

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to image scanning completed events and invokes the Lambda function. Write function code that determines the image scanning status and pushes images without critical vulnerabilities to the post-scan repositories.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、E。A 在共享服务账户中创建预扫描和后扫描 ECR 仓库，启用推送扫描，并用资源策略授予组织写入预扫描仓库和读取后扫描仓库的权限。E 用一个 Lambda 响应扫描完成事件，只把没有 critical 漏洞的镜像推送到后扫描仓库，管理开销较低。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、E。A 在共享服务账户中创建预扫描和后扫描 ECR 仓库，启用推送扫描，并用资源策略授予组织写入预扫描仓库和读取后扫描仓库的权限。E 用一个 Lambda 响应扫描完成事件，只把没有 critical 漏洞的镜像推送到后扫描仓库，管理开销较低。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and E. A creates pre-scan and post-scan ECR repositories in the shared services account, enables scanning on push, and uses resource policies for organization write and read access. E uses one Lambda function on scan-completed events to move only images without critical vulnerabilities to the post-scan repositories, reducing administrative overhead.

questions.content: A company uses an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster to deploy its web applications on containers. The web applications contain confidential data that cannot be decrypted without specific credentials. A DevOps engineer has stored the credentials in AWS Secrets Manager. The secrets are encrypted by an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. A Kubernetes service account for a third-party tool makes the secrets available to the applications. The service account assumes an IAM role that the company created to access the secrets. The service account receives an Access Denied (403 Forbidden) error while trying to retrieve the secrets from Secrets Manager. What is the root cause of this issue?

options.label: A
options.content: The IAM role that is attached to the EKS cluster does not have access to retrieve the secrets from Secrets Manager.

options.label: B
options.content: The key policy for the customer managed key does not allow the Kubernetes service account IAM role to use the key.

options.label: C
options.content: The key policy for the customer managed key does not allow the EKS cluster IAM role to use the key.

options.label: D
options.content: The IAM role that is assumed by the Kubernetes service account does not have permission to access the EKS cluster.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。问题与客户托管 KMS 密钥策略有关：如果密钥策略不允许 Kubernetes service account 的 IAM 角色使用该密钥，相关工作负载就无法使用该密钥进行所需操作。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。问题与客户托管 KMS 密钥策略有关：如果密钥策略不允许 Kubernetes service account 的 IAM 角色使用该密钥，相关工作负载就无法使用该密钥进行所需操作。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The issue is with the customer managed KMS key policy: if it does not allow the Kubernetes service account IAM role to use the key, the workload cannot perform the required key operations.

questions.content: A company is migrating its product development teams from an on-premises data center to a hybrid environment. The new environment will add four AWS Regions and will give the developers the ability to use the Region that is geographically closest to them. All the development teams use a shared set of Linux applications. The on-premises data center stores the applications on a NetApp ONTAP storage device. The storage volume is mounted read-only on the development on-premises VMs. The company updates the applications on the shared volume once a week. A DevOps engineer needs to replicate the data to all the new Regions. The DevOps engineer must ensure that the data is always up to date with deduplication. The data also must not be dependent on the availability of the on-premises storage device. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 File Gateway in the on-premises data center. Create S3 buckets in each Region. Set up a cron job to copy the data from the storage device to the S3 File Gateway. Set up S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) to the S3 buckets in each Region.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon FSx File Gateway in one Region. Create file servers in Amazon FSx for Windows File Server in each Region. Set up a cron job to copy the data from the storage device to the FSx File Gateway.

options.label: C
options.content: Create Multi-AZ Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP instances and volumes in each Region. Configure a scheduled SnapMirror relationship between the on-premises storage device and the FSx for ONTAP instances.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system in each Region. Deploy an AWS DataSync agent in the on- premises data center. Configure a schedule for DataSync to copy the data to Amazon EFS daily.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。该选项在每个 Region 创建 Multi-AZ Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 实例和卷，并配置从本地存储设备到 FSx for ONTAP 的计划 SnapMirror 关系，用于复制数据到各区域的 ONTAP 存储。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。该选项在每个 Region 创建 Multi-AZ Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 实例和卷，并配置从本地存储设备到 FSx for ONTAP 的计划 SnapMirror 关系，用于复制数据到各区域的 ONTAP 存储。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. This option creates Multi-AZ Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP instances and volumes in each Region and configures scheduled SnapMirror relationships from the on-premises storage device to FSx for ONTAP to replicate the data.

questions.content: A company has an application that stores data that includes personally identifiable information (PII) in an Amazon S3 bucket. All data is encrypted with AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed keys. All AWS resources are deployed from an AWS CloudFormation template. A DevOps engineer needs to set up a development environment for the application in a different AWS account. The data in the development environment's S3 bucket needs to be updated once a week from the production environment's S3 bucket. The company must not move PII from the production environment without anonymizing the PII first. The data in each environment must be encrypted with different KMS customer managed keys. Which combination of steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Activate Amazon Macie on the S3 bucket in the production account. Create an AWS Step Functions state machine to initiate a discovery job and redact all PII before copying files to the S3 bucket in the development account. Give the state machine tasks decrypt permissions on the KMS key in the production account. Give the state machine tasks encrypt permissions on the KMS key in the development account.

options.label: B
options.content: Set up S3 replication between the production S3 bucket and the development S3 bucket. Activate Amazon Macie on the development S3 bucket. Create an AWS Step Functions state machine to initiate a discovery job and redact all PII as the files are copied to the development S3 bucket. Give the state machine tasks encrypt and decrypt permissions on the KMS key in the development account.

options.label: C
options.content: Set up an S3 Batch Operations job to copy files from the production S3 bucket to the development S3 bucket. In the development account, configure an AWS Lambda function to redact ail PII. Configure S3 Object Lambda to use the Lambda function for S3 GET requests. Give the Lambda function's IAM role encrypt and decrypt permissions on the KMS key in the development account.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a development environment from the CloudFormation template in the development account. Schedule an Amazon EventBridge rule to start the AWS Step Functions state machine once a week.

options.label: E
options.content: Create a development environment from the CloudFormation template in the development account. Schedule a cron job on an Amazon EC2 instance to run once a week to start the S3 Batch Operations job.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、D。A 使用 Macie 发现生产 S3 存储桶中的 PII，并由 Step Functions 编排脱敏后再复制到开发账户，同时配置跨账户 KMS 解密和加密权限。D 用 CloudFormation 创建开发环境，并通过 EventBridge 每周触发该状态机，实现定期自动更新。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、D。A 使用 Macie 发现生产 S3 存储桶中的 PII，并由 Step Functions 编排脱敏后再复制到开发账户，同时配置跨账户 KMS 解密和加密权限。D 用 CloudFormation 创建开发环境，并通过 EventBridge 每周触发该状态机，实现定期自动更新。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and D. A uses Macie to discover PII in the production S3 bucket and Step Functions to redact it before copying data to the development account, with the needed KMS decrypt and encrypt permissions. D creates the development environment from CloudFormation and schedules EventBridge to run the workflow weekly.

questions.content: A company uses an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster to host its machine learning (ML) application. As the ML model and the container image size grow, the time that new pods take to start up has increased to several minutes. A DevOps engineer needs to reduce the startup time to seconds. The solution must also reduce the startup time to seconds when the pod runs on nodes that were recently added to the cluster. The DevOps engineer creates an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes an automation in AWS Systems Manager. The automation prefetches the container images from an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository when new images are pushed to the repository. The DevOps engineer also configures tags to be applied to the cluster and the node groups. What should the DevOps engineer do next to meet the requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows EventBridge to use Systems Manager to run commands in the EKS cluster's control plane nodes. Create a Systems Manager State Manager association that uses the control plane nodes' tags to prefetch corresponding container images.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows EventBridge to use Systems Manager to run commands in the EKS cluster's nodes. Create a Systems Manager State Manager association that uses the nodes' machine size to prefetch corresponding container images.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows EventBridge to use Systems Manager to run commands in the EKS cluster's nodes. Create a Systems Manager State Manager association that uses the nodes' tags to prefetch corresponding container images.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows EventBridge to use Systems Manager to run commands in the EKS cluster's control plane nodes. Create a Systems Manager State Manager association that uses the nodes' tags to prefetch corresponding container images.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。容器镜像需要预取到运行应用容器的 EKS 节点，而不是控制平面。C 使用带标签目标的 Systems Manager State Manager association，并让 EventBridge 通过 Systems Manager 在节点上运行命令，按节点标签预取对应镜像。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。容器镜像需要预取到运行应用容器的 EKS 节点，而不是控制平面。C 使用带标签目标的 Systems Manager State Manager association，并让 EventBridge 通过 Systems Manager 在节点上运行命令，按节点标签预取对应镜像。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. Container images need to be prefetched on the EKS nodes that run application containers, not on the control plane. C uses a Systems Manager State Manager association targeted by node tags, with EventBridge allowed to use Systems Manager to run the commands.

questions.content: A company's application has an API that retrieves workload metrics. The company needs to audit, analyze, and visualize these metrics from the application to detect issues at scale. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge schedule to invoke an AWS Lambda function that calls the API to retrieve workload metrics. Store the workload metric data in an Amazon S3 bucket.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge schedule to invoke an AWS Lambda function that calls the API to retrieve workload metrics. Store the workload metric data in an Amazon DynamoDB table that has a DynamoDB stream enabled.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Glue crawler to catalog the workload metric data in the Amazon S3 bucket. Create views in Amazon Athena for the cataloged data.

options.label: D
options.content: Connect an AWS Glue crawler to the Amazon DynamoDB stream to catalog the workload metric data. Create views in Amazon Athena for the cataloged data.

options.label: E
options.content: Create Amazon QuickSight datasets from the Amazon Athena views. Create a QuickSight analysis to visualize the workload metric data as a dashboard.

options.label: F
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard that has custom widgets that invoke AWS Lambda functions. Configure the Lambda functions to query the workload metrics data from the Amazon Athena views.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、C、E。A 用 EventBridge 定时调用 Lambda 从 API 拉取工作负载指标并存入 S3。C 用 Glue crawler 编目 S3 数据并在 Athena 中创建视图。E 从 Athena 视图创建 QuickSight 数据集和分析，用仪表板可视化指标。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、C、E。A 用 EventBridge 定时调用 Lambda 从 API 拉取工作负载指标并存入 S3。C 用 Glue crawler 编目 S3 数据并在 Athena 中创建视图。E 从 Athena 视图创建 QuickSight 数据集和分析，用仪表板可视化指标。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, C, and E. A schedules Lambda with EventBridge to retrieve workload metrics from the API and store them in S3. C catalogs the S3 data with a Glue crawler and creates Athena views. E creates QuickSight datasets and analysis from the Athena views to visualize the metrics.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is building the infrastructure for an application. The application needs to run on an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster that includes Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances need to use an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system as a storage backend. The Amazon EFS Container Storage Interface (CSI) driver is installed on the EKS cluster. When the DevOps engineer starts the application, the EC2 instances do not mount the EFS file system. Which solutions will fix the problem? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Switch the EKS nodes from Amazon EC2 to AWS Fargate.

options.label: B
options.content: Add an inbound rule to the EFS file system's security group to allow NFS traffic from the EKS cluster.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM role that allows the Amazon EFS CSI driver to interact with the file system

options.label: D
options.content: Set up AWS DataSync to configure file transfer between the EFS file system and the EKS nodes.

options.label: E
options.content: Create a mount target for the EFS file system in the subnet of the EKS nodes.

options.label: F
options.content: Disable encryption or the EFS file system.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、C、E。B 允许 EFS 安全组接收来自 EKS 集群的 NFS 流量。C 为 EFS CSI driver 创建可操作文件系统的 IAM 角色。E 在 EKS 节点所在子网创建 EFS mount target，提供网络连接路径。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、C、E。B 允许 EFS 安全组接收来自 EKS 集群的 NFS 流量。C 为 EFS CSI driver 创建可操作文件系统的 IAM 角色。E 在 EKS 节点所在子网创建 EFS mount target，提供网络连接路径。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B, C, and E. B allows NFS traffic from the EKS cluster to the EFS security group. C creates an IAM role so the EFS CSI driver can interact with the file system. E creates a mount target in the subnet where the EKS nodes run, providing network connectivity.

questions.content: A company deploys an application on on-premises devices in the company's on-premises data center. The company uses an AWS Direct Connect connection between the data center and the company's AWS account. During initial setup of the on-premises devices and during application updates, the application needs to retrieve configuration files from an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. All traffic from the on-premises devices to Amazon EFS must remain private and encrypted. The on-premises devices must follow the principle of least privilege for AWS access. The company's DevOps team needs the ability to revoke access from a single device without affecting the access of the other devices. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an IAM user that has an access key and a secret key for each device. Attach the AmazonElasticFileSystemFullAccess policy to all IAM users. Configure the AWS CLI on the on-premises devices to use the IAM user's access key and secret key.

options.label: B
options.content: Generate certificates for each on-premises device in AWS Private Certificate Authority. Create a trust anchor in IAM Roles Anywhere that references an AWS Private CA. Create an IAM role that trust IAM Roles Anywhere. Attach the AmazonElasticFileSystemClientReadWriteAccess to the role. Create an IAM Roles Anywhere profile for the IAM role. Configure the AWS CLI on the on-premises devices to use the aws_signing_helper command to obtain credentials.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM user that has an access key and a secret key for all devices. Attach the AmazonElasticFileSystemClientReadWriteAccess policy to the IAM user. Configure the AWS CLI on the on-premises devices to use the IAM user's access key and secret key.

options.label: D
options.content: Use the amazon-efs-utils package to mount the EFS file system.

options.label: E
options.content: Use the native Linux NFS client to mount the EFS file system.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、D。B 使用 AWS Private CA、IAM Roles Anywhere trust anchor、角色和 profile，让本地设备通过 aws_signing_helper 获取访问 EFS 所需的临时凭证。D 使用 amazon-efs-utils 挂载 EFS 文件系统。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、D。B 使用 AWS Private CA、IAM Roles Anywhere trust anchor、角色和 profile，让本地设备通过 aws_signing_helper 获取访问 EFS 所需的临时凭证。D 使用 amazon-efs-utils 挂载 EFS 文件系统。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and D. B uses AWS Private CA, an IAM Roles Anywhere trust anchor, role, and profile so on-premises devices can obtain temporary credentials with aws_signing_helper. D uses the amazon-efs-utils package to mount the EFS file system.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is setting up an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) blue/green deployment for an application by using AWS CodeDeploy and AWS CloudFormation. During the deployment window, the application must be highly available and CodeDeploy must shift 10% of traffic to a new version of the application every minute until all traffic is shifted. Which configuration should the DevOps engineer add in the CloudFormation template to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Add an AppSpec file with the CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinearl OPercentEveryl Minutes deployment configuration.

options.label: B
options.content: Add the AWS::CodeDeployBlueGreen transform and the AWS::CodeDeploy::BlueGreen hook parameter with the CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinear10PercentEvery1Minutes deployment configuration.

options.label: C
options.content: Add an AppSpec file with the ECSCanary10Percent5Minutes deployment configuration.

options.label: D
options.content: Add the AWS::CodeDeployBlueGreen transform and the AWS::CodeDepioy::BlueGreen hook parameter with the ECSCanary10Percent5Minutes deployment configuration.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。在 CloudFormation 中添加 AWS::CodeDeployBlueGreen transform 和 AWS::CodeDeploy::BlueGreen hook，并使用 CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinear10PercentEvery1Minutes 部署配置，可以为 ECS 实现指定的蓝/绿线性部署。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。在 CloudFormation 中添加 AWS::CodeDeployBlueGreen transform 和 AWS::CodeDeploy::BlueGreen hook，并使用 CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinear10PercentEvery1Minutes 部署配置，可以为 ECS 实现指定的蓝/绿线性部署。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Adding the AWS::CodeDeployBlueGreen transform and AWS::CodeDeploy::BlueGreen hook to CloudFormation with the CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinear10PercentEvery1Minutes configuration implements the specified ECS blue/green linear deployment.

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The company's DevOps team has developed an AWS Lambda function that calls the Organizations API to create new AWS accounts. The Lambda function runs in the organization's management account. The DevOps team needs to move the Lambda function from the management account to a dedicated AWS account. The DevOps team must ensure that the Lambda function has the ability to create new AWS accounts only in Organizations before the team deploys the Lambda function to the new account. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: In the management account, create a new IAM role that has the necessary permission to create new accounts in Organizations. Allow the role to be assumed by the Lambda execution role in the new AWS account. Update the Lambda function code to assume the role when the Lambda function creates new AWS accounts. Update the Lambda execution role to ensure that it has permission to assume the new role.

options.label: B
options.content: In the management account, turn on delegated administration for Organizations. Create a new delegation policy that grants the new AWS account permission to create new AWS accounts in Organizations. Ensure that the Lambda execution role has the organizations:CreateAccount permission.

options.label: C
options.content: In the management account, create a new IAM role that has the necessary permission to create new accounts in Organizations. Allow the role to be assumed by the Lambda service principal. Update the Lambda function code to assume the role when the Lambda function creates new AWS accounts. Update the Lambda execution role to ensure that it has permission to assume the new role.

options.label: D
options.content: In the management account, enable AWS Control Tower. Turn on delegated administration for AWS Control Tower. Create a resource policy that allows the new AWS account to create new AWS accounts in AWS Control Tower. Update the Lambda function code to use the AWS Control Tower API in the new AWS account. Ensure that the Lambda execution role has the controltower:CreateManagedAccount permission.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。在 Organizations 管理账户中创建具备创建账户权限的 IAM 角色，并允许新账户中的 Lambda 执行角色代入；Lambda 代码再 assume 该角色创建新账户，同时自身执行角色需具备 sts:AssumeRole 权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。在 Organizations 管理账户中创建具备创建账户权限的 IAM 角色，并允许新账户中的 Lambda 执行角色代入；Lambda 代码再 assume 该角色创建新账户，同时自身执行角色需具备 sts:AssumeRole 权限。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Create an IAM role in the Organizations management account with permissions to create accounts, and allow the Lambda execution role in the new account to assume it. The Lambda code then assumes that role, and its execution role must have permission to do so.

questions.content: A company has deployed an application in a single AWS Region. The application backend uses Amazon DynamoDB tables and Amazon S3 buckets. The company wants to deploy the application in a secondary Region. The company must ensure that the data in the DynamoDB tables and the S3 buckets persists across both Regions. The data must also immediately propagate across Regions. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Implement two-way S3 bucket replication between the primary Region's S3 buckets and the secondary Region's S3 buckets. Convert the DynamoDB tables into global tables. Set the secondary Region as the additional Region.

options.label: B
options.content: Implement S3 Batch Operations copy jobs between the primary Region and the secondary Region for all S3 buckets. Convert the DynamoDB tables into global tables. Set the secondary Region as the additional Region.

options.label: C
options.content: Implement two-way S3 bucket replication between the primary Region's S3 buckets and the secondary Region's S3 buckets. Enable DynamoDB streams on the DynamoDB tables in both Regions. In each Region, create an AWS Lambda function that subscribes to the DynamoDB streams. Configure the Lambda function to copy new records to the DynamoDB tables in the other Region.

options.label: D
options.content: Implement S3 Batch Operations copy jobs between the primary Region and the secondary Region for all S3 buckets. Enable DynamoDB streams on the DynamoDB tables in both Regions. In each Region, create an AWS Lambda function that subscribes to the DynamoDB streams. Configure the Lambda function to copy new records to the DynamoDB tables in the other Region.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。双向 S3 bucket replication 可以在主区域和辅助区域的 S3 存储桶之间复制对象；将 DynamoDB 表转换为 global tables 并添加辅助 Region，可以为 DynamoDB 提供跨区域复制。讨论中也指出批量复制或自建 Lambda 复制会带来时效性或复杂度问题。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。双向 S3 bucket replication 可以在主区域和辅助区域的 S3 存储桶之间复制对象；将 DynamoDB 表转换为 global tables 并添加辅助 Region，可以为 DynamoDB 提供跨区域复制。讨论中也指出批量复制或自建 Lambda 复制会带来时效性或复杂度问题。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Two-way S3 bucket replication replicates objects between the primary and secondary Region buckets. Converting DynamoDB tables to global tables and adding the secondary Region provides cross-Region DynamoDB replication. The discussion also notes that batch copy jobs or custom Lambda replication introduce timeliness or complexity issues.

questions.content: A company has configured Amazon RDS storage autoscaling for its RDS DB instances. A DevOps team needs to visualize the autoscaling events on an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to RDS storage autoscaling events from RDS events. Create an AWS Lambda function that publishes a CloudWatch custom metric. Configure the EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function. Visualize the custom metric by using the CloudWatch dashboard.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a trail by using AWS CloudTrail with management events configured. Configure the trail to send the management events to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create a metric filter in CloudWatch Logs to match the RDS storage autoscaling events. Visualize the metric filter by using the CloudWatch dashboard.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to RDS storage autoscaling events from the RDS events. Create a CloudWatch alarm. Configure the EventBridge rule to change the status of the CloudWatch alarm. Visualize the alarm status by using the CloudWatch dashboard.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a trail by using AWS CloudTrail with data events configured. Configure the trail to send the data events to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create a metric filter in CloudWatch Logs to match the RDS storage autoscaling events. Visualize the metric filter by using the CloudWatch dashboard.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。该选项使用 EventBridge 监听 RDS storage autoscaling 事件，由 Lambda 发布 CloudWatch 自定义指标，并在 CloudWatch dashboard 中展示这些指标，直接满足可视化 RDS 存储自动扩展事件的需求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。该选项使用 EventBridge 监听 RDS storage autoscaling 事件，由 Lambda 发布 CloudWatch 自定义指标，并在 CloudWatch dashboard 中展示这些指标，直接满足可视化 RDS 存储自动扩展事件的需求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. It uses EventBridge to react to RDS storage autoscaling events, invokes Lambda to publish a CloudWatch custom metric, and visualizes that metric on a CloudWatch dashboard.

questions.content: A company uses containers for its applications. The company learns that some container images are missing required security configurations. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to create a standard base image. The solution must publish the base image weekly to the us-west-2 Region, us-east-2 Region, and eu-central-1 Region. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an EC2 Image Builder pipeline that uses a container recipe to build the image. Configure the pipeline to distribute the image to an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository in us-west-2. Configure ECR replication from us- west-2 to us-east-2 and from us-east-2 to eu-central-1. Configure the pipeline to run weekly.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses an AWS CodeBuild project to build the image. Use AWS CodeDeploy to publish the image to an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository in us-west-2. Configure ECR replication from us-west-2 to us-east-2 and from us-east-2 to eu-central-1. Configure the pipeline to run weekly.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an EC2 Image Builder pipeline that uses a container recipe to build the image. Configure the pipeline to distribute the image to Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repositories in all three Regions. Configure the pipeline to run weekly.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses an AWS CodeBuild project to build the image. Use AWS CodeDeploy to publish the image to Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repositories in all three Regions. Configure the pipeline to run weekly.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。EC2 Image Builder 支持使用 container recipe 自动构建容器镜像，并可将镜像分发到多个 Region 的 ECR 仓库；配置每周运行满足定期更新要求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。EC2 Image Builder 支持使用 container recipe 自动构建容器镜像，并可将镜像分发到多个 Region 的 ECR 仓库；配置每周运行满足定期更新要求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. EC2 Image Builder can use a container recipe to automate image builds and distribute the resulting image to ECR repositories in multiple Regions. Scheduling the pipeline weekly satisfies the regular update requirement.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to install antivirus software on all the Amazon EC2 instances in an AWS account. The EC2 instances run the most recent version of Amazon Linux. The solution must detect all instances and must use an AWS Systems Manager document to install the software if the software is not present. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an association in Systems Manager State Manager. Target all the managed nodes. Include the software in the association. Configure the association to use the Systems Manager document.

options.label: B
options.content: Set up AWS Config to record all the resources in the account. Create an AWS Config custom rule to determine if the software is installed on all the EC2 instances. Configure an automatic remediation action that uses the Systems Manager document for noncompliant EC2 instances.

options.label: C
options.content: Activate Amazon EC2 scanning on Amazon Inspector to determine if the software is installed on all the EC2 instances. Associate the findings with the Systems Manager document.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses AWS CloudTrail to detect the Runinstances API call. Configure inventory collection in Systems Manager Inventory to determine if the software is installed on the EC2 instances. Associate the Systems Manager inventory with the Systems Manager document.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。Systems Manager State Manager association 可面向所有 managed nodes 执行 Systems Manager document，并在 association 中包含所需软件，用于集中安装或保持软件状态。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。Systems Manager State Manager association 可面向所有 managed nodes 执行 Systems Manager document，并在 association 中包含所需软件，用于集中安装或保持软件状态。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. A Systems Manager State Manager association can target all managed nodes and use the Systems Manager document with the required software to install or maintain that software state centrally.

questions.content: A company needs to increase the security of the container images that run in its production environment. The company wants to integrate operating system scanning and programming language package vulnerability scanning for the containers in its CI/CD pipeline. The CI/CD pipeline is an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that includes an AWS CodeBuild build project, AWS CodeDeploy actions, and an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. A DevOps engineer needs to add an image scan to the CI/CD pipeline. The CI/CD pipeline must deploy only images without CRITICAL and HIGH findings into production. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon ECR basic scanning.

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon ECR enhanced scanning.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure Amazon ECR to submit a Rejected status to the CI/CD pipeline when the image scan returns CRITICAL or HIGH findings.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function when the image scan is completed. Configure the Lambda function to consume the Amazon Inspector scan status and to submit an Approved or Rejected status to the CI/CD pipeline.

options.label: E
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function when the image scan is completed. Configure the Lambda function to consume the Clair scan status and to submit an Approved or Rejected status to the CI/CD pipeline.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、D。B 使用 Amazon ECR enhanced scanning，它集成 Amazon Inspector，可检查操作系统和应用依赖漏洞并识别 HIGH、CRITICAL 风险。D 在扫描完成事件后调用 Lambda，读取 Inspector 扫描状态并向 CI/CD 管道提交 Approved 或 Rejected 状态。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、D。B 使用 Amazon ECR enhanced scanning，它集成 Amazon Inspector，可检查操作系统和应用依赖漏洞并识别 HIGH、CRITICAL 风险。D 在扫描完成事件后调用 Lambda，读取 Inspector 扫描状态并向 CI/CD 管道提交 Approved 或 Rejected 状态。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and D. B uses Amazon ECR enhanced scanning, which integrates with Amazon Inspector and can detect operating system and application package vulnerabilities, including HIGH and CRITICAL findings. D invokes Lambda when scanning completes so the function can read the Inspector status and submit Approved or Rejected to the CI/CD pipeline.

questions.content: A company's DevOps team manages a set of AWS accounts that are in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company needs a solution that ensures that all Amazon EC2 instances use approved AM Is that the DevOps team manages. The solution also must remediate the usage of AMIs that are not approved. The individual account administrators must not be able to remove the restriction to use approved AMIs. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy an Amazon EventBridge rule to each account. Configure the rule to react to AWS CloudTrail events for Amazon EC2 and to send a notification to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe the DevOps team to the SNS topic.

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy the approved-amis-by-id AWS Config managed rule to each account. Configure the rule with the list of approved AMIs. Configure the rule to run the AWS-StopEC2Instance AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook for the noncompliant EC2 instances.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that processes AWS CloudTrail events for Amazon EC2. Configure the Lambda function to send a notification to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe the DevOps team to the SNS topic. Deploy the Lambda function in each account in the organization. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule in each account. Configure the EventBridge rules to react to AWS CloudTrail events for Amazon EC2 and to invoke the Lambda function.

options.label: D
options.content: Enable AWS Config across the organization. Create a conformance pack that uses the approved-amis-by-id AWS Config managed rule with the list of approved AMIs. Deploy the conformance pack across the organization. Configure the rule to run the AWS-StopEC2lnstance AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook for the noncompliant EC2 instances.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。启用组织级 AWS Config 并部署包含 approved-amis-by-id 托管规则的 conformance pack，可以统一检查是否使用批准 AMI；配置该规则触发 AWS-StopEC2Instance Systems Manager Automation runbook，可自动停止不合规 EC2 实例。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。启用组织级 AWS Config 并部署包含 approved-amis-by-id 托管规则的 conformance pack，可以统一检查是否使用批准 AMI；配置该规则触发 AWS-StopEC2Instance Systems Manager Automation runbook，可自动停止不合规 EC2 实例。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Enabling AWS Config across the organization and deploying a conformance pack with the approved-amis-by-id managed rule checks for approved AMIs consistently. Configuring the rule to run the AWS-StopEC2Instance Systems Manager Automation runbook automatically stops noncompliant EC2 instances.

questions.content: A company gives its employees limited rights to AWS. DevOps engineers have the ability to assume an administrator role. For tracking purposes, the security team wants to receive a near-real-time notification when the administrator role is assumed. How should this be accomplished?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS Config to publish logs to an Amazon S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to query the logs and send a notification to the security team when the administrator role is assumed.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure Amazon GuardDuty to monitor when the administrator role is assumed and send a notification to the security team.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge event rule using an AWS Management Console sign-in events event pattern that publishes a message to an Amazon SNS topic if the administrator role is assumed.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge events rule using an AWS API call that uses an AWS CloudTrail event pattern to invoke an AWS Lambda function that publishes a message to an Amazon SNS topic if the administrator role is assumed.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。使用基于 CloudTrail API 调用事件模式的 EventBridge 规则检测 administrator role 被 AssumeRole 的事件，再调用 Lambda 向 SNS 发布消息，可以跟踪并告警角色被代入；仅监控控制台登录事件无法覆盖 AssumeRole。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。使用基于 CloudTrail API 调用事件模式的 EventBridge 规则检测 administrator role 被 AssumeRole 的事件，再调用 Lambda 向 SNS 发布消息，可以跟踪并告警角色被代入；仅监控控制台登录事件无法覆盖 AssumeRole。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. An EventBridge rule using a CloudTrail API call event pattern can detect when the administrator role is assumed, then invoke Lambda to publish an SNS notification. Monitoring only console sign-in events would not detect AssumeRole activity.

questions.content: A company needs a strategy for failover and disaster recovery of its data and application. The application uses a MySQL database and Amazon EC2 instances. The company requires a maximum RPO of 2 hours and a maximum RTO of 10 minutes for its data and application at all times. Which combination of deployment strategies will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon Aurora Single-AZ cluster in multiple AWS Regions as the data store. Use Aurora's automatic recovery capabilities in the event of a disaster.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon Aurora global database in two AWS Regions as the data store. In the event of a failure, promote the secondary Region to the primary for the application. Update the application to use the Aurora cluster endpoint in the secondary Region.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon Aurora cluster in multiple AWS Regions as the data store. Use a Network Load Balancer to balance the database traffic in different Regions.

options.label: D
options.content: Set up the application in two AWS Regions. Use Amazon Route 53 failover routing that points to Application Load Balancers in both Regions. Use health checks and Auto Scaling groups in each Region.

options.label: E
options.content: Set up the application in two AWS Regions. Configure AWS Global Accelerator to point to Application Load Balancers (ALBs) in both Regions. Add both ALBs to a single endpoint group. Use health checks and Auto Scaling groups in each Region.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、D。B 使用跨两个 Region 的 Aurora global database，并在故障时提升辅助 Region 为主库、更新应用端点。D 在两个 Region 部署应用，用 Route 53 failover routing 指向两地 ALB，并结合健康检查和 Auto Scaling 组实现 Web 应用故障转移。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、D。B 使用跨两个 Region 的 Aurora global database，并在故障时提升辅助 Region 为主库、更新应用端点。D 在两个 Region 部署应用，用 Route 53 failover routing 指向两地 ALB，并结合健康检查和 Auto Scaling 组实现 Web 应用故障转移。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and D. B uses an Aurora global database in two Regions and promotes the secondary Region on failure, then updates the application endpoint. D deploys the application in two Regions with Route 53 failover routing to ALBs, health checks, and Auto Scaling groups for the web application failover path.

questions.content: A developer is using the AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) to create a prototype for an AWS Lambda function. The AWS SAM template contains an AWS::Serverless::Function resource that has the CodeUri property that points to an Amazon S3 location. The developer wants to identify the correct commands for deployment before creating a CI/CD pipeline. The developer creates an archive of the Lambda function code named package.zip. The developer uploads the .zip file archive to the S3 location specified in the CodeUri property. The developer runs the sam deploy command and deploys the Lambda function. The developer updates the Lambda function code and uses the same steps to deploy the new version of the Lambda function. The sam deploy command fails and returns an error of no changes to deploy. Which solutions will deploy the new version? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use the aws cloudformation update-stack command instead of the sam deploy command.

options.label: B
options.content: Use the aws cloudformation update-stack-instances command instead of the sam deploy command.

options.label: C
options.content: Update the CodeUri property to reference the local application code folder. Use the sam deploy command.

options.label: D
options.content: Update the CodeUri property to reference the local application code folder. Use the aws cloudformation create-change-set command and the aws cloudformation execute-change-set command.

options.label: E
options.content: Update the CodeUri property to reference the local application code folder. Use the aws cloudformation package command and the aws cloudformation deploy command.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C、E。两者都先将 CodeUri 指向本地应用代码目录。C 使用 sam deploy，由 AWS SAM 处理打包和上传；E 使用 aws cloudformation package 上传本地构件并生成引用它们的模板，再用 aws cloudformation deploy 部署。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C、E。两者都先将 CodeUri 指向本地应用代码目录。C 使用 sam deploy，由 AWS SAM 处理打包和上传；E 使用 aws cloudformation package 上传本地构件并生成引用它们的模板，再用 aws cloudformation deploy 部署。
explanations.en: The correct answers are C and E. Both update CodeUri to reference the local application code folder. C uses sam deploy, where AWS SAM handles packaging and upload. E uses aws cloudformation package to upload local artifacts and generate a template that references them, then aws cloudformation deploy to deploy it.

questions.content: A company runs its container workloads in AWS App Runner. A DevOps engineer manages the company's container repository in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). The DevOps engineer must implement a solution that continuously monitors the container repository. The solution must create a new container image when the solution detects an operating system vulnerability or language package vulnerability. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use EC2 Image Builder to create a container image pipeline. Use Amazon ECR as the target repository. Turn on enhanced scanning on the ECR repository. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to capture an Inspector? finding event. Use the event to invoke the image pipeline. Re-upload the container to the repository.

options.label: B
options.content: Use EC2 Image Builder to create a container image pipeline. Use Amazon ECR as the target repository. Enable Amazon GuardDuty Malware Protection on the container workload. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to capture a GuardDuty finding event. Use the event to invoke the image pipeline.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild project to create a container image. Use Amazon ECR as the target repository. Turn on basic scanning on the repository. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to capture an ECR image action event. Use the event to invoke the CodeBuild project. Re-upload the container to the repository.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild project to create a container image. Use Amazon ECR as the target repository. Configure AWS Systems Manager Compliance to scan all managed nodes. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to capture a configuration compliance state change event. Use the event to invoke the CodeBuild project.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。该选项使用 EC2 Image Builder 创建容器镜像管道并以 ECR 为目标仓库，开启 ECR enhanced scanning；当 Inspector finding 事件出现时，EventBridge 触发镜像管道重新构建并重新上传容器镜像。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。该选项使用 EC2 Image Builder 创建容器镜像管道并以 ECR 为目标仓库，开启 ECR enhanced scanning；当 Inspector finding 事件出现时，EventBridge 触发镜像管道重新构建并重新上传容器镜像。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. It creates a container image pipeline with EC2 Image Builder targeting ECR, enables ECR enhanced scanning, and uses an EventBridge rule for Inspector finding events to invoke the image pipeline and re-upload the container image.

questions.content: A company wants to use AWS Systems Manager documents to bootstrap physical laptops for developers. The bootstrap code is stored in GitHub. A DevOps engineer has already created a Systems Manager activation, installed the Systems Manager agent with the registration code, and installed an activation ID on all the laptops. Which set of steps should be taken next?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the Systems Manager document to use the AWS-RunShellScript command to copy the files from GitHub to Amazon S3, then use the aws-downloadContent plugin with a sourceType of S3.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure the Systems Manager document to use the aws-configurePackage plugin with an install action and point to the Git repository.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the Systems Manager document to use the aws-downloadContent plugin with a sourceType of GitHub and sourceInfo with the repository details.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the Systems Manager document to use the aws:softwareInventory plugin and run the script from the Git repository.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。Systems Manager document 可使用 aws:downloadContent 插件，并将 sourceType 设置为 GitHub、sourceInfo 设置为仓库详情，从远程 GitHub 位置下载脚本或文档内容。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。Systems Manager document 可使用 aws:downloadContent 插件，并将 sourceType 设置为 GitHub、sourceInfo 设置为仓库详情，从远程 GitHub 位置下载脚本或文档内容。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. A Systems Manager document can use the aws:downloadContent plugin with sourceType set to GitHub and sourceInfo containing the repository details to download scripts or document content from GitHub.

questions.content: A company's development team uses AWS CloudFormation to deploy its application resources. The team must use CloudFormation for all changes to the environment. The team cannot use the AWS Management Console or the AWS CLI to make manual changes directly. The team uses a developer IAM role to access the environment. The role is configured with the AdministratorAccess managed IAM policy. The company has created a new CloudFormationDeployment IAM role that has the following policy attached: The company wants to ensure that only CloudFormation can use the new role. The development team cannot make any manual changes to the deployed resources. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Remove the AdministratorAccess policy. Assign the ReadOnlyAccess managed IAM policy to the developer role. Instruct the developers to use the CloudFormationDeployment role as a CloudFormation service role when the developers deploy new stacks.

options.label: B
options.content: Update the trust policy of the CloudFormationDeployment role to allow the developer IAM role to assume the CloudFormationDeployment role.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the developer IAM role to be able to get and pass the CloudFormationDeployment role if iam:PassedToService equals . Configure the CloudFormationDeployment role to allow all cloudformation actions for all resources.

options.label: D
options.content: Update the trust policy of the CloudFormationDeployment role to allow the cloudformation.amazonaws.com AWS principal to perform the iam:AssumeRole action.

options.label: E
