The company wants a DevOps team to integrate CodeConnections into the CloudFormation stacks. The DevOps team must ensure that company staff members can integrate only with the specified Git provider. The deployment process must be highly available across Regions. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Add a new SCP statement to the OU that denies the CodeConnections CreatingConnections action where the provider type is not the specified Git provider.

options.label: B
options.content: Add a new SCP statement to the OU that allows the CodeConnections CreatingConnections action where the provider type is the specified Git provider.

options.label: C
options.content: Use CodeConnectlons to configure a single CodeConnections connection to each Git repository.

options.label: D
options.content: Use CodeConnections to create a CodeConnections connection from each Region where the company operates to each Git repository.

options.label: E
options.content: Use CodeConnections to create a CodeConnections repository link. Update each CfoudFormation stack to sync from the Git repository.

options.label: F
options.content: For each Git repository, create a pipeline in AWS CodePipefine that has the Git repository set as the source and a CloudFormation deployment stage.

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A、C、E。A 用 SCP 限制只能创建指定 Git provider 类型的 CodeConnections 连接；C 为每个 Git 仓库配置 CodeConnections 连接；E 创建 repository link 并更新 CloudFormation 堆栈从 Git 仓库同步。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A、C、E。A 用 SCP 限制只能创建指定 Git provider 类型的 CodeConnections 连接；C 为每个 Git 仓库配置 CodeConnections 连接；E 创建 repository link 并更新 CloudFormation 堆栈从 Git 仓库同步。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, C, and E. A enforces the approved Git provider through an SCP, C configures CodeConnections connections to the Git repositories, and E creates a repository link so CloudFormation stacks can sync from Git.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer updates an AWS CloudFormation stack to add a nested stack that includes several Amazon EC2 instances. When the DevOps engineer attempts to deploy the updated stack, the nested stack fails to deploy. What should the DevOps engineer do to determine the cause of the failure?

options.label: A
options.content: Use the CloudFormation detect root cause capability for the failed stack to analyze the failure and return the event that is the most likely cause for the failure.

options.label: B
options.content: Query failed stacks by specifying the root stack as the ParentId property. Examine the StackStatusReason property for all returned stacks to determine the reason the nested stack failed to deploy.

options.label: C
options.content: Activate AWS Systems Manager for the AWS account where the application runs. Use the AWS Systems Manager Automation AWS-SupportTroubleshootCFNCustomResource runbook to determine the reason the nested stack failed to deploy.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the CloudFormation template to publish logs to Amazon CloudWatch. View the CloudFormation logs for the failed stack in the CloudWatch console to determine the reason the nested stack failed to deploy.

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 B。通过将根堆栈指定为 ParentId 查询失败的嵌套堆栈，并查看返回堆栈的 StackStatusReason，可定位嵌套堆栈部署失败原因。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 B。通过将根堆栈指定为 ParentId 查询失败的嵌套堆栈，并查看返回堆栈的 StackStatusReason，可定位嵌套堆栈部署失败原因。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Querying failed stacks with the root stack as ParentId and reviewing StackStatusReason for the returned stacks identifies why the nested stack failed to deploy.

questions.content: A DevOps team operates an integration service that runs on an Amazon EC2 instance. The DevOps team uses Amazon Route 53 to manage the integration service's domain name by using a simple routing record. The integration service is stateful and uses Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) for data storage and state storage. The integration service does not support load balancing between multiple nodes. The DevOps team deploys the integration service on a new EC2 instance as a warm standby to reduce the mean time to recovery. The DevOps team wants the integration service to automatically fail over to the standby EC2 instance. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Update the existing Route 53 DNS record's routing policy to weighted. Set the existing DNS record's weighting to 100. For the same domain, add a new DNS record that points to the standby EC2 instance. Set the new DNS record's weighting to 0. Associate an application health check with each record.

options.label: B
options.content: Update the existing Route 53 DNS record's routing policy to weighted. Set the existing DNS record's weighting to 99. For the same domain, add a new DNS record that points to the standby EC2 instance. Set the new DNS record's weighting to 1. Associate an application health check with each record.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Update the existing Route 53 record to point to the ALB. Create a target group for each EC2 instance. Configure an application health check on each target group. Associate both target groups with the same ALB listener. Set the primary target group's weighting to 100. Set the standby target group's weighting to 0.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Update the existing Route 53 record to point to the ALB. Create a target group for each EC2 instance. Configure an application health check on each target group. Associate both target groups with the same ALB listener. Set the primary target group's weighting to 99. Set the standby target group's weighting to 1.

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。应用是有状态的且不支持多节点负载均衡，因此 Route 53 加权路由配合健康检查更合适；主记录权重 100、备用记录权重 0，正常时只走主实例，主实例健康检查失败时切到备用实例。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。应用是有状态的且不支持多节点负载均衡，因此 Route 53 加权路由配合健康检查更合适；主记录权重 100、备用记录权重 0，正常时只走主实例，主实例健康检查失败时切到备用实例。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Because the stateful application cannot be load balanced across nodes, Route 53 weighted records with health checks work: weight 100 sends normal traffic to the primary, and weight 0 keeps the standby unused until primary health fails.

questions.content: A company hosts several applications in an AWS account. Each application sends logs to its own log group in Amazon CloudWatch. The company's CloudWatch costs for ingestion are increasing. A DevOps engineer needs to identify which applications are the source of the increased logging costs. Which solution will meet this requirement in the MOST operationally efficient way?

options.label: A
options.content: Use CloudWatch metrics to create a custom expression that identifies the CloudWatch log groups that receive the most data.

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs Insights to create a query for the application log groups to identify the number of log groups that received data during a specific time period.

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Cost Explorer to generate a cost report that details costs for CloudWatch usage.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CloudTrail to filter for CreateLogStream events for each application.

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。使用 CloudWatch metrics 创建自定义表达式可识别接收数据最多的 CloudWatch log groups，从而找出日志摄入量最大的来源。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。使用 CloudWatch metrics 创建自定义表达式可识别接收数据最多的 CloudWatch log groups，从而找出日志摄入量最大的来源。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. A custom expression based on CloudWatch metrics can identify the CloudWatch log groups receiving the most data, which points to the largest ingestion sources.

questions.content: A company has an AWS account named PipelineAccount. The account manages a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline. The account uses an IAM role named CodePipeline_Service_Role and produces an artifact that is stored in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company uses a customer managed AWS KMS key to encrypt objects in the S3 bucket. A DevOps engineer wants to configure the pipeline to use an AWS CodeDeploy application in an AWS account named CodeDeployAccount to deploy the produced artifact. The DevOps engineer updates the KMS key policy to grant the CodeDeployAccount account permission to use the key. The DevOps engineer configures an IAM role named DevOps_Role in the CodeDeployAccount account that has access to the CodeDeploy resources that the pipeline requires. The DevOps engineer updates an Amazon EC2 instance role that operates within the CodeDeployAccount account to allow access to the S3 bucket and the KMS key that is in the PipelineAccount account. Which additional steps will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Update the S3 bucket policy to grant the CodeDeployAccount account access to the S3 bucket. Configure the DevOps_Role IAM role to have an IAM trust policy that allows the PipelineAccount account to assume the role. Update the CodePipeline_Service_Role IAM role to grant permission to assume the DevOps_Role role.

options.label: B
options.content: Update the S3 bucket policy to grant the CodeDeployAccount account access to the S3 bucket. Configure the DevOps_Role IAM role to have an IAM trust policy that allows the PipelineAccount account to assume the role. Update the DevOps_Role IAM role to grant permission to assume CodePipelfne_Service_Role role.

options.label: C
options.content: Update the S3 bucket policy to grant the PipelineAccount account access to the S3 bucket. Configure the DevOps_Role IAM role to have an IAM trust policy that allows the PipelineAccount account to assume the role. Update the CodePipeline_Service_Role IAM to grant permission to assume the DevOps_Role role.

options.label: D
options.content: Update the S3 bucket policy to grant the CodeDeployAccount account access to the S3 bucket. Configure the DevOps_Role IAM role to have an IAM trust policy that allows the CodeDeployAccount account to assume the role. Update the CodePipeline_Service_Role IAM role to grant permission to assume the DevOps_Role role.

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。跨账户部署需要 S3 桶策略授予 CodeDeployAccount 访问权限，DevOps_Role 信任 PipelineAccount 可承担该角色，并让 CodePipeline_Service_Role 具备 assume DevOps_Role 的权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。跨账户部署需要 S3 桶策略授予 CodeDeployAccount 访问权限，DevOps_Role 信任 PipelineAccount 可承担该角色，并让 CodePipeline_Service_Role 具备 assume DevOps_Role 的权限。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Cross-account deployment requires the S3 bucket policy to allow CodeDeployAccount access, the DevOps_Role trust policy to allow PipelineAccount to assume it, and the CodePipeline_Service_Role to have permission to assume DevOps_Role.

questions.content: A company has multiple development teams in separate business units that work in a single shared AWS account. All Amazon EC2 resources that users create in the account must include tags that specify which user created the resources. The tagging must occur within the first hour of resource creation. A DevOps engineer needs to add tags to new resources that include the ID of the user that created the resource and the appropriate cost center ID. The DevOps engineer configures an AWS Lambda function to use the cost center mappings to tag the resources. The DevOps engineer also sets up AWS CloudTrail in the shared AWS account. An Amazon S3 bucket stores the CloudTrail event logs. Which solution will meet the tagging requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an S3 event notification on the S3 bucket to invoke the Lambda function for s3:ObjectTagging:Put events. Enable bucket versioning on the S3 bucket.

options.label: B
options.content: Enable server access logging on the S3 bucket. Create an S3 event notification on the S3 bucket for s3:ObjectTagging:* events.

options.label: C
options.content: Enable AWS Config in the account. Configure the required-tags AWS managed rule to check and update the required tags.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses Amazon EC2 as the event source. Configure the rule to match events that CloudTrail delivers. Configure the rule to target the Lambda function.

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 D。EventBridge 规则可使用 Amazon EC2 作为事件源，匹配 CloudTrail 交付的 EC2 事件，并将匹配事件发送到 Lambda 函数处理。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 D。EventBridge 规则可使用 Amazon EC2 作为事件源，匹配 CloudTrail 交付的 EC2 事件，并将匹配事件发送到 Lambda 函数处理。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. An EventBridge rule can use Amazon EC2 as the event source, match events delivered by CloudTrail, and target the Lambda function.

questions.content: A company is developing code and wants to use semantic versioning. The company's DevOps team needs to create a pipeline for compiling the code. The team also needs to manage versions of the compiled code. If the code uses any open source libraries, the libraries must also be cached in the build process. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CodeArtifact repository and associate the upstream repositories. Create an AWS CodeBuild project that builds the semantic version of the code artifacts. Configure the project to authenticate and connect to the CodeArtifact repository and publish the artifact to the repository.

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CodeDeploy to upload the generated semantic version of the artifact to an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system.

options.label: C
options.content: Use an AWS CodeBuild project to build the code and to publish the generated semantic version of the artifact to AWS Artifact. Configure build caching in the CodeBuild project.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a new AWS CodeArtifact repository. Create an AWS Lambda function that pulls open source packages from the internet and publishes the packages to the repository. Configure AWS CodeDeploy to build semantic versions of the code and publish the versions to the repository.

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。CodeArtifact 仓库关联上游仓库后可作为制品发布目标；CodeBuild 构建语义版本制品，认证并连接到 CodeArtifact，然后将制品发布到该仓库。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。CodeArtifact 仓库关联上游仓库后可作为制品发布目标；CodeBuild 构建语义版本制品，认证并连接到 CodeArtifact，然后将制品发布到该仓库。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. CodeArtifact with upstream repositories provides the package repository, and CodeBuild builds the semantic versioned artifact, authenticates to CodeArtifact, and publishes it there.

questions.content: A company uses a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline to deploy an application. The company created an AWS Fault Injection Service (AWS FIS) experiment template to test the resiliency of the application. A DevOps engineer needs to integrate the experiment into the pipeline. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a new stage in the pipeline that includes an AWS FIS action. Configure the action to reference the AWS FIS experiment template. Grant the pipeline access to start the experiment.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduler. Grant the scheduler permission to start the AWS FIS experiment. Configure a new stage in the pipeline that includes an action to invoke the EventBridge scheduler.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to start the AWS FIS experiment. Grant the Lambda function permission to start the experiment. Create a new stage in the pipeline that has a Lambda action. Set the action to invoke the Lambda function.

options.label: D
options.content: Export the AWS FIS experiment template to an Amazon S3 bucket. Create an AWS CodeBuild unit test project that has a buildspec that starts the AWS FIS experiment. Grant the CodeBuild project access to start the experiment. Configure a new stage in the pipeline that includes an action to run the CodeBuild unit test project.

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 C。通过 Lambda 函数启动 AWS FIS 实验，并授予其启动实验的权限；在流水线中新增 Lambda action 调用该函数，即可把故障注入实验纳入部署流程。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 C。通过 Lambda 函数启动 AWS FIS 实验，并授予其启动实验的权限；在流水线中新增 Lambda action 调用该函数，即可把故障注入实验纳入部署流程。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. A Lambda function with permission to start the AWS FIS experiment can be invoked from a new pipeline stage through a Lambda action.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is creating a CI/CD pipeline to build container images. The engineer needs to store container images in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) and scan the images for common vulnerabilities. The CI/CD pipeline must be resilient to outages in upstream source container image repositories. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an ECR private repository in the private registry to store the container images and scan images when images are pushed to the repository. Configure a replication rule in the private registry to replicate images from upstream repositories.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an ECR public repository in the public registry to cache images from upstream source repositories. Create an ECR private repository to store images. Configure the private repository to scan images when images are pushed to the repository.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an ECR public repository in the public registry. Configure a pull through cache rule for the repository. Create an ECR private repository to store images. Configure the ECR private registry to perform basic scanning.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an ECR private repository in the private registry to store the container images. Enable basic scanning for the private registry, and create a pull through cache rule.

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 D。ECR 私有仓库可保存构建镜像和上游镜像；启用 basic scanning 可扫描常见漏洞，pull through cache rule 可缓存公共上游仓库镜像，在上游不可用时仍能从本地缓存拉取。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 D。ECR 私有仓库可保存构建镜像和上游镜像；启用 basic scanning 可扫描常见漏洞，pull through cache rule 可缓存公共上游仓库镜像，在上游不可用时仍能从本地缓存拉取。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. An ECR private repository stores the images, basic scanning checks for common vulnerabilities, and a pull-through cache rule caches upstream public images so cached copies remain available if the upstream is unavailable.

questions.content: A company is running its ecommerce website on AWS. The website is currently hosted on a single Amazon EC2 instance in one Availability Zone. A MySQL database runs on the same EC2 instance. The company needs to eliminate single points of failure in the architecture to improve the website's availability and resilience. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST configuration changes to the website?

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy the application by using AWS Fargate containers. Migrate the database to Amazon DynamoDB. Use Amazon API Gateway to route requests.

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy the application on EC2 instances across multiple Availability Zones. Put the EC2 instances into an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer. Migrate the database to Amazon Aurora Multi-AZ. Use Amazon CloudFront for content delivery.

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk to deploy the application across multiple AWS Regions. Migrate the database to Amazon Redshift. Use Amazon ElastiCache for session management.

options.label: D
options.content: Migrate the application to AWS Lambda functions. Use Amazon S3 for static content hosting. Migrate the database to Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility).

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 B。将应用部署到跨多个可用区的 EC2 Auto Scaling 组并置于 ALB 后，可提升应用层可用性；迁移到 Aurora Multi-AZ 提升数据库可用性，CloudFront 用于内容分发。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 B。将应用部署到跨多个可用区的 EC2 Auto Scaling 组并置于 ALB 后，可提升应用层可用性；迁移到 Aurora Multi-AZ 提升数据库可用性，CloudFront 用于内容分发。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones behind an ALB improve application availability, Aurora Multi-AZ improves database availability, and CloudFront handles content delivery.

questions.content: A company is developing a microservices-based application on AWS. The application consists of AWS Lambda functions and Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) services that need to be deployed frequently. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a consistent deployment solution across all components of the application. The solution must automate the deployments, minimize downtime during updates, and manage configuration data for the application. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation to define and provision the Lambda functions and ECS services. Implement stack updates with resource replacement for all components. Use AWS Secrets Manager to manage the configuration data.

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CodeDeploy to manage deployments for the Lambda functions and ECS services. Implement canary deployments for the Lambda functions. Implement blue/green deployments for the ECS services. Use AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store to manage the configuration data.

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Step Functions to orchestrate deployments for the Lambda functions and ECS services. Use canary deployments for the Lambda functions and ECS services in a different AWS Region. Use AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store to manage the configuration data.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager to manage deployments for the Lambda functions and ECS services. Implement all-at-once deployments for the Lambda functions. Implement rolling updates for the ECS services. Use AWS Secrets Manager to manage the configuration data.

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 B。CodeDeploy 可统一管理 Lambda 函数和 ECS 服务部署；Lambda 使用金丝雀部署、ECS 使用蓝绿部署，并用 Systems Manager Parameter Store 管理配置数据。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 B。CodeDeploy 可统一管理 Lambda 函数和 ECS 服务部署；Lambda 使用金丝雀部署、ECS 使用蓝绿部署，并用 Systems Manager Parameter Store 管理配置数据。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. CodeDeploy manages deployments for both Lambda functions and ECS services, with canary deployments for Lambda, blue/green deployments for ECS, and Systems Manager Parameter Store for configuration data.

questions.content: A company is implementing a CI/CD pipeline for an application by using AWS CodePipeline and AWS CodeBuild. The company needs a solution to run unit tests and automatically generate code coverage reports before any code is deployed to production. The CI/CD pipeline execution must fail if the code coverage is less than 80%. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to run unit tests and generate code coverage reports. Add a Lambda invoke action to a stage in the CodePipeline pipeline. Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to run hourly to monitor the Lambda function's output. Configure the rule to fail the pipeline if coverage is less than 80%.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Step Functions workflow to run unit tests and generate code coverage reports. Add a Step Functions test action to a stage in the CodePipeline pipeline to invoke the workflow. Configure the workflow to fail if the code coverage is less than 80%.

options.label: C
options.content: Create a CodeBuild project with a buildspec.yml file that includes commands to run unit tests and generate code coverage reports. Add a CodeBuild test action to a stage in the CodePipeline pipeline. Configure the CodeBuild test action to use the source artifacts from the source action as input. Modify the buildspec.yml file to fail the build if coverage is less than 80%.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CodeBuild project with Jenkins installed. Configure Jenkins to run unit tests and generate code coverage reports. Add a Jenkins test action to a stage in the CodePipeline pipeline. Configure the Jenkins test action to output the coverage report as an output artifact. Configure an approval action to fail the pipeline if code coverage is less than 80%.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。应在 CodePipeline 中加入 CodeBuild 测试动作，使用源代码工件运行包含单元测试和覆盖率报告命令的 buildspec.yml，并在覆盖率低于 80% 时让构建失败。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。应在 CodePipeline 中加入 CodeBuild 测试动作，使用源代码工件运行包含单元测试和覆盖率报告命令的 buildspec.yml，并在覆盖率低于 80% 时让构建失败。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. Add a CodeBuild test action to CodePipeline, use the source artifact as input, run unit tests and coverage reporting from buildspec.yml, and fail the build when coverage is below 80%.

questions.content: A company has a web application that publishes logs that contain metadata for transactions, with a status of success or failure for each log. The logs are in JSON format. The application publishes the logs to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. The company wants to create a dashboard that displays the number of successful transactions. Which solution will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster and an OpenSearch Service subscription filter to send the log group data to the cluster. Create a dashboard within the Dashboards feature in the OpenSearch Service cluster by using a search query for transactions that have a status of success.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a CloudWatch subscription filter for the log group that uses an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to parse the JSON logs and publish a custom metric to CloudWatch for transactions that have a status of success. Create a CloudWatch dashboard by using a metric graph that displays the custom metric.

options.label: C
options.content: Create a CloudWatch metric filter for the log groups with a filter pattern that matches the transaction status property and a value of success. Create a CloudWatch dashboard by using a metric graph that displays the new metric.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream that is subscribed to the log group. Configure the data stream to filter incoming log data based on a status of success and to send the filtered logs to an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to publish a custom metric to CloudWatch. Create a CloudWatch dashboard by using a metric graph that displays the custom metric.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。CloudWatch Logs 指标筛选器可以直接匹配 JSON 日志中的交易状态 success，并把匹配次数转换为指标，再用 CloudWatch 仪表板图表展示。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。CloudWatch Logs 指标筛选器可以直接匹配 JSON 日志中的交易状态 success，并把匹配次数转换为指标，再用 CloudWatch 仪表板图表展示。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. A CloudWatch Logs metric filter can match the JSON transaction status value of success, publish it as a metric, and display that metric on a CloudWatch dashboard.

questions.content: A company uses Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda functions to implement an API. The company uses a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline to build and deploy the API. The pipeline contains a source stage, build stage, and deployment stage. The company deploys the API without performing smoke tests. Soon after the deployment, the company observes multiple issues with the API. A security audit finds security vulnerabilities in the production code. The company wants to prevent these issues from happening in the future. Which combination of steps will meet this requirement? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a smoke test script that returns an error code if the API code fails the test. Add an action in the deployment stage to run the smoke test script after deployment. Configure the deployment stage for automatic rollback.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a smoke test script that returns an error code if the API code fails the test. Add an action in the deployment stage to run the smoke test script after deployment. Configure the deployment stage to fail if the smoke test script returns an error code.

options.label: C
options.content: Add an action in the build stage that uses Amazon Inspector to scan the Lambda function code after the code is built. Configure the build stage to fail if the scan returns any security findings.

options.label: D
options.content: Add an action in the build stage to run an Amazon CodeGuru code scan after the code is built. Configure the build stage to fail if the scan returns any security findings.

options.label: E
options.content: Add an action in the deployment stage to run an Amazon CodeGuru code scan after deployment. Configure the deployment stage to fail if the scan returns any security findings.

questions.explanation:
正确答案是 B 和 D。B 在部署后运行 smoke test，并根据脚本错误码让部署阶段失败；D 在构建阶段运行 CodeGuru 扫描，并在发现安全问题时让构建失败。

讨论指出 Inspector 只扫描 Lambda 代码，而题目关注整个生产代码库，因此需要流水线中的部署验证和代码安全扫描。

explanations.zh:
正确答案是 B 和 D。B 在部署后运行 smoke test，并根据脚本错误码让部署阶段失败；D 在构建阶段运行 CodeGuru 扫描，并在发现安全问题时让构建失败。

讨论指出 Inspector 只扫描 Lambda 代码，而题目关注整个生产代码库，因此需要流水线中的部署验证和代码安全扫描。
explanations.en:
The correct answers are B and D. B runs a smoke test after deployment and fails the deployment stage on a nonzero error code; D runs a CodeGuru scan in the build stage and fails on security findings.

The discussion notes that Inspector only scans Lambda code, while the need is broader production code coverage, so pipeline-based deployment validation and code scanning fit.

questions.content: A company is implementing a standardized security baseline across its AWS accounts. The accounts are in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company must deploy consistent IAM roles and policies across all existing and future accounts in the organization. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Enable AWS Control Tower in the management account. Configure AWS Control Tower Account Factory customization to deploy the required IAM roles and policies to all accounts.

options.label: B
options.content: Activate trusted access for AWS CloudFormation StackSets in Organizations. In the management account, create a stack set that has service-managed permissions to deploy the required IAM roles and policies to all accounts. Enable automatic deployment for the stack set.

options.label: C
options.content: In each member account, create IAM roles that have permissions to create and manage resources. In the management account, create an AWS CloudFormation stack set that has self-managed permissions to deploy the required IAM roles and policies to all accounts. Enable automatic deployment for the stack set.

options.label: D
options.content: In the management account, create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline. Configure the pipeline to use AWS CloudFormation to automate the deployment of the required IAM roles and policies. Set up cross-account IAM roles to allow CodePipeline to deploy resources in the member accounts.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。启用 Organizations 对 CloudFormation StackSets 的可信访问后，可以在管理账号中使用服务托管权限的 StackSet，把所需 IAM 角色和策略自动部署到所有账号。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。启用 Organizations 对 CloudFormation StackSets 的可信访问后，可以在管理账号中使用服务托管权限的 StackSet，把所需 IAM 角色和策略自动部署到所有账号。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. With trusted access for CloudFormation StackSets in Organizations, a service-managed StackSet from the management account can automatically deploy the required IAM roles and policies to all accounts.

questions.content: A company is migrating its web application to AWS. The application uses WebSocket connections for real-time updates and requires sticky sessions. A DevOps engineer must implement a highly available architecture for the application. The application must be accessible to users worldwide with the least possible latency. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Deploy another ALB in a different AWS Region. Enable cross-zone load balancing and sticky sessions on the ALBs. Integrate the ALBs with Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing.

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Deploy another NLB in a different AWS Region. Enable cross-zone load balancing and sticky sessions on the NLBs. Integrate the NLBs with Amazon Route 53 geolocation routing.

options.label: C
options.content: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB) with cross-zone load balancing enabled. Configure the NLB with IP-based targets in multiple Availability Zones. Use Amazon CloudFront for global content delivery. Implement sticky sessions by using source IP address preservation on the NLB.

options.label: D
options.content: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB) for HTTP traffic. Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in each of the company's AWS Regions for WebSocket connections. Enable sticky sessions on the ALB. Configure the ALB to forward requests to the NLB.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。ALB 原生支持 WebSocket 和基于 Cookie 的粘性会话；跨可用区负载均衡可均衡分发流量，Route 53 延迟路由可把用户导向延迟最低的区域。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。ALB 原生支持 WebSocket 和基于 Cookie 的粘性会话；跨可用区负载均衡可均衡分发流量，Route 53 延迟路由可把用户导向延迟最低的区域。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. ALB natively supports WebSockets and cookie-based sticky sessions; cross-zone load balancing spreads traffic across Availability Zones, and Route 53 latency-based routing sends users to the lowest-latency Region.

questions.content: A company has a workflow that generates a file for each of the company's products and stores the files in a production environment Amazon S3 bucket. The company's users can access the S3 bucket. Each file contains a product ID. Product IDs for products that have not been publicly announced are prefixed with a specific UUID. Product IDs are 12 characters long. IDs for products that have not been publicly announces begin with the letter P. The company does not want information about products that have not been publicly announced to be available in the production environment S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new staging S3 bucket. Generate all files in the new staging bucket. Create an Amazon Macie custom data identifier to identify product IDs in the new bucket that begin with the specific UUID. Launch an Amazon Macie sensitive data discovery job with the custom data identifier. Copy all files that do not have a Macie finding to the production S3 bucket.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon Macie custom data identifier to identify product IDs in the production bucket that begin with the specific UUID. Launch an Amazon Macie sensitive data discovery job with the custom data identifier. Remove all files that have a Macie finding from the production S3 bucket.

options.label: C
options.content: Create a new staging S3 bucket. Generate all files in the new staging bucket. Launch an Amazon Macie sensitive data discovery job with a managed data identifier. Copy all files that do not have a Macie finding to the production S3 bucket.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon Macie sensitive data discovery job with a managed data identifier. Remove all files that have a Macie finding from the production S3 bucket.

questions.explanation:
正确答案是 A。在暂存 S3 桶中生成文件，用 Amazon Macie 自定义数据标识符识别符合特定 UUID 前缀的产品 ID，只把没有 Macie 发现的文件复制到生产桶。

这种做法在敏感数据进入生产前进行过滤，符合讨论中的预防性思路。

explanations.zh:
正确答案是 A。在暂存 S3 桶中生成文件，用 Amazon Macie 自定义数据标识符识别符合特定 UUID 前缀的产品 ID，只把没有 Macie 发现的文件复制到生产桶。

这种做法在敏感数据进入生产前进行过滤，符合讨论中的预防性思路。
explanations.en:
The correct answer is A. Generate files in a staging S3 bucket, use a Macie custom data identifier to find product IDs with the specified UUID prefix, and copy only files without Macie findings to production.

This filters sensitive data before it reaches production, matching the preventive approach described in the discussion.

questions.content: A company uses Amazon RDS for Microsoft SQL Server as its primary database for applications. The company needs to ensure high availability within and across AWS Regions. An Amazon Route 53 CNAME record is configured for the database endpoint. The applications connect to the database endpoint. The company must redirect application traffic to a standby database during a failover event. The company must maintain an RPO of less than 1 minute and an RTO of less than 10 minutes. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy an Amazon RDS for SQL Server Multi-AZ DB cluster deployment that uses cross-Region read replicas. Use automation to promote the read replica to a standalone instance and to update the Route 53 record.

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy an Amazon RDS for SQL Server Multi-AZ DB cluster deployment. Set up automated snapshots to be copied to another Region every 5 minutes. Use AWS Lambda to restore the latest snapshot in the secondary Region during failover.

options.label: C
options.content: Deploy an Amazon RDS for SQL Server Single-AZ DB instance. Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to replicate data continuously to an RDS DB instance in another Region. Use Amazon CloudWatch alarms to notify the company about failover events.

options.label: D
options.content: Deploy an Amazon RDS for SQL Server Single-AZ DB instance. Configure AWS Backup to create cross-Region backups every 30 seconds. Use automation to restore the latest backup and to update the Route 53 record during failover.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。RDS for SQL Server Multi-AZ 集群提供主区域高可用，跨区域只读副本可用于灾难恢复；通过自动化提升副本并更新 Route 53 记录，可把故障切换流程标准化。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。RDS for SQL Server Multi-AZ 集群提供主区域高可用，跨区域只读副本可用于灾难恢复；通过自动化提升副本并更新 Route 53 记录，可把故障切换流程标准化。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. An RDS for SQL Server Multi-AZ cluster provides high availability in the primary Region, while cross-Region read replicas support disaster recovery; automation can promote the replica and update Route 53 records.

questions.content: A company wants to build a pipeline to update the standard AMI monthly. The AMI must be updated to use the most recent patches to ensure that launched Amazon EC2 instances are up to date. Each new AMI must be available to all AWS accounts in the company's organization in AWS Organizations. The company needs to configure an automated pipeline to build the AMI. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses AWS CodeBuild. Create an AWS Lambda function to run the pipeline every month. Create an AWS CloudFormation template. Share the template with all AWS accounts in the organization.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AMI pipeline by using EC2 Image Builder. Configure the pipeline to distribute the AMI to the AWS accounts in the organization. Configure the pipeline to run monthly.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that runs an AWS Lambda function to build the AMI. Configure the pipeline to share the AMI with the AWS accounts in the organization. Configure Amazon EventBridge Scheduler to invoke the pipeline every month.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook. Configure the automation to run in all AWS accounts in the organization. Create an AWS Lambda function to run the automation every month.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。EC2 Image Builder 专用于创建、修补、测试和分发 AMI，并可按月计划运行，还能把 AMI 分发到组织内账号，运维开销最低。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。EC2 Image Builder 专用于创建、修补、测试和分发 AMI，并可按月计划运行，还能把 AMI 分发到组织内账号，运维开销最低。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. EC2 Image Builder is built for creating, patching, testing, and distributing AMIs, can run on a monthly schedule, and can distribute AMIs across organization accounts with low operational effort.

questions.content: A company has an application that uses an Amazon API Gateway REST API, AWS Lambda functions, and an Amazon DynamoDB table. The application currently runs in a single AWS Region. The company wants to make the application highly available across two Regions. User traffic must be routed to the Region that provides the least latency. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a replica of the DynamoDB table in a second Region.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a global secondary index for the DynamoDB table.

options.label: C
options.content: Create copies of the REST API and the Lambda functions in a second Region.

options.label: D
options.content: Create health checks in Amazon Route 53. Create DNS records that include a failover routing policy.

options.label: E
options.content: Create health checks in Amazon Route 53. Create DNS records that include a latency routing policy.

options.label: F
options.content: Create DNS records in Amazon Route 53 that include a multivalue answer routing policy.

questions.explanation:
正确答案是 A、C 和 E。A 在第二区域创建 DynamoDB 副本，C 在第二区域复制 REST API 和 Lambda，E 使用 Route 53 延迟路由和健康检查。

这些组件共同支持多区域本地服务、低延迟访问和故障绕行。

explanations.zh:
正确答案是 A、C 和 E。A 在第二区域创建 DynamoDB 副本，C 在第二区域复制 REST API 和 Lambda，E 使用 Route 53 延迟路由和健康检查。

这些组件共同支持多区域本地服务、低延迟访问和故障绕行。
explanations.en:
The correct answers are A, C, and E. A creates a DynamoDB replica in the second Region, C copies the REST API and Lambda functions there, and E uses Route 53 latency routing with health checks.

Together these support local multi-Region service, low-latency routing, and failover around unhealthy endpoints.

questions.content: A company has a web application that is hosted on Amazon EC2 instances. The company is deploying the application into multiple AWS Regions. The application consists of dynamic content such as WebSocket-based real-time product updates. The company uses Amazon Route 53 to manage all DNS records. Which solution will provide multi-Region access to the application with the LEAST latency?

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in front of the EC2 instances in each Region. Create a Route 53 A record with a latency-based routing policy. Add IP addresses of the ALBs as the value of the record.

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in front of the EC2 instances in each Region. Deploy an Amazon CloudFront distribution with an origin group that contains the ALBs as origins. Create a Route 53 alias record that points to the CloudFront distribution's DNS address.

options.label: C
options.content: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in front of the EC2 instances in each Region. Create a Route 53 A record with a multivalue answer routing policy. Add IP addresses of the NLBs as the value of the record.

options.label: D
options.content: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in front of the EC2 instances in each Region. Deploy an AWS Global Accelerator standard accelerator with an endpoint group for each NLB. Create a Route 53 alias record that points to the accelerator's DNS address.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。NLB 适合面向 TCP/WebSocket 的流量，AWS Global Accelerator 可优化到各区域 NLB 的网络路径并降低实时应用延迟，Route 53 别名记录提供稳定入口。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。NLB 适合面向 TCP/WebSocket 的流量，AWS Global Accelerator 可优化到各区域 NLB 的网络路径并降低实时应用延迟，Route 53 别名记录提供稳定入口。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. NLBs fit TCP/WebSocket traffic, AWS Global Accelerator optimizes the network path to regional NLBs for lower latency, and a Route 53 alias provides a stable entry point.

questions.content: A company manages its multi-account environment by using AWS Organizations and AWS Control Tower. The company must deploy standardized security controls and compliance policies across all of its AWS accounts and AWS Regions. Any changes to these controls must be automatically applied to all accounts simultaneously. The company has the required security controls and compliance policies defined in AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) as a security controls construct. Which solution will deploy these controls across all accounts and Regions with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CDK app that includes an AWS CloudFormation StackSets construct. Configure the StackSets construct to use the security controls construct as its template. Specify the target accounts and Regions. Create automation to deploy the CDK app to create and manage the CloudFormation stack set.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS CDK app that synthesizes an AWS CloudFormation template from the security controls construct. Use Amazon EventBridge to invoke an AWS Lambda function to update a CloudFormation stack set when changes are made to the security controls construct.

options.label: C
options.content: Convert the security controls construct to an AWS CloudFormation macro. Create a CloudFormation stack set that references the macro and deploys the macro to all target accounts. Use Organizations to automatically add new accounts to the stack set's list of target accounts.

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Control Tower to create a customized landing zone that includes configurations from the security controls construct. Configure AWS Control Tower to automatically enroll new accounts and to apply the landing zone template.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。AWS Control Tower 可使用包含安全控制构造配置的自定义 landing zone，并自动注册新账号、应用 landing zone 模板，符合低运维开销的集中治理方式。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。AWS Control Tower 可使用包含安全控制构造配置的自定义 landing zone，并自动注册新账号、应用 landing zone 模板，符合低运维开销的集中治理方式。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. AWS Control Tower can use a customized landing zone with security control construct configurations, automatically enroll new accounts, and apply the landing zone template with low operational overhead.

questions.content: A company needs to manage shared libraries for various projects across its development AWS account and production AWS account. The company has configured IAM roles for developers and has defined an AWS CodePipeline pipeline by using the AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK). A DevOps engineer must implement a solution to ensure that only developers can access the latest versions of the libraries. The solution must test shared packages independently before the shared packages are consumed by other applications and before they go to production. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a single AWS CodeArtifact repository for development and production in a central account. Use IAM policies for the developer roles to allow only developers to access the shared libraries. Create an Amazon EventBridge role to start an AWS CodeBuild project and to test each package before the package is copied to the production repository.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS CodeArtifact repository in the development account. Create another CodeArtifact repository in the production account. For the development repository, add a repository policy that allows only developers to access the shared libraries. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to start the CodePipeline pipeline and to test each package before the package is copied to the production repository.

options.label: C
options.content: Create a single Amazon S3 bucket with versioning enabled for development and production in a central account. Use IAM policies for the developer roles to allow only the developers to access the shared libraries. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to start an AWS CodeBuild project and to test each package before the package is copied to production.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket with versioning enabled in the development account. Create another S3 bucket with versioning enabled in the production account. For the development S3 bucket, add a bucket policy that allows only developers to access the shared libraries. Create an Amazon EventBridge role to start the CodePipeline pipeline. Configure the role to test each package when the package is copied to production and to revert the changes if the tests fail.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。共享库流程应使用开发和生产两个 CodeArtifact 仓库；开发仓库限制开发者访问，并通过 EventBridge 启动 CodePipeline，在复制到生产仓库前测试每个包。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。共享库流程应使用开发和生产两个 CodeArtifact 仓库；开发仓库限制开发者访问，并通过 EventBridge 启动 CodePipeline，在复制到生产仓库前测试每个包。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. A shared library workflow should use separate development and production CodeArtifact repositories, restrict developer access to the development repository, and use EventBridge and CodePipeline to test packages before copying them to production.

questions.content: A company manages environments for its application in multiple AWS accounts. Each environment account is in a different OU in AWS Organizations. A DevOps team is responsible for the application deployment process across the environments. The deployment process uses an AWS CodePipeline pipeline in a Shared Services account. The DevOps team members are in the same user group. The team members have administrative access to all accounts through AWS IAM Identity Center. A recent deployment problem in the development environment required the DevOps team to perform manual steps. The deployment to the production environment then resulted in an incident that caused the pipeline to fail, which blocked new deployments for several hours. A DevOps engineer needs to ensure that only the pipeline can perform deployments in the production environment. The DevOps engineer must have access to the environment in case of an emergency. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Update the DevOps group to have the ReadOnlyAccess permission set for the production accounts. Configure the DevOps engineer user with a new permission set that has AdministratorAccess permissions and that allows the user to assume the pipeline role. Add an SCP that denies modification of resources by any entity other than the pipeline role.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an SCP that denies all write actions for the DevOps team members on the production OU. Configure a new user in IAM Identity Center for the DevOps engineer with a new permission set that has AdministratorAccess permissions. Add an SCP that denies modification of resources by any entity other than the pipeline role.

options.label: C
options.content: Update the DevOps group to be able to assume the pipeline role for the production accounts. Configure a new user in IAM Identity Center for the DevOps engineer with a new permission set that has AdministratorAccess permissions. Add an SCP that denies modification of resources by any entity other than the DevOps engineer.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an SCP that denies all write actions for the DevOps team members on the production OU. Use a specific tag to tag the resources that CodePipeline provisions. Add an SCP that denies modification of tagged resources by any entity other than the DevOps engineer.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。SCP 拒绝除 pipeline role 以外的实体修改资源时，工程师即使有普通权限也会被拦截；让其日常只读，并在紧急时假设 pipeline role，既避免误改又保留恢复路径。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。SCP 拒绝除 pipeline role 以外的实体修改资源时，工程师即使有普通权限也会被拦截；让其日常只读，并在紧急时假设 pipeline role，既避免误改又保留恢复路径。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. If an SCP denies modifications by any entity other than the pipeline role, normal user permissions are still blocked; daily read-only access plus emergency assumption of the pipeline role prevents accidental changes while preserving a recovery path.

questions.content: A company builds container images and stores them on Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) in the company's primary AWS Region. A DevOps engineer wants to replicate all the company's ECR repository images to a secondary Region. The DevOps engineer creates a new ECR repository in the secondary Region and configures permission on the new repository to allow replication. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Pull the existing primary ECR images and then push the images to the secondary ECR repository. Create a replication rule on the primary ECR registry to replicate the images to the secondary ECR registry.

options.label: B
options.content: Pull the existing primary ECR images and then push the images to the secondary ECR repository. Configure permission on the primary ECR registry to allow access from the secondary Region.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure permission on the primary ECR registry to allow access from the secondary Region. Create a replication rule on the primary ECR registry to replicate the images to the secondary ECR registry.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an AWS Lambda function to automatically save the ECR images to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure cross-Region replication for the S3 bucket. Configure a second Lambda function to push the images to ECR repositories in the replication destination Region when images are replicated to the S3 bucket.

questions.explanation:
正确答案是 C。应授予辅助区域访问主 ECR 注册表的权限，并在主注册表上创建复制规则，把镜像复制到辅助 ECR 注册表。

讨论补充了 ECR 复制对新推送镜像是事件驱动的，因此方案核心是用原生跨区域复制处理后续镜像同步。

explanations.zh:
正确答案是 C。应授予辅助区域访问主 ECR 注册表的权限，并在主注册表上创建复制规则，把镜像复制到辅助 ECR 注册表。

讨论补充了 ECR 复制对新推送镜像是事件驱动的，因此方案核心是用原生跨区域复制处理后续镜像同步。
explanations.en:
The correct answer is C. Grant the secondary Region access to the primary ECR registry and create a replication rule on the primary registry to replicate images to the secondary registry.

The discussion notes that ECR replication is event-driven for newly pushed images, so native cross-Region replication is the core mechanism for ongoing synchronization.

questions.content: A company is experiencing failures in its AWS CodeDeploy deployments for a critical application. The application is deployed on Amazon EC2 instances. A DevOps engineer must analyze the failed deployments to identify the root cause of the failures. Which solution will provide the appropriate information to troubleshoot the deployment issues?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure VPC Flow Logs to monitor network traffic. Use Amazon Inspector to detect non-network deployment issues. Use Amazon Detective to analyze the findings.

options.label: B
options.content: Enable detailed monitoring on the EC2 instances. Use AWS Systems Manager Run Command to run troubleshooting scripts on all the EC2 instances simultaneously. Analyze the results in AWS CloudTrail logs.

options.label: C
options.content: Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs to review application logs. Analyze CodeDeploy deployment logs in the /opt/codedeploy- agent/deployment-root/ directory on the EC2 instances. Use AWS X-Ray to trace requests through the application components.

options.label: D
options.content: Examine AWS Trusted Advisor checks for the CodeDeploy deployments. Use the AWS Health Dashboard to monitor application health. Analyze performance metrics in Amazon CloudWatch dashboards.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。排查 CodeDeploy 失败时，应查看 CloudWatch Logs 中的应用日志、EC2 实例上 /opt/codedeploy-agent/deployment-root/ 下的部署日志，并用 X-Ray 跟踪跨组件请求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。排查 CodeDeploy 失败时，应查看 CloudWatch Logs 中的应用日志、EC2 实例上 /opt/codedeploy-agent/deployment-root/ 下的部署日志，并用 X-Ray 跟踪跨组件请求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. For CodeDeploy troubleshooting, review application logs in CloudWatch Logs, inspect deployment logs under /opt/codedeploy-agent/deployment-root/ on the EC2 instances, and use X-Ray to trace requests across components.

questions.content: A company has developed a web application that conducts seasonal sales on public holidays. The web application is deployed on AWS and uses AWS services for storage, database, computing, and encryption. During seasonal sales, the company expects high network traffic from a large number of users. The company must receive insights regarding any unexpected behavior during the sale. A DevOps team wants to review the insights upon detecting anomalous behaviors during the sale. The DevOps team wants to receive recommended actions to resolve the anomalous behaviors. The recommendations must be provided on the provisioned infrastructure to address the issues that might occur in the future. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Enable Amazon DevOps Guru in the AWS account. Determine the coverage for DevOps Guru for all supported AWS resources in the account. Use the DevOps Guru dashboard to find the analysis, recommendations, and related metrics.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Configure Amazon DevOps Guru to send notifications about important events to the company when anomalies are identified.

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Store Amazon CloudWatch logs, AWS CloudTrail data, and AWS Config data in the S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to generate insights on the data. Create a dashboard by using Amazon QuickSight.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure email message reports for an Amazon QuickSight dashboard. Schedule and send the email reports to the company.

options.label: E
options.content: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Configure Amazon Athena to send query results about important events to the company when anomalies are identified.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A 和 B。DevOps Guru 可自动分析受支持资源，提供异常分析、建议和相关指标；结合 SNS 可在发现重要异常时通知团队。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A 和 B。DevOps Guru 可自动分析受支持资源，提供异常分析、建议和相关指标；结合 SNS 可在发现重要异常时通知团队。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and B. DevOps Guru can automatically analyze supported resources and provide anomaly analysis, recommendations, and related metrics; SNS integration notifies the team when important anomalies are identified.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer needs to design a cloud-based solution to standardize deployment artifacts for AWS Cloud deployments and on-premises deployments. There is currently no routing traffic between the on-premises data center and the AWS environment. The solution must be able to consume downstream packages from public repositories and must be highly available. Data must be encrypted in transit and at rest. The solution must store the deployment artifacts in object storage and deploy the deployment artifacts into Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). The deployment artifacts must be encrypted in transit if the deployment artifacts travel across the public internet. The DevOps engineer needs to deploy this solution in less than two weeks. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: B
options.content: Use an AWS Direct Connect connection and a VPN connection to connect the on-premises data center to AWS. Deploy third-party artifact management software on Amazon EC2 instances.

options.label: C
options.content: Use two AWS VPN connections to connect the on-premises data center to AWS. Use AWS CodeArtifact to store the deployment artifacts.

options.label: D
options.content: Use parallel AWS Direct Connect connections to connect the on-premises data center to AWS. Deploy third-party artifact management software on Amazon EC2 instances.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。在少于两周且需要高可用的约束下，两条 AWS VPN 连接可快速建立混合连接，CodeArtifact 则以托管方式存储部署构件，避免自管 EC2 的额外开销。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。在少于两周且需要高可用的约束下，两条 AWS VPN 连接可快速建立混合连接，CodeArtifact 则以托管方式存储部署构件，避免自管 EC2 的额外开销。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. Under a less-than-two-week timeline and high availability requirement, two AWS VPN connections provide quick hybrid connectivity, while CodeArtifact stores deployment artifacts as a managed service without EC2 management overhead.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer successfully creates an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster that includes managed node groups. When the DevOps engineer tries to add node groups to the cluster, the cluster returns an error that states, "NodeCreationFailure: Instances failed to join the Kubernetes cluster." The DevOps engineer confirms that the EC2 worker nodes are running and that the EKS cluster is in an active state. How should the DevOps engineer troubleshoot this issue?

options.label: A
options.content: Ensure that the EKS cluster's VPC subnets do not overlap with the 172.17.0.0/16 CIDR range.

options.label: B
options.content: Use kubectl to update the kubeconfig file to use the credentials that created the cluster.

options.label: C
options.content: Run the AWSSupport-TroubleshootEKSWorkerNode runbook.

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) OpenID Connect (OIDC) provider for the cluster.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。EKS 工作节点加入集群时，集群 VPC 子网不应与 172.17.0.0/16 CIDR 范围重叠；该选项直接处理源答案给出的正确配置点。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。EKS 工作节点加入集群时，集群 VPC 子网不应与 172.17.0.0/16 CIDR 范围重叠；该选项直接处理源答案给出的正确配置点。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. For EKS worker nodes to join properly, the cluster VPC subnets should not overlap with the 172.17.0.0/16 CIDR range; this option directly addresses the configuration identified by the source answer.

questions.content: A company is developing an ecommerce application that has a backend that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The application has a static frontend website that is hosted in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company uses a GitHub repository for version control and must automate builds and deployments whenever code is pushed to the main branch. The company must deploy changes to the frontend and backend independently of each other. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a single AWS CodePipeline pipeline to use for the frontend and the backend. Specify the GitHub repository as the source. Configure two build stages that use AWS CodeBuild as the action provider to build the frontend components and backend components, respectively. Configure two deployment stages that use AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider to deploy the frontend and backend, respectively.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a single AWS CodePipeline pipeline to use for the frontend and the backend. Specify the GitHub repository as the source. Configure two build stages that use AWS CodeBuild as the action provider to build the frontend components and backend components, respectively. Configure two deployment stages. For the backend stage, use AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider to deploy the backend to the EC2 instances. For the frontend stage, use Amazon S3 as the action provider to deploy the frontend to the S3 bucket.

options.label: C
options.content: Create two AWS CodePipeline pipelines: one for the frontend and one for the backend. Specify the GitHub repository as the source. Configure a build stage that uses AWS CodeBuild as the action provider for each pipeline to build the frontend and the backend. Configure a deployment stage that uses AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider for each pipeline to deploy the frontend and the backend.

options.label: D
options.content: Create two AWS CodePipeline pipelines: one for the frontend and one for the backend. Specify the GitHub repository as the source. Configure a build stage that uses AWS CodeBuild as the action provider for each pipeline to build the frontend and the backend. For the backend pipeline, use AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider to deploy the backend to the EC2 instances. For the frontend pipeline, use Amazon S3 as the action provider to deploy the frontend to the S3 bucket.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。前端和后端需要独立部署，因此创建两个 CodePipeline 流水线；前端用 S3 部署静态内容，后端用 CodeDeploy 部署到 EC2，配置标准且运维开销低。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。前端和后端需要独立部署，因此创建两个 CodePipeline 流水线；前端用 S3 部署静态内容，后端用 CodeDeploy 部署到 EC2，配置标准且运维开销低。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Independent frontend and backend deployment calls for two CodePipeline pipelines; the frontend can use the native S3 deploy action, while the backend uses CodeDeploy for EC2, keeping the setup standard and low overhead.

questions.content: A company has an RPO of 24 hours and an RTO of 10 minutes for a critical web application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS account. The company wants to set up AWS Backup for its AWS environment. A DevOps engineer configures AWS Organizations for AWS Backup. The DevOps engineer creates a new centralized AWS account to store the backups. Each EC2 instance has four Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes attached. Which solution will meet this requirement MOST securely?

options.label: A
options.content: Create encrypted backup vaults and customer managed AWS KMS keys in both accounts. Configure AWS Backup to create full EC2 backups as AMIs. Copy the backups to the centralized vault.

options.label: B
options.content: Create encrypted vaults in both accounts by using the source account's AWS KMS key. Configure AWS Backup to create EC2 AMIs. Copy the AMIs to the centralized vault.

options.label: C
options.content: Create backup vaults in both accounts. Use AWS managed keys for encryption. Configure AWS Backup to create EC2 AMIs. Copy the AMIs to the centralized vault.

options.label: D
options.content: Create encrypted vaults in both accounts. Use a customer managed KMS key in the source account. Use an AWS managed key in the centralized account. Configure AWS Backup to create EC2 AMIs. Copy the AMIs to the centralized vault.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。为了满足 10 分钟 RTO，将 EC2 作为 AMI 进行完整备份可快速恢复包含多个 EBS 卷的环境；在两个账号中使用客户托管 KMS 密钥和加密备份保管库也支持更好的跨账号安全控制。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。为了满足 10 分钟 RTO，将 EC2 作为 AMI 进行完整备份可快速恢复包含多个 EBS 卷的环境；在两个账号中使用客户托管 KMS 密钥和加密备份保管库也支持更好的跨账号安全控制。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. To meet a 10-minute RTO, full EC2 backups as AMIs enable fast recovery of the instance and its EBS volumes; encrypted backup vaults and customer managed KMS keys in both accounts provide stronger cross-account security control.

questions.content: A company wants to proactively monitor and respond to AWS service issues that might affect an application. The company must correlate AWS Health events with application performance metrics and must set up automated alerts. The solution must give the company the ability to archive events, test the application's latency in different scenarios, and create custom metrics. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CloudTrail to log all AWS Health events. Use Amazon Athena to query the logs and to correlate the logs with application metrics stored in Amazon Timestream for LiveAnalytics. Set up AWS Chatbot for real-time notifications.

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon EventBridge to route AWS Health events to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create a metric filter for AWS Health events. Create custom metrics in CloudWatch that are based on application performance data. Set up CloudWatch alarms that correlate AWS Health events with the custom metrics.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the AWS Health Dashboard to send notifications to Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS). Use AWS Lambda to correlate the notifications with metrics and to update custom metrics in Amazon CloudWatch. Set up CloudWatch alarms for the custom metrics. Use AWS Systems Manager for automated remediation.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure AWS X-Ray to trace AWS Health events and application performance. Use Amazon QuickSight to visualize the correlations between events and metrics. Use Amazon GuardDuty to detect anomalies in the application's behavior and to provide alerts.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。EventBridge 可把 AWS Health 事件路由到 CloudWatch Logs 以满足归档需求，再通过指标筛选器和应用自定义指标，在 CloudWatch 中完成关联告警。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。EventBridge 可把 AWS Health 事件路由到 CloudWatch Logs 以满足归档需求，再通过指标筛选器和应用自定义指标，在 CloudWatch 中完成关联告警。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. EventBridge can route AWS Health events to CloudWatch Logs for archiving, then metric filters and application custom metrics allow correlation and alerting within CloudWatch.

questions.content: A company uses a CI/CD pipeline to deploy its workload in the ap-southeast-2 Region. The company receives images through a Network Load Balancer (NLB) and processes the images in AWS Fargate tasks on an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster. An Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository stores the images as Docker images. The company uses Amazon Route 53 to configure DNS. The company saves the images in an Amazon S3 bucket and saves the metadata from the images in an Amazon DynamoDB table. The company wants to expand the workload to a second Region. A DevOps engineer needs to build a highly available and resilient design to expand the workload to the eu-west-2 Region. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the FEWEST configuration changes? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Configure ECR replication to eu-west-2 on the repository. Configure an NLB in eu-west-2 that resolves to Fargate tasks in an ECS cluster in eu-west-2. Configure a latency routing policy in Route 53 for the two workloads.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure the DynamoDB table as a global table with a replica in eu-west-2. Configure the Fargate tasks to interact with the DynamoDB table in ap-southeast-2.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the DynamoDB table as a global table with a replica in eu-west-2. Configure the Fargate tasks to interact with the DynamoDB table in the same Region that the tasks run in.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure a new S3 bucket in eu-west-2. Configure data replication between the S3 bucket in ap-southeast-2 and the S3 bucket in eu-west-2. Configure the Fargate tasks to use the S3 bucket in the same Region that the tasks run in to perform S3 PUT operations and GET operations.

options.label: E
options.content: Configure an S3 Multi-Region Access Point for the S3 bucket in ap-southeast-2 and a new S3 bucket in eu-west-2. Configure two-way replication on the S3 buckets. Configure the workloads to use the Multi-Region Access Point for S3 PUT operations and GET operations.

options.label: F
options.content: Configure the CI/CD pipeline to deploy ECR images to both Regions. Configure an NLB in eu-west-2 that resolves to Fargate tasks in an ECS cluster in eu-west-2. Configure a failover routing policy in Route 53 for the two workloads.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、C 和 E。A 通过 ECR 复制和 eu-west-2 中的 NLB/ECS 工作负载支持区域部署，C 使用 DynamoDB 全局表让任务访问本区域表，E 使用 S3 多区域访问点和双向复制简化跨区域对象访问。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、C 和 E。A 通过 ECR 复制和 eu-west-2 中的 NLB/ECS 工作负载支持区域部署，C 使用 DynamoDB 全局表让任务访问本区域表，E 使用 S3 多区域访问点和双向复制简化跨区域对象访问。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, C, and E. A uses ECR replication and an eu-west-2 NLB/ECS workload, C uses DynamoDB global tables with same-Region access from tasks, and E uses S3 Multi-Region Access Points with two-way replication for cross-Region object access.

questions.content: A company has deployed a microservices-based application on Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). The application is experiencing performance issues. The company needs to identify which microservices are causing the issues. Which solution will provide this information?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS X-Ray for each ECS task. Create an X-Ray group for each microservice. Implement custom X-Ray subsegments in each microservice to capture detailed timing information. Use an X-Ray service map to visualize and identify slow microservices and requests.

options.label: B
options.content: Configure AWS X-Ray for each ECS task. Use an X-Ray service map to visualize the application's architecture and request flow. Filter the X-Ray traces by response time and error rate. Identify the microservices that have high latency or high error rates. Analyze individual traces to identify slow microservices and requests.

options.label: C
options.content: Configure Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights for each ECS task. Analyze Container Insights metrics to identify slow microservices. Use CloudWatch Logs Insights to filter the Container Insights log data by response time and error rate. Analyze the log data to identify slow requests.

options.label: D
options.content: Configure Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights for each ECS task. Use the CloudWatch automatic dashboard for Amazon ECS to identify slow microservices. Use CloudWatch Logs Insights to analyze the Container Insights performance logs for each ECS task to identify slow requests.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。为每个 ECS 任务配置 X-Ray 后，可通过服务地图查看架构和请求流，并按响应时间或错误率筛选 trace，定位高延迟或高错误率的微服务。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。为每个 ECS 任务配置 X-Ray 后，可通过服务地图查看架构和请求流，并按响应时间或错误率筛选 trace，定位高延迟或高错误率的微服务。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Configuring X-Ray for each ECS task enables the service map and trace filtering by response time or error rate, helping identify the microservices and individual requests causing latency or errors.

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations, AWS Control Tower, AWS Config, and Terraform to manage its AWS accounts and resources. The company must ensure that users deploy only AWS Lambda functions that are connected to a VPC in member AWS accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS Control Tower to use proactive controls (guardrails). Enable the optional controls (guardrails) implemented with AWS CloudFormation hooks for Lambda on all OUs.

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new SCP. Include a conditional statement that uses a StringEquals condition operator to check the lambd:Vpclds condition key against a list of VPC IDs. Configure the SCP to allow the lambda CreateFunction action and the lambda UpdateFunctionConfiguration action if the value of the condition key matches one of the VPC IDs.

options.label: C
options.content: Create a custom rule in AWS Config to detect Lambda functions that are not connected to a VPC when any Lambda function is created or updated.

options.label: D
options.content: Create a new SCP. Include a conditional statement that uses a Null condition operator to determine whether the lambda Vpclds condition key is absent. Configure the SCP to deny the lambda CreateFunction action and the lambda UpdateFunctionConfiguration action if the condition key is absent.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。由于 Terraform 会直接调用服务 API，基于 CloudFormation Hook 的预防控制可能不适用；SCP 在 IAM 授权边界拦截请求，可在缺少 lambda VpcIds 条件键时拒绝创建或更新函数配置。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。由于 Terraform 会直接调用服务 API，基于 CloudFormation Hook 的预防控制可能不适用；SCP 在 IAM 授权边界拦截请求，可在缺少 lambda VpcIds 条件键时拒绝创建或更新函数配置。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Because Terraform typically calls service APIs directly, CloudFormation Hook-based controls may not apply; an SCP works at the IAM authorization boundary and can deny Lambda create or update calls when the VpcIds condition key is absent.

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is planning to use the AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) to manage infrastructure as code (IaC) for a microservices-based application. The DevOps engineer must create reusable components for common infrastructure patterns and must apply the same cost allocation tags across different microservices. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a custom CDK construct library that includes common infrastructure patterns. Create a CDK app. Use the TagManager class to add cost allocation tags to the whole app. Use the custom CDK construct library to write a higher-level construct that contains all the microservices. Deploy the microservices as a single CDK stack with environment-specific configurations

options.label: B
options.content: Create a custom CDK construct library that includes common infrastructure patterns. Create a CDK app. Use the Tags class to add cost allocation tags to the whole app. Use the custom CDK construct library to write higher-level constructs for each microservice. Deploy the microservices as separate CDK stacks with environment-specific configurations.

options.label: C
options.content: Create AWS Service Catalog products that contain common infrastructure components. Create a CDK app. Use the TagManager class to add cost allocation tags to the whole app. Use the Service Catalog products to write a higher-level construct that contains all the microservices. Deploy the microservices as a single CDK stack with environment-specific configurations.

options.label: D
options.content: Create AWS Service Catalog products that contain common infrastructure components. Create a CDK app. Use the Tags class to add cost allocation tags to the whole app. Use the Service Catalog products to write higher-level constructs for each microservice. Deploy the microservices as separate CDK stacks with environment-specific configurations.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。自定义 CDK construct library 可复用通用基础设施模式，Tags 类可递归添加成本分配标签，按微服务拆分独立 CDK stack 则支持独立生命周期和环境配置。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。自定义 CDK construct library 可复用通用基础设施模式，Tags 类可递归添加成本分配标签，按微服务拆分独立 CDK stack 则支持独立生命周期和环境配置。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. A custom CDK construct library reuses common infrastructure patterns, the Tags class applies cost allocation tags recursively, and separate CDK stacks per microservice support independent lifecycles and environment-specific configuration.

questions.content: A company runs an application that uses an Amazon S3 bucket to store images. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a multi- Region disaster recover (DR) strategy for the S3 objects. The DevOps engineer enables two-way replication between the S3 buckets. The company must be able to fail over to a second S3 bucket that is in a second AWS Region. When an image is added to either S3 bucket, the image must be replicated to the other S3 bucket within 15 minutes. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Enable S3 Replication Time Control (S3 RTC) for each replication rule used in the configuration.

options.label: B
options.content: Create an S3 Multi-Region Access Point in an active-passive configuration.

options.label: C
options.content: Call the SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes operation in the Amazon S3 API when the company needs to fail over to the S3 bucket in the second Region.

options.label: D
options.content: Enable S3 Transfer Acceleration on both S3 buckets.

options.label: E
options.content: Configure a routing control in Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller. Add both S3 buckets in an active-passive configuration.

options.label: F
options.content: Use an Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller to shift traffic from the primary bucket to the failover bucket in the second Region.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、B 和 C。A 启用 S3 RTC 以满足 15 分钟复制目标，B 使用主动-被动 S3 多区域访问点简化访问，C 在故障切换时调用 SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、B 和 C。A 启用 S3 RTC 以满足 15 分钟复制目标，B 使用主动-被动 S3 多区域访问点简化访问，C 在故障切换时调用 SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, B, and C. A enables S3 RTC to support the 15-minute replication target, B uses an active-passive S3 Multi-Region Access Point, and C performs failover with SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes.

questions.content: A company is developing a mobile app that requires extensive automated testing across multiple device types. The company is using AWS CodePipeline for its CI/CD pipeline. The company must implement a scalable testing solution that can handle increased test loads as the app grows. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST management overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Integrate AWS Device Farm with the pipeline to run the tests and scale as needed.

options.label: B
